Info

Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/accordion.tsx::Accordion
Props:
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * A single section may be closed when this is enabled.
 */
collapsible?: boolean = false

defaultValue?: string | readonly string[]

onValueChange?: (value: string | string[]) => void

/**
 * Single keeps one section open; multiple allows comparison across sections.
 */
type?: 'single' | 'multiple' = 'single'

value?: string | readonly string[]
Imports 
import { Accordion, AccordionContent, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Single Open story ok 
const SingleOpen = () => <ClinicalContextAccordion defaultValue="identity" />;
Multiple Open story ok 
const MultipleOpen = () => <WorkflowAccordion />;
Disabled Item story ok 
const DisabledItem = () => (
  <Accordion
    aria-label="Patient record sections"
    type="single"
    collapsible
    defaultValue="available"
  >
    <AccordionItem value="available">
      <AccordionTrigger>Visit summary</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>The visit summary is available to the current role.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem value="restricted" disabled>
      <AccordionTrigger>Restricted clinical notes</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>Only clinicians with the required permission can review these notes.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <Accordion aria-label="Result review guidance" type="single" collapsible>
    <AccordionItem value="guidance">
      <AccordionTrigger>Review before acknowledging a critical result</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>
        Confirm the patient identity, specimen, collection time, reference range, and verification status. Compare the result with the patient context and current treatment. If the value may require immediate action, follow the clinic escalation policy, document the acknowledgement, and ensure the responsible clinician is clear before closing the review.
      </AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
);
Empty Section story ok 
const EmptySection = () => (
  <Accordion aria-label="Optional visit details" type="single" collapsible>
    <AccordionItem value="empty">
      <AccordionTrigger>Additional visit details</AccordionTrigger>
      <AccordionContent>No additional visit details have been recorded.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
  </Accordion>
);
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState('identity');

  return (
    <Accordion
      aria-label="Controlled patient context"
      type="single"
      collapsible
      value={value}
      onValueChange={(next) => setValue(next as string)}
    >
      <AccordionItem value="identity">
        <AccordionTrigger>Identity and assurance</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Verified against the patient record.</AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
      <AccordionItem value="consent">
        <AccordionTrigger>Consent and communication</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Communication preferences were confirmed for this visit.</AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
    </Accordion>
  );
};
Keyboard Navigation story ok 
const KeyboardNavigation = () => <ClinicalContextAccordion defaultValue="identity" />;

description?: string

entries: LedgerEntry[]

onViewAll?: () => void

state?: | 'ready'
| 'loading'
| 'error'
| 'permission-denied'
| 'not-eligible' = 'ready'

title?: string

/**
 * 'recent' renders the newest entries without search, filters, or pagination.

Imports 
import { ActivityLedger } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Full story ok 
const Full = () => <ActivityLedger entries={activityEntries} state="ready" />;
Recent story ok 
const Recent = () => <ActivityLedger
    entries={[...activityEntries].reverse()}
    state="ready"
    variant="recent"
    onViewAll={fn()} />;
Recent Empty story ok 
const RecentEmpty = () => <ActivityLedger entries={[]} state="ready" variant="recent" onViewAll={fn()} />;
Date Range story ok
Date range lives in a popover; the trigger reports the active range.
const DateRange = () => <ActivityLedger entries={activityEntries} state="ready" />;
State Treatment story ok
Quiet states: settled is plain text; voided keeps a badge and a struck amount.
const StateTreatment = () => <ActivityLedger entries={activityEntries} state="ready" />;
Full Mobile 320 story ok
320px: search takes its own row; the wide ledger scrolls horizontally.
const FullMobile320 = () => <ActivityLedger entries={activityEntries} state="ready" />;

    onSetFloor={fn()} />;

Alert

design-system-components-alert · ./src/components/ui/alert.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/alert.tsx::Alert
Props:
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Accessible name for the dismiss action.
 */
dismissLabel?: string = 'Dismiss alert'

/**
 * Decorative leading content, preferably a canonical Kura icon.
 */
icon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Adds a keyboard-reachable close action; alerts are never auto-dismissed.
 */
onDismiss?: () => void

/**
 * Use status for routine updates and alert for urgent user attention.
 */
role?: 'alert' | 'status'

/**
 * Semantic meaning of the message; tone is paired with explicit text and optional icon.
 */
tone?: | 'neutral'
| 'info'
| 'success'
| 'warning'
| 'danger'
| 'ai'
| 'inverse' = 'neutral'
Imports 
import {
    AiBrainIcon,
    Alert,
    AlertAction,
    AlertDescription,
    AlertIcon,
    AlertTitle,
    Button,
    InformationIcon,
    OfflineIcon,
    RefreshIcon,
    SuccessIcon,
    WarningIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <Alert>
    <AlertTitle>Review state saved</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>The record is ready for the next workflow step.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
);
Semantic Tones story ok 
const SemanticTones = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full max-w-2xl flex-col gap-[var(--space-inset-card)]">
    <Alert tone="neutral">
      <AlertTitle>Draft record</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Changes are stored locally until you submit the review.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="info" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Processing in progress</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>The latest result is being prepared for review.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="success" icon={<SuccessIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Verification complete</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>The record passed the configured validation checks.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="warning" icon={<WarningIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Review required</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Confirm the highlighted details before continuing.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="danger" icon={<AlertIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Sync failed</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>The latest changes were not sent. Retry or review the connection status.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="ai" icon={<AiBrainIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Assistant suggestion</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>An AI-generated suggestion is available for review before use.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="inverse">
      <AlertTitle>Read-only workspace</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Editing is unavailable for this session.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
  </div>
);
With Icon And Actions story ok 
const WithIconAndActions = () => (
  <Alert tone="info" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>New result available</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Open the result to confirm the status and continue the review.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm">Open result</Button>
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Review later</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Danger Recovery story ok 
const DangerRecovery = () => (
  <Alert tone="danger" role="alert" icon={<AlertIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Connection lost</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Your unsent changes are preserved. Reconnect before submitting the review.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm" variant="destructive" leadingIcon={<RefreshIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>Retry connection</Button>
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">View details</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Dismissible story ok 
const Dismissible = () => {
  const [visible, setVisible] = useState(true);

  return visible ? (
    <Alert
      tone="success"
      icon={<SuccessIcon {...storyIconProps} />}
      onDismiss={() => setVisible(false)}
    >
      <AlertTitle>Changes saved</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>You can continue to the next section.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
  ) : (
    <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setVisible(true)}>Show alert again</Button>
  );
};
Urgent Operational Notice story ok 
const UrgentOperationalNotice = () => (
  <Alert tone="warning" role="alert" icon={<WarningIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Identity confirmation required</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Confirm the patient identity before opening or sharing the record.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm">Confirm identity</Button>
      <Button size="sm" variant="ghost">Cancel</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Permission Restricted story ok 
const PermissionRestricted = () => (
  <Alert tone="neutral" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Access restricted</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Your role can view this information but cannot edit it.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Contact workspace admin</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Offline Recovery story ok 
const OfflineRecovery = () => (
  <Alert tone="warning" icon={<OfflineIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Working offline</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>New changes will remain on this device until the connection is restored.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline" leadingIcon={<RefreshIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>Check connection</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Rich Description story ok 
const RichDescription = () => (
  <Alert tone="info" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Before you continue</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>
      <p>Make sure the record has the correct owner and review context.</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Check the identity details.</li>
        <li>Confirm the selected review scope.</li>
      </ul>
    </AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
);
Stacked Status Summary story ok 
const StackedStatusSummary = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full max-w-2xl flex-col gap-[var(--space-inset-card)]" aria-label="Service status summary">
    <Alert tone="success" icon={<SuccessIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Core records</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Available and responding normally.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="warning" icon={<WarningIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>Document processing</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Running with reduced throughput. New uploads may take longer.</AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <Alert tone="danger" role="alert" icon={<AlertIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
      <AlertTitle>External results</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>Unavailable. Do not rely on a missing result as confirmation.</AlertDescription>
      <AlertAction>
        <Button size="sm" variant="outline">View service details</Button>
      </AlertAction>
    </Alert>
  </div>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <Alert tone="warning" icon={<WarningIcon {...storyIconProps} />} onDismiss={() => undefined}>
    <AlertTitle>Review context changed while you were working</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>
      Another authorized user updated this record. Review the latest information before saving so that your decision is based on current data and no important changes are overwritten.
    </AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button size="sm">Review latest changes</Button>
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Keep my draft</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Density Modes story ok 
const DensityModes = () => (
  <div className="grid w-full max-w-2xl gap-[var(--space-inset-card)]">
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density} className="flex flex-col gap-[var(--space-stack-label)]">
        <span className="k-label">{density}</span>
        <Alert tone="info" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
          <AlertTitle>Processing in progress</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>The latest result is being prepared for review.</AlertDescription>
          <AlertAction>
            <Button size="sm">View status</Button>
          </AlertAction>
        </Alert>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Mobile Actions story ok 
const MobileActions = () => (
  <Alert tone="danger" role="alert" icon={<AlertIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Submission needs attention</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Resolve the highlighted fields before submitting this record.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction>
      <Button fullWidth>Review fields</Button>
      <Button fullWidth variant="outline">Save as draft</Button>
    </AlertAction>
  </Alert>
);
Inverse Notice story ok 
const InverseNotice = () => (
  <Alert tone="inverse" icon={<InformationIcon {...storyIconProps} />}>
    <AlertTitle>Read-only mode</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Actions are hidden because this workspace is currently viewing an archived record.</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
);

Props:
children?: ReactNode

 */
defaultOpen?: boolean = false

onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

/**

open?: boolean
Imports 
import {
    AlertDialog,
    AlertDialogAction,
    AlertDialogCancel,
    AlertDialogContent,
    AlertDialogDescription,
    AlertDialogFooter,
    AlertDialogHeader,
    AlertDialogMedia,
    AlertDialogTitle,
    AlertDialogTrigger,
    AlertIcon,
    Button,
    DeleteIcon,
    InformationIcon,
    WarningIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <AlertDialog>
    <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="outline">Remove draft</Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Remove this draft?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          This removes the unsent draft from your workspace. This action cannot be undone.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Keep draft</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Remove draft</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Compact Confirmation story ok 
const CompactConfirmation = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent size="sm">
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Allow session sharing?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          The selected colleague can view this record during the active consultation.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Do not allow</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Allow sharing</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
With Media story ok 
const WithMedia = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogMedia tone="info"><InformationIcon aria-hidden="true" /></AlertDialogMedia>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Start the record review?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          Opening the review reserves this record for your current session until you finish or release it.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Review later</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Start review</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Destructive Confirmation story ok 
const DestructiveConfirmation = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent size="sm">
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogMedia tone="danger"><DeleteIcon aria-hidden="true" /></AlertDialogMedia>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Delete this attachment?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          The file will be permanently removed from this draft. The clinical record itself will not change.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel variant="ghost">Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Delete attachment</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Unsaved Changes story ok 
const UnsavedChanges = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogMedia tone="warning"><WarningIcon aria-hidden="true" /></AlertDialogMedia>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Leave without saving changes?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          Your edits to the review note have not been saved. Leaving now discards those changes.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Keep editing</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Discard changes</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Pending Action story ok 
const PendingAction = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent size="sm">
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Remove the draft now?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          The action is in progress. Keep this dialog open until the operation finishes.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel disabled>Keep draft</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive" loading closeOnAction={false}>Removing draft</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Explicit Acknowledgement story ok 
const ExplicitAcknowledgement = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent closeOnEscape={false}>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogMedia tone="warning"><AlertIcon aria-hidden="true" /></AlertDialogMedia>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Review the policy change</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          This workspace policy changes who can access future records. Choose a visible action to continue.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Review policy</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <AlertDialog defaultOpen>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Archive the inactive care-plan draft?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          This draft is no longer visible in the active care-plan workspace. It remains in the audit history with its author and timestamp, but it cannot be edited or reopened as an active plan. Confirm that no current follow-up depends on this draft before archiving it.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Keep active</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Archive draft</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);

const DensityModes = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density}>

          </AlertDialogContent>
        </AlertDialog>
      </div>

  </div>
);

    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogMedia tone="danger"><DeleteIcon aria-hidden="true" /></AlertDialogMedia>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Delete the selected attachment?</AlertDialogTitle>

);

Announcement

design-system-components-announcement · ./src/components/ui/announcement.stories.tsx
A compact sidebar announcement for one optional, non-critical next step. Critical clinical and operational messages belong in Alert instead.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/announcement.tsx::Announcement
Props:
/**
 * Label for the single optional follow-up action.
 */
actionLabel?: ReactNode

/**
 * Supporting context, when the title alone is not enough to act.
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * Whether the person can remove this non-critical announcement.
 */
dismissible?: boolean = false

/**
 * Accessible name for the dismiss action.
 */
dismissLabel?: string = 'Dismiss announcement'

/**
 * A canonical Kura icon. Pass null to omit it.
 */
icon?: ReactNode = <ShieldIcon aria-hidden="true" />

onAction?: () => void

/**
 * Called after the announcement is dismissed.
 */
onDismiss?: () => void

/**
 * The short, actionable message.
 */
title: ReactNode
Imports 
import { Announcement, Button, InformationIcon, ShieldIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <div className={styles.sidebar}>
    <Announcement
      title="Keep your workspace secure"
      description="Review your sign-in options when you have a moment."
      actionLabel="Review security"
    />
  </div>
);
Dismissible story ok 
const Dismissible = () => {
  const [isShown, setIsShown] = useState(true);

  return (
    <div className={styles.sidebar}>
      {isShown ? (
        <Announcement
          title="A new workflow guide is available"
          description="Open it when you are ready to review the changes."
          dismissible
          actionLabel="Open guide"
          onDismiss={() => setIsShown(false)}
        />
      ) : (
        <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsShown(true)}>Show announcement</Button>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
Without Action story ok 
const WithoutAction = () => (
  <div className={styles.sidebar}>
    <Announcement
      icon={<InformationIcon aria-hidden="true" />}
      title="Scheduled maintenance"
      description="Reports may load more slowly tonight from 01:00 to 01:30 ICT."
    />
  </div>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <div className={styles.sidebar}>
    <Announcement
      icon={<ShieldIcon aria-hidden="true" />}
      title="Review the workspace access policy before you share patient records with a new partner organization"
      description="The policy explains which role may send records, how access is logged, and what to do when the recipient details change."
      actionLabel="Review policy"
    />
  </div>
);
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => (
  <Announcement
    title="Set your shift preferences"
    description="Choose how you want to receive non-urgent updates."
    actionLabel="Set preferences"
  />
);

AppShell

Info

Component: src/components/shared/app-shell/app-shell.tsx::AppShell
Props:
activeKey: string

/**
 * Derived from capabilities — see deriveAvailableModes. One mode hides the switcher.
 */
availableModes: ClinicMode[]

/**
 * Slot above the content for licence lifecycle or outage banners.
 */
banner?: ReactNode

children: ReactNode

/**
 * Page gutters by default; full-height workspaces can own their internal spacing.
 */
contentInset?: 'page' | 'none' = 'page'

defaultCollapsed?: boolean = false

/**
 * Utility actions shown in the sidebar footer, or in the station/mobile topbar.
 */
headerActions?: ReactNode

mode: 'clinical' | 'front-desk' | 'collection'

/**
 * Navigation for the active mode. Defaults to the mode registry.
 */
nav?: NavGroup[]

notificationCount?: number = 0

onBranchChange?: (branchId: string) => void

onModeChange?: (mode: ClinicMode) => void

onNavigate: (key: string) => void

onOpenNotifications?: () => void

onOpenSearch?: () => void

onOpenSettings?: () => void

onShiftChange?: (shift: ClinicShift) => void

onSignOut?: () => void

onWorkspaceChange?: (workspaceId: string) => void

/**
 * Effective capabilities used to remove unauthorized navigation items.
 */
permissions?: unknown

/**
 * Shell chrome for the current workspace context. Independent from the active mode.
 */
posture?: 'sidebar' | 'station' = 'sidebar'

/**
 * Replaces workspace context when a route is explicitly person-global.
 */
scopeLabel?: string

/**
 * Station context for front-desk and collection work.
 */
station?: {
  /** Physical booth or desk identifier, e.g. PSC-01. */
  id: string;
  /** Station role inside collection mode; one booth measures vitals, another draws. */
  role?: 'vitals' | 'phlebotomy';
  shift: ClinicShift;
}

user: {
  name: string;
  email: string;
  /** Professional licence verified (KYD). Gates clinical mode, shown in the account menu. */
  licenceVerified: boolean;
}

workspace: {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  branches?: WorkspaceBranch[];
  activeBranchId?: string;
}

/**
 * All workspaces the user belongs to. One workspace hides the switcher chevron.
 */
workspaces?: ClinicWorkspace[]
Imports 
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle, AppShell, Button } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Full Clinic story ok
Full clinic: every module enabled, a doctor holding all capabilities.
const FullClinic = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    headerActions={
      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
        Demo
      </Button>
    }
    initialMode="clinical"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
    workspaces={allWorkspaces}
  />
);
Full Bleed Workspace story ok
Edge-to-edge workspace ownership without shell gutters.
const FullBleedWorkspace = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    contentInset="none"
    initialMode="clinical"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
  />
);
Solo Doctor story ok
Solo doctor: one mode only → no mode switcher, no switch chrome at all. The simplest customer never pays complexity tax for the multi-role model.
const SoloDoctor = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="clinical"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.soloDoctor}
    workspace={soloCabinet}
  />
);
Existing Destinations Only story ok
The registry exposes only destinations backed by an app route.
const ExistingDestinationsOnly = () => (
  <ShellPlayground initialMode="clinical" permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull} />
);
Multi Role Nurse story ok
Multi-role nurse: front desk + collection, no clinical (no licence, no clinical capabilities). The switcher shows exactly the earned modes.
const MultiRoleNurse = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="front-desk"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.nurseFrontDeskCollection}
    licenceVerified={false}
    user={nurseUser}
    station={{ id: 'DESK-02', shift: 'morning' }}
  />
);
Mode Switch story ok
Switching modes swaps navigation and lands on the mode's entry destination.
const ModeSwitch = () => (
  <ShellPlayground initialMode="clinical" permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull} />
);
Collection Sidebar story ok
Collection defaults to the shared navigation shell for mixed-role work.
const CollectionSidebar = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="collection"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.nurseFrontDeskCollection}
    licenceVerified={false}
    user={nurseUser}
  />
);
Collection Station story ok
Explicit station posture: no sidebar, station identity + shift in the topbar. Scan-first booth work is not navigation-first work — the chrome yields.
const CollectionStation = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="collection"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.nurseFrontDeskCollection}
    licenceVerified={false}
    user={nurseUser}
    posture="station"
    station={psc01}
  />
);
With Licence Banner story ok
Licence lifecycle banner in the banner slot — pending review example.
const WithLicenceBanner = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="front-desk"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
    licenceVerified={false}
    banner={
      <Alert tone="warning">
        <AlertTitle>Licence under review</AlertTitle>
        <AlertDescription>
          Clinical ordering unlocks once verification finishes — usually within 1 business day.
        </AlertDescription>
      </Alert>
    }
  />
);
With Badge Counts story ok
Badge counts on nav items surface work waiting in other destinations.
const WithBadgeCounts = () => {
  const nav = MODE_REGISTRY['front-desk'].nav.map((group) => ({
    ...group,
    items: group.items.map((item) =>
      item.key === 'arrivals'
        ? { ...item, badgeCount: 4 }
        : item.key === 'queue'
          ? { ...item, badgeCount: 7 }
          : item,
    ),
  }));

  return (
    <ShellPlayground
      initialMode="front-desk"
      permissions={PERMISSIONS.nurseFrontDeskCollection}
      licenceVerified={false}
      user={nurseUser}
      nav={nav}
    />
  );
};
Earnings Person Global Scope story ok
Person-owned Earnings appears only with self-ledger access and keeps one active nav item.
const EarningsPersonGlobalScope = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    activeKey="earnings"
    initialMode="clinical"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
    scopeLabel="All Kura workspaces"
  />
);
Earnings Hidden Without Self Access story ok
Delegated clinical access never exposes the person-owned Earnings destination.
const EarningsHiddenWithoutSelfAccess = () => (
  <ShellPlayground initialMode="clinical" permissions={['patient.read']} />
);
Collapsed Rail story ok
Collapsed rail keeps navigation reachable and reverses cleanly under rapid input.
const CollapsedRail = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="clinical"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
    defaultCollapsed
  />
);
Mobile story ok
Below 768px the sidebar yields to a left sheet with the same nav.
const Mobile = () => (
  <ShellPlayground initialMode="clinical" permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull} />
);
Long Content story ok
Long Khmer + English workspace and branch names must truncate, not break layout.
const LongContent = () => (
  <ShellPlayground
    initialMode="front-desk"
    permissions={PERMISSIONS.doctorFull}
    workspace={{
      id: 'ws-long',
      name: 'គ្លីនិកវេជ្ជសាស្ត្រ Mekong International Family Medicine & Diagnostics',
      branches: [
        {
          id: 'br-long',
          name: 'Sangkat Boeung Keng Kang Ti Muoy Branch — opposite the old market',
        },
      ],
      activeBranchId: 'br-long',
    }}
  />
);

import { AspectRatio, ImageIcon, SpinnerGapIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}><MediaSpecimen label="16:9 media surface" /></AspectRatio>
  </div>
);
Ratio Matrix story ok 
const RatioMatrix = () => (
  <div className="grid w-full max-w-4xl grid-cols-2 gap-[var(--space-inset-card)] sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4">
    {ratios.map(({ label, ratio }) => (
      <AspectRatio key={label} ratio={ratio}><MediaSpecimen label={label} /></AspectRatio>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Loading Reserve story ok 
const LoadingReserve = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <AspectRatio ratio={4 / 3}>
      <div className="flex size-full flex-col items-center justify-center gap-[var(--space-stack-control)] rounded-[var(--radius-card-surface)] border border-border bg-muted text-muted-foreground" role="status" aria-live="polite">
        <SpinnerGapIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        <span className="k-caption">Preparing secure media preview</span>
      </div>
    </AspectRatio>
  </div>
);
Custom Ratio story ok 
const CustomRatio = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <AspectRatio ratio={5 / 2}><MediaSpecimen label="Custom 5:2 media surface" /></AspectRatio>
  </div>
);
Mobile Reference story ok 
const MobileReference = () => (
  <div className="w-full">
    <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}><MediaSpecimen label="Responsive 16:9 preview" /></AspectRatio>
  </div>
);

AssessmentWorkspace

clinic-clinical-assessment · ./src/features/assessment/assessment-workspace.stories.tsx
The doctor's encounter surface. The assessment section is the loudest part of the card because it is the only part the rest of the journey reads: an order, a care plan, and a later review all trace back to a diagnosis recorded here.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/assessment/assessment-workspace.tsx::AssessmentWorkspace
Props:
assessment: {
  patientId: string;
  reasonForVisit: string;
  subjective: string;
  objective: string;
  vitals?: VitalsValues;
  diagnoses: readonly WorkingDiagnosis[];
  plan: string;
  recordedBy: string;
  status: AssessmentStatus;
}

onChange: (assessment: ClinicalAssessment) => void

/**
 * Hands the grounded assessment to test ordering.
 */
onOrderTests?: (assessment: ClinicalAssessment) => void

orderActionLabel?: string = 'Order tests'

patientDemographics: string

patientName: string
Imports 
import { AssessmentWorkspace } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
New Encounter story ok 
const NewEncounter = () => <Harness initial={EMPTY_ENCOUNTER} />;
Examined story ok 
const Examined = () => <Harness initial={WORKED_UP_ENCOUNTER} />;
Recording A Diagnosis story ok 
const RecordingADiagnosis = () => (
  <Harness initial={{ ...EMPTY_ENCOUNTER, reasonForVisit: 'Tired for two weeks' }} />
);
Uncoded Impression story ok 
const UncodedImpression = () => (
  <Harness
    initial={{
      ...EMPTY_ENCOUNTER,
      reasonForVisit: 'Tired for two weeks',
      diagnoses: [
        {
          id: 'dx-uncoded',
          code: '',
          label: 'Unexplained fatigue, cause not yet clear',
          certainty: 'working',
        },
      ],
    }}
  />
);
Everything Ruled Out story ok 
const EverythingRuledOut = () => (
  <Harness
    initial={{
      ...EMPTY_ENCOUNTER,
      reasonForVisit: 'Tired for two weeks',
      diagnoses: [
        {
          id: 'dx-excluded',
          code: 'E05.9',
          label: 'Thyrotoxicosis, unspecified',
          certainty: 'ruled-out',
          evidence: 'TSH normal on 12 June',
        },
      ],
    }}
  />
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <Harness
    initial={{
      ...WORKED_UP_ENCOUNTER,
      reasonForVisit:
        'Persistent tiredness for two weeks with intermittent light-headedness on standing, wants a general checkup before travelling',
      diagnoses: [
        {
          id: 'dx-long',
          code: 'D50.9',
          label: 'Iron deficiency anaemia, unspecified, suspected nutritional in origin',
          certainty: 'working',
          evidence:
            'Pale conjunctiva, resting pulse 96, reports heavy periods and a largely rice-based diet for the past year',
        },
      ],
    }}
  />
);
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => <Harness initial={WORKED_UP_ENCOUNTER} />;

AuthSessionRouter

clinic-auth-session-router · ./src/features/auth/auth-session-router.stories.tsx
Pure presentation boundary for an authentication session. Storybook owns deterministic snapshots here; BetterAuthSessionRouter supplies the live Better Auth hook in production.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/auth/auth-session-router.tsx::AuthSessionRouter
Props:
door: {
  /** Verified OTP routes include the canonical identifier. */
  onRouted: (route: DoorRoute, identifier?: string) => void;
  /** Decision fixtures; defaults cover the demo journeys. */
  accounts?: readonly AccountRecord[];
  expectedCode?: string;
  resendCooldownSecs?: number;
  initialMethod?: DoorMethod;
  /** Route-level throttle simulation; anti-enum still reports "sent" otherwise. */
  onRequestCode?: (identifier: string) => 'sent' | 'throttled';
}

error?: { message?: string } | null = null

isPending?: boolean = false

onRetrySession?: () => void

session: BetterAuthSession | null

workspaceGate: {
  workspaces: readonly GateWorkspace[];
  branches?: readonly GateBranch[];
  lastActiveWorkspaceId?: string | null;
  lastActiveBranchId?: string | null;
  status?: WorkspaceGateStatus;
  onEnter: (workspaceId: string, branchId?: string) => void;
  onCreateWorkspace: (name: string) => void;
  onRetry?: () => void;
  /** Story hook: render the list even for one workspace instead of auto-entering. */
  disableAutoEnter?: boolean;
}
Imports 
import { AuthSessionRouter } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Pending story ok
Initial Better Auth hook state: no protected workspace content is rendered.
const Pending = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={null}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }}
    isPending />;
Anonymous story ok
No session: reuse the approved OTP-first Door.
const Anonymous = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={null}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }} />;
Authenticated story ok
Valid Better Auth session: continue into Kura's workspace boundary.
const Authenticated = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={SESSION}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }} />;
Session Error story ok
Session lookup failed: block workspace data and expose a deterministic retry.
const SessionError = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={null}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }}
    error={{ message: 'Network request failed' }}
    onRetrySession={fn()} />;
Expired Session story ok
Expired or revoked cookie resolves to no session and returns to the Door.
const ExpiredSession = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={null}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
The session boundary delegates narrow-layout behavior to its canonical children.
const Mobile320 = () => <AuthSessionRouter
    session={SESSION}
    door={{ onRouted: fn() }}
    workspaceGate={{
      workspaces: DEMO_WORKSPACES,
      branches: DEMO_BRANCHES,
      lastActiveWorkspaceId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE,
      lastActiveBranchId: DEMO_LAST_ACTIVE_BRANCH,
      onEnter: fn(),
      onCreateWorkspace: fn(),
    }} />;

Autocomplete

design-system-components-autocomplete · ./src/components/ui/autocomplete.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 31 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/autocomplete.tsx::Autocomplete
Props:
/**
 * Preselects the first matching enabled option while searching.
 */
autoHighlight?: boolean = false

clearable?: boolean = false

defaultOpen?: boolean = false

defaultQuery?: string

defaultValue?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Explains why a disabled control is unavailable.
 */
disabledReason?: ReactNode

emptyMessage?: ReactNode = 'No options are available.'

/**
 * Explains a recoverable search or data-source failure.
 */
errorMessage?: ReactNode

filterItems?: (items: readonly T[], query: string) => readonly T[]

/**
 * Helper text for a safe, informed selection.
 */
helperText?: ReactNode

id?: string

inputProps?: Omit<
  ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'input'>,
  | 'aria-activedescendant'
  | 'aria-autocomplete'
  | 'aria-controls'
  | 'aria-expanded'
  | 'aria-invalid'
  | 'aria-required'
  | 'autoComplete'
  | 'disabled'
  | 'id'
  | 'name'
  | 'onBlur'
  | 'onChange'
  | 'onFocus'
  | 'onKeyDown'
  | 'placeholder'
  | 'readOnly'
  | 'role'
  | 'type'
  | 'value'
>

/**
 * Authoritative options supplied by the owning workflow. Free-form values are not submitted.
 */
items: unknown

/**
 * Visible label. Provide inputProps.aria-label when no label is shown.
 */
label?: ReactNode

loading?: boolean = false

loadingMessage?: ReactNode = 'Searching options…'

/**
 * Submitted hidden-field name for the selected identifier.
 */
name?: string

noResultsMessage?: ReactNode = 'No matching options found.'

onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void

onQueryChange?: (query: string) => void

onValueChange?: (value: string | undefined, item: T | undefined) => void

open?: boolean

placeholder?: string = 'Search options'

query?: string

/**
 * Shows the current selection without allowing a new search.
 */
readOnly?: boolean = false

renderItem?: (item: T, state: AutocompleteRenderState) => ReactNode

showTrigger?: boolean = false

size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' = 'md'

/**
 * Additional announced status supplied by an asynchronous owner.
 */
statusMessage?: ReactNode

value?: string
Imports 
import { Autocomplete, Button } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Assign reviewer"
    helperText="Search verified clinicians and workspace roles."
    placeholder="Search people or workspaces" />;
Auto Highlight story ok 
const AutoHighlight = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Select workspace"
    autoHighlight
    defaultOpen
    placeholder="Search workspaces" />;
Clear And Trigger story ok 
const ClearAndTrigger = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Assigned reviewer"
    defaultValue="clinician-jordan-davis"
    clearable
    showTrigger />;
Grouped Results story ok 
const GroupedResults = () => <Autocomplete items={options} label="Open workspace" defaultOpen showTrigger />;
Search Results story ok 
const SearchResults = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Find care-team member"
    defaultOpen
    defaultQuery="care"
    statusMessage="Results match the current care-team directory."
    clearable
    showTrigger />;
Loading story ok 
const Loading = () => <Autocomplete
    items={[]}
    label="Find patient record"
    defaultOpen
    loading
    loadingMessage="Searching the authorized record index…"
    placeholder="Search by verified identifier" />;
No Results story ok 
const NoResults = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Find workspace"
    defaultOpen
    defaultQuery="nonexistent location"
    noResultsMessage="No workspace matches this search. Try a clinic or workflow name." />;
Disabled With Reason story ok 
const DisabledWithReason = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Assign prescribing clinician"
    disabled
    disabledReason="A verified patient identity is required before a prescribing clinician can be assigned." />;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Assigned reviewer"
    defaultValue="clinician-morgan-lee"
    readOnly
    helperText="This assignment is locked after review submission." />;
Error Recovery story ok 
const ErrorRecovery = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Find clinic workspace"
    errorMessage="The workspace directory is unavailable. Check the connection and try again."
    showTrigger />;
Sizes And Density story ok 
const SizesAndDensity = () => (
  <div className="grid w-full max-w-xl gap-[var(--space-inset-card)]">
    {(['sm', 'md', 'lg'] as const).map((size) => (
      <Autocomplete
        key={size}
        items={options}
        label={`Reviewer (${size})`}
        size={size}
        showTrigger
        placeholder="Search clinician"
      />
    ))}
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density}>
        <Autocomplete
          items={options}
          label={`Reviewer density: ${density}`}
          showTrigger
          placeholder="Search clinician"
        />
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Form Value story ok 
const FormValue = () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<string | undefined>();

  return (
    <form className="flex w-full max-w-xl flex-col gap-[var(--space-inset-card)]" onSubmit={(event) => event.preventDefault()}>
      <Autocomplete
        items={options}
        label="Assign workflow owner"
        name="workflowOwnerId"
        value={value}
        onValueChange={setValue}
        clearable
        showTrigger
        helperText="The submitted form value is the selected record ID, not the search text."
      />
      <span className="k-caption">Selected ID: {value ?? 'None selected'}</span>
      <Button type="submit" disabled={!value}>Save assignment</Button>
    </form>
  );
};
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <Autocomplete
    items={[
      {
        id: 'long-care-team',
        label: 'Dr. Alexandra Montgomery-Williams, Consultant in Complex Care Coordination',
        description: 'Long-term care coordination · North River Community Health Centre · Available for verified referrals only',
        group: 'Clinicians',
      },
      ...options,
    ]}
    label="Assign specialist reviewer"
    defaultOpen
    showTrigger />;
Mobile Reference story ok 
const MobileReference = () => <Autocomplete
    items={options}
    label="Assign reviewer"
    defaultOpen
    showTrigger
    clearable
    helperText="Results become an inline list on narrow screens." />;

Avatar

design-system-primitives-avatar · ./src/components/ui/avatar.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/avatar.tsx::Avatar
Props:
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Semantic fallback treatment used when an image is unavailable.
 */
fallbackTone?: | 'neutral'
| 'brand'
| 'success'
| 'warning'
| 'danger'
| 'info'
| 'ai' = 'neutral'

/**
 * Shows a stable loading overlay while profile data is being resolved.
 */
loading?: boolean = false

/**
 * Optional semantic ring for review, presence, or active identity states.
 */
ring?: 'none' | AvatarTone = 'none'

/**
 * Pulse is optional and automatically disabled for reduced-motion users.
 */
ringAnimation?: 'none' | 'pulse' = 'none'

/**
 * Use circle for people and rounded for compact identity marks.
 */
shape?: 'circle' | 'rounded' = 'circle'

/**
 * Semantic size; md follows the root density setting for operational lists.
 */
size?: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' = 'md'
Imports 
import {
    Avatar,
    AvatarBadge,
    AvatarFallback,
    AvatarGroup,
    AvatarGroupCount,
    AvatarImage,
    CheckIcon,
    PlusIcon,
    UserPlusIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";

const FallbackInitials = () => <Avatar size="md" shape="circle" fallbackTone="neutral" aria-label="Jordan Davis">
    <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>;
Fallback Icon story ok 
const FallbackIcon = () => <Avatar size="md" aria-label="Profile image unavailable">
    <AvatarFallback />
</Avatar>;
Loaded Image story ok 
const LoadedImage = () => <Avatar size="md" aria-label="Jordan Davis">
    <AvatarImage src={profileImage} alt="Jordan Davis" />
    <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>;
Image Error Uses Fallback story ok

    <AvatarFallback>MC</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>;
Sizes And Shapes story ok 
const SizesAndShapes = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    {(['xs', 'sm', 'md', 'lg', 'xl'] as const).map((size) => (
      <Avatar key={size} size={size} aria-label={`Avatar size ${size}`}>
        <AvatarFallback>{size === 'xl' ? 'JD' : 'J'}</AvatarFallback>
      </Avatar>
    ))}
    <Avatar size="md" shape="rounded" aria-label="Rounded identity mark">
      <AvatarFallback>DCM</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
  </div>
);
Fallback Tones story ok 
const FallbackTones = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    {(['neutral', 'brand', 'success', 'warning', 'danger', 'info', 'ai'] as const).map((tone) => (
      <Avatar key={tone} size="lg" fallbackTone={tone} aria-label={`${tone} profile fallback`}>
        <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
      </Avatar>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Presence Badges story ok 
const PresenceBadges = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4">
    <Avatar aria-label="Jordan Davis, online">
      <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
      <AvatarBadge tone="success" aria-label="Online" />
    </Avatar>
    <Avatar aria-label="Morgan Chen, review required">
      <AvatarFallback>MC</AvatarFallback>
      <AvatarBadge tone="warning" aria-label="Review required">
        <CheckIcon aria-hidden="true" />
      </AvatarBadge>
    </Avatar>
    <Avatar aria-label="Alex Morgan, offline">
      <AvatarFallback>AM</AvatarFallback>
      <AvatarBadge tone="neutral" aria-label="Offline" position="top-left" />
    </Avatar>
  </div>
);
Badge Positions story ok 
const BadgePositions = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-5">
    {(['top-left', 'top-right', 'bottom-left', 'bottom-right'] as const).map((position) => (
      <Avatar key={position} shape="rounded" aria-label={`Avatar badge at ${position}`}>
        <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
        <AvatarBadge tone="info" position={position} aria-label="Processing" />
      </Avatar>

  </div>
);

    <AvatarGroup aria-label="Care team">

      </Avatar>
      <Avatar size="sm" aria-label="Morgan Chen">

      </Avatar>

      </Avatar>

      <AvatarGroupCount size="sm" tone="brand" aria-label="Invite care team member">

);

const RingsAndLoading = () => (

Badge

design-system-primitives-badge · ./src/components/ui/badge.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/badge.tsx::Badge
Props:
/**
 * Soft is the default for scan-friendly status labels.
 */
appearance?: 'soft' | 'solid' | 'outline' = 'soft'

/**
 * Use only for navigation. Badges must not become button-like actions.
 */
as?: 'span' | 'a' = 'span'

children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Optional status dot; pair it with text rather than relying on color alone.
 */
dot?: boolean = false

href?: string

/**
 * Canonical leading content such as a semantic icon or compact avatar.
 */
leading?: ReactNode

rel?: string

size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' = 'md'

target?: ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'a'>['target']

/**
 * Canonical trailing content for metadata or a compact avatar.
 */
trailing?: ReactNode

/**
 * Status or metadata meaning; badges are non-interactive by default.
 */
variant?: | 'neutral'
| 'primary'
| 'secondary'
| 'outline'
| 'success'
| 'warning'
| 'danger'
| 'info'
| 'ai' = 'neutral'
Imports 
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, Badge, CheckIcon, XIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Badge variant="neutral" size="md">Verification pending</Badge>;
Semantic Variants story ok 
const SemanticVariants = () => (
  <div className="flex max-w-sm flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    <Badge variant="neutral">Verification pending</Badge>
    <Badge variant="primary">Primary</Badge>
    <Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
    <Badge variant="success">Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning">Needs review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="danger">Sync error</Badge>
    <Badge variant="info">Processing</Badge>
    <Badge variant="ai">AI suggestion</Badge>
    <Badge variant="outline">Read-only</Badge>
  </div>
);
Appearance Matrix story ok 
const AppearanceMatrix = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    <Badge variant="success" appearance="soft">Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="success" appearance="solid">Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="success" appearance="outline">Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning" appearance="soft">Needs review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning" appearance="solid">Needs review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning" appearance="outline">Needs review</Badge>
  </div>
);
Sizes And Density story ok 
const SizesAndDensity = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-6">
    <div className="flex items-end gap-2">
      <Badge size="sm">Record</Badge>
      <Badge size="md">Record</Badge>
      <Badge size="lg">Record</Badge>
    </div>
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Badge variant="warning">Needs review</Badge>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{density}</span>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Status Dots And Icons story ok 
const StatusDotsAndIcons = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    <Badge variant="success" dot>Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning" dot>Needs review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="outline" leading={<CheckIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>Acknowledged</Badge>
    <Badge variant="danger" trailing={<XIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>Sync error</Badge>
  </div>
);
Avatar Pairing story ok 
const AvatarPairing = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    <Badge variant="outline" leading={<Avatar size="xs" aria-hidden="true"><AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback></Avatar>}>
      Jordan Davis
    </Badge>
    <Badge variant="info" appearance="soft" trailing={<Avatar size="xs" aria-hidden="true"><AvatarFallback>MC</AvatarFallback></Avatar>}>
      Assigned reviewer
    </Badge>
  </div>
);
Navigation Badge story ok 
const NavigationBadge = () => (
  <Badge as="a" href="#review-history" variant="info" appearance="outline">
    View review history
  </Badge>
);
Long Metadata story ok 
const LongMetadata = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <Badge variant="warning" size="lg" dot>
      Awaiting laboratory specimen confirmation
    </Badge>
  </div>
);
Operational State Matrix story ok 
const OperationalStateMatrix = () => (
  <div className="flex max-w-sm flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    <Badge variant="neutral">Draft</Badge>
    <Badge variant="info">Processing</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning">Pending review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="success">Completed</Badge>
    <Badge variant="danger">Failed</Badge>
    <Badge variant="outline">Read-only</Badge>
  </div>
);
Mobile Reference story ok 
const MobileReference = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full max-w-sm flex-wrap gap-2">
    <Badge variant="success" dot>Verified</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning" dot>Pending review</Badge>
    <Badge variant="danger" dot>Sync error</Badge>
    <Badge variant="info" appearance="outline">Processing</Badge>
  </div>
);
Full Matrix story ok
The full tone × appearance grammar in one glance: soft is the default reading, outline the lightest, solid the one salient chip per surface.
const FullMatrix = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
    {APPEARANCES.map((appearance) => (
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2" key={appearance}>
        <span className="w-14 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{appearance}</span>
        {VARIANTS.map((variant) => (
          <Badge appearance={appearance} key={variant} variant={variant}>
            {variant === 'ai' ? 'AI draft' : variant.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + variant.slice(1)}
          </Badge>
        ))}
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Count Badges story ok
Counts align without opting in — the label ships tabular numerals.
const CountBadges = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
    <Badge variant="neutral" size="sm">3</Badge>
    <Badge variant="primary" size="sm">28</Badge>
    <Badge variant="danger" size="sm">99+</Badge>
    <Badge variant="warning">132 flagged</Badge>
    <Badge variant="success">18/18 passed</Badge>
  </div>
);
Dark Theme story ok 
const DarkTheme = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
    {APPEARANCES.map((appearance) => (
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2" key={appearance}>
        {VARIANTS.map((variant) => (
          <Badge appearance={appearance} dot={appearance === 'soft'} key={variant} variant={variant}>
            {variant === 'ai' ? 'AI draft' : variant.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + variant.slice(1)}
          </Badge>
        ))}
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);

BookingDetailSheet

clinic-front-desk-booking-detail-sheet · ./src/features/front-desk/booking-detail-sheet.stories.tsx
Booking detail inset: one collection code told end-to-end — who it belongs to, what it orders, whether money moved, and its lifecycle as a timeline. Blocked codes explain themselves and expose the safe recovery door supplied by the caller (architecture reference: ReUI `solution-bookings-3`; every state maps to the canonical collection-code contract).
Prop types (react-docgen) 10 prop types 
Component: src/features/front-desk/booking-detail-sheet.tsx::BookingDetailSheet
Props:
booking: {
  code: string;
  /** Canonical lifecycle state — display labels derive from this, never freehand. */
  codeStatus: CollectionCodeStatus;
  whenLabel: string;
  itemsLabel: string;
  status: { label: string; tone: 'success' | 'warning' | 'neutral' };
  /** Branch the code was issued for; reception at another branch cannot redeem it. */
  branchId?: string;
  locationLabel?: string;
  providerLabel?: string;
  /** Who created the booking — reception on behalf vs the patient themselves. */
  creatorLabel?: string;
  /**
   * Capture contract (payment-ms): `paid` is the only real capture state;
   * `pending` means no capture exists yet. Amount in minor units.
   */
  payment?: { state: 'paid' | 'pending'; amountMinor: string };
}

/**
 * The desk's own branch; codes issued elsewhere cannot be redeemed here.
 */
deskBranchId?: string

/**
 * Redeem the code and start check-in. Absent → the action is not offered.
 */
onCheckIn?: (code: string) => void

/**
 * Parent-owned confirmation step for a cancelled booking becoming a walk-in.
 */
onConfirmWalkIn?: () => void

/**
 * Continue as a walk-in after a blocked code (reception door contract).
 */
onContinueAsWalkIn?: () => void

onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void

/**
 * Open the desk queue before any walk-in recovery for an already redeemed code.
 */
onOpenDeskQueue?: () => void

/**
 * Re-send the collection code to the patient's phone.
 */
onResendCode?: (code: string) => void

open: boolean

patient: {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  nameKhmer?: string;
  dob?: string;
  sexAtBirth: 'Female' | 'Male' | '';
  nid?: string;
  phone?: string;
  /** patient-ms assurance axis. */
  assurance: 'unverified' | 'verified';
  /** Minors require a present guardian before check-in continues. */
  minor?: boolean;
  guardianName?: string;
  /** Registered at this PSC or known only elsewhere in Kura. */
  registeredHere: boolean;
  lastVisitLabel?: string;
  bookings?: BookingSummary[];
  /**
   * Months since the phone channel was last verified. PROTOTYPE FIELD —
   * patient-ms stores only the assurance flag, not verification recency.
   */
  phoneVerifiedMonthsAgo?: number;
}
Imports 
import { BookingDetailSheet, Button } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Scheduled · paid — ready to check in story ok 
const ScheduledPaid = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87430')} />;
Issued · payment pending — resend available story ok 
const IssuedPendingPayment = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87431')} />;
Expired — walk-in recovery door story ok 
const ExpiredCode = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87510')} />;
Already redeemed — duplicate-visit guard story ok 
const AlreadyRedeemed = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87511')} />;
Cancelled — terminal state story ok 
const CancelledBooking = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87512')} />;
Issued for another branch story ok 
const WrongBranch = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87513')} deskBranchId={DEMO_BRANCH_ID} />;
Escape closes and restores focus story ok 
const EscapeRestoresFocus = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87430')} initialOpen={false} />;
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87430')} />;
Dark Theme story ok 
const DarkTheme = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87510')} />;
Blocked — read-only with no recovery action story ok 
const ReadOnlyBlocked = () => <SheetPlayground booking={bookingOf('GW87510')} readOnly />;
Long content — 320px story ok 
const LongContent320 = () => (
  <SheetPlayground
    booking={{
      ...bookingOf('GW87430'),
      itemsLabel: 'HbA1c, Lipoprotein(a), CMP (metabolic panel), Glucose (fasting)',
    }}
    patient={{
      ...sokPhearom,
      name: 'Sok Phearom Channary Longname',
      nameKhmer: 'សុខ ភារ៉ុម ចាន់ណារី',
    }}
  />
);

BookingsGrid

design-system-components-data-grid · ./src/components/ui/data-grid.stories.tsx
Stateful table composition for sortable, filterable, selectable, expandable, paginated, and large operational datasets. The owning workflow supplies the TanStack table state and all domain actions.
Prop types (react-docgen) 12 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/data-grid.tsx::DataGrid
Props:
children: ReactNode

className?: string

emptyState?: ReactNode = 'No records match the current view.'

errorState?: ReactNode

getRowLabel?: (row: TData) => string

isLoading?: boolean = false

layout?: {
  density?: DataGridDensity;
  borders?: DataGridBorders;
  striped?: boolean;
  stickyHeader?: boolean;
  width?: DataGridWidth;
  resizable?: boolean;
  rowsPinnable?: boolean;
}

loadingMessage?: ReactNode = 'Loading records'

loadingRows?: number = 5

onRowClick?: (row: TData) => void

recordCount: number

table: TanStackTable<TData>
Imports 
import {
    Alert,
    AlertAction,
    AlertDescription,
    AlertIcon,
    AlertTitle,
    Badge,
    Button,
    ChevronDownIcon,
    DatabaseIcon,
    DataGrid,
    DataGridColumnHeader,
    DataGridColumnVisibility,
    DataGridLoadMore,
    DataGridPagination,
    DataGridSelectAll,
    DataGridSelectRow,
    DataGridTable,
    DataGridToolbar,
    EmptyState,
    EmptyStateDescription,
    EmptyStateHeader,
    EmptyStateMedia,
    EmptyStateTitle,
    Input,
    RefreshIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Paginated Sortable story ok 
const PaginatedSortable = () => <BookingsGrid />;
Search And Column Visibility story ok 
const SearchAndColumnVisibility = () => <BookingsGrid showToolbar />;
Row Selection story ok 
const RowSelection = () => <BookingsGrid selectable />;
Expandable Rows story ok 
const ExpandableRows = () => <BookingsGrid expandable />;
Layout Variants story ok 
const LayoutVariants = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col gap-8">
    <BookingsGrid layout={{ density: 'compact', borders: 'cells' }} showPagination={false} />
    <BookingsGrid layout={{ striped: true, borders: 'none' }} showPagination={false} />
    <BookingsGrid layout={{ density: 'comfortable', width: 'auto' }} showPagination={false} />
  </div>
);
Resizable And Pinned Columns story ok 
const ResizableAndPinnedColumns = () => (
  <BookingsGrid
    pinnedColumns
    layout={{ resizable: true }}
    showToolbar
  />
);
Sticky Header And Pinned Rows story ok 
const StickyHeaderAndPinnedRows = () => (
  <BookingsGrid
    pinnedRows
    layout={{ stickyHeader: true, density: 'compact' }}
    scrollHeight="sm"
    showPagination={false}
  />
);

const Loading = () => <BookingsGrid loading />;
Empty story ok 
const Empty = () => <BookingsGrid data={[]} />;

Incremental Loading story ok

Long Content story ok

  <BookingsGrid
    data={[
      {
        ...bookings[0],
        patient:
          'Sokha Chan — verified name with additional transliteration and a long clinic-provided identifier',
        branch: 'Toul Kork Diagnostic and Preventive Care Centre — Main Collection Floor',
      },
    ]}
    layout={{ width: 'auto' }}
    showPagination={false}
  />
);

Desktop story ok

Density Reference story ok 
const DensityReference = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density} className="flex flex-col gap-1">
        <Breadcrumb label={`Breadcrumb in ${density} density`}>
          <BreadcrumbList>
            <BreadcrumbItem>
              <BreadcrumbLink href="/clinic">Clinic</BreadcrumbLink>
            </BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbSeparator />
            <BreadcrumbItem>
              <BreadcrumbPage>Visit review</BreadcrumbPage>
            </BreadcrumbItem>
          </BreadcrumbList>
        </Breadcrumb>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{density}</span>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);

Info

Props:
/**
 * Composes the styles onto one child, such as a Next.js Link.
 */
asChild?: boolean = false

children?: ReactNode

disabled?: any = false

/**
 * Adds a disclosure affordance; pass an icon to customize it.
 */
disclosure?: ReactNode | boolean = false

/**
 * Makes the action fill its containing action region.
 */
fullWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * Canonical leading content, usually a Kura icon.
 */
leadingIcon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Renders a pending state and prevents duplicate activation.
 */
loading?: boolean = false

ref?: Ref<HTMLButtonElement>

/**
 * Visual size; all sizes retain the Kura touch target minimum. Compact is for short inline row actions.
 */
size?: | 'compact'
| 'sm'
| 'md'
| 'default'
| 'xs'
| 'lg'
| 'icon'
| 'icon-xs'
| 'icon-sm'
| 'icon-lg' = 'md'

/**
 * Canonical trailing content, usually a Kura icon.
 */
trailingIcon?: ReactNode

/**
 * Semantic emphasis for the action.
 */
variant?: | 'primary'
| 'default'
| 'secondary'
| 'outline'
| 'ghost'
| 'link'
| 'destructive' = 'primary'
Imports 
import { Button, ChevronRightIcon, PlusIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Button variant="primary">Save visit draft</Button>;
Variants story ok 
const Variants = () => (
  <div className="flex max-w-3xl flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    <Button>Save visit draft</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Review later</Button>
    <Button variant="outline">Open record</Button>
    <Button variant="ghost">Dismiss</Button>
    <Button variant="link">View audit history</Button>
    <Button variant="destructive">Remove draft</Button>
  </div>
);
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => (
  <div className="flex max-w-3xl flex-col gap-6">
    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="compact">Row action</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">compact</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="xs">Extra small</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">xs</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="sm">Small action</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">sm</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="md">Medium action</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">md</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="default">Default action</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">default</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="lg">Large action</Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">lg</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="icon-xs" aria-label="Add diagnosis">
          <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">icon-xs</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="icon-sm" aria-label="Add diagnosis">
          <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">icon-sm</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="icon" aria-label="Add diagnosis">
          <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">icon</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <Button size="icon-lg" aria-label="Add diagnosis">
          <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </Button>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">icon-lg</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
);
Compact Table Row story ok 
const CompactTableRow = () => (
  <div role="row" className="flex w-full max-w-3xl items-center justify-between gap-3">
    <span role="cell">Fasting blood glucose</span>
    <div role="cell" className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2">
      <Button size="compact" variant="ghost">
        View
      </Button>
      <Button size="compact" variant="outline">
        Acknowledge result
      </Button>
    </div>
  </div>
);
Content Slots story ok 
const ContentSlots = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full max-w-xl flex-col gap-3">
    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
      <Button leadingIcon={<PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>
        Add follow-up test
      </Button>
      <Button variant="outline" trailingIcon={<ChevronRightIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>
        Open visit record
      </Button>
      <Button variant="secondary" disclosure>
        Choose draw method
      </Button>
    </div>
    <Button fullWidth>Start consultation</Button>
  </div>
);
Loading story ok

    </Button>
    <Button aria-pressed="true" variant="secondary">
      Include in order set
    </Button>
  </div>
);

);

  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">

  <div className="w-full max-w-xs">

  <div className="flex w-full max-w-sm flex-col gap-3">

    </Button>
    <Button fullWidth variant="destructive">

    <Button variant="secondary">Review later</Button>
    <Button variant="outline">Open visit record</Button>
  </div>
);
Desktop story ok 
const Desktop = () => (

      <Button variant="outline">Open visit record</Button>
    </div>

  </div>
);

const DensityReference = () => (

/**

Imports 
import { Badge, Button, ButtonGroup, IconButton, PlusIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Actions story ok 
const Actions = () => <ButtonGroup label="Visit actions">(<>
      <Button variant="secondary">Save draft</Button>
      <Button variant="primary">Start consultation</Button>
    </>)</ButtonGroup>;
Segmented story ok 
const Segmented = () => (
  <ButtonGroup label="Result view" segmented>
    <Button variant="outline">Summary</Button>
    <Button variant="outline">Timeline</Button>
    <Button variant="outline">Audit</Button>
  </ButtonGroup>
);
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => (
  <ButtonGroup label="Record actions" orientation="vertical">
    <Button variant="secondary" fullWidth>
      Save draft
    </Button>
    <Button variant="primary" fullWidth>
      Submit record
    </Button>
    <Button variant="destructive" fullWidth>
      Remove draft
    </Button>
  </ButtonGroup>
);
With Icon Button story ok 
const WithIconButton = () => (
  <ButtonGroup label="Quick actions">
    <Button variant="secondary" leadingIcon={<PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>
      Add note
    </Button>
    <IconButton aria-label="Add diagnosis">
      <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
  </ButtonGroup>
);
With Status Context story ok 
const WithStatusContext = () => (
  <ButtonGroup label="Order actions">
    <Button variant="secondary">Review order</Button>
    <Button variant="outline" trailingIcon={<Badge variant="warning">3</Badge>}>
      Pending items
    </Button>
  </ButtonGroup>
);
Mobile Stack story ok 
const MobileStack = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <ButtonGroup label="Consultation actions">
