Door

clinic-auth-door · ./src/features/auth/door.stories.tsx
The clinic door: one screen where sign-in IS sign-up. Phone OTP is primary, with email OTP as its alternate. Every path converges on the same account per identifier. Requesting a code never discloses whether the identifier already exists; revoked accounts are blocked on every method.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/auth/door.tsx::Door
Props:
/**
 * Decision fixtures; defaults cover the demo journeys.
 */
accounts?: unknown = [
  ...DEMO_ONBOARDING_SCENARIOS.filter(
    (scenario) => scenario.kind !== 'new-sign-up',
  ).map((scenario) => ({
    identifier: scenario.phone,
    route: 'workspace' as const,
    status: scenario.kind === 'revoked' ? ('revoked' as const) : ('active' as const),
  })),
  { identifier: 'dara@mekong.clinic', status: 'active', route: 'workspace' },
]

expectedCode?: string = '123456'

initialMethod?: 'phone' | 'email' = 'phone'

/**
 * Route-level throttle simulation; anti-enum still reports "sent" otherwise.
 */
onRequestCode?: (identifier: string) => 'sent' | 'throttled'

/**
 * Verified OTP routes include the canonical identifier.
 */
onRouted: (route: DoorRoute, identifier?: string) => void

resendCooldownSecs?: number = 30
Imports 
import { Door } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Phone-first form with email available as a progressive alternate.
const Default = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
Method Switch Preserves Input story ok
Switching methods preserves work and moves focus to the newly revealed field.
const MethodSwitchPreservesInput = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
New Account To Wizard story ok
New identifier: verify routes into the onboarding wizard (sign-up path).
const NewAccountToWizard = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
Returning Member story ok
Known member: same door, routed to workspace entry instead.
const ReturningMember = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
Invalid Code story ok
Wrong code: announced error, no disclosure about the identifier.
const InvalidCode = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
Revoked Account story ok
Revoked account: blocked after verify, on every method.
const RevokedAccount = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;
Email Method story ok
Email method: same machine, different identifier shape.
const EmailMethod = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} initialMethod="email" />;
Throttled story ok
Route-level throttle surfaces without leaking identifier existence.
const Throttled = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} onRequestCode={() => 'throttled'} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
Narrow viewport: country + phone stack, targets stay comfortable.
const Mobile320 = () => <Door onRouted={fn()} />;

DrawWorksheet

clinic-collection-draw-worksheet · ./src/features/collection/collection.stories.tsx
The phlebotomy worksheet: safety checklist gates collection; every sample must be collected (or the deferred ones resolved) and inversions confirmed — or explicitly overridden — before handoff.
Prop types (react-docgen) 9 prop types 
Component: src/features/collection/draw-worksheet.tsx::DrawWorksheet
Props:
/**
 * Deterministic clock for timers.
 */
now: number

onMarkVitalsDone: () => void

onNotify?: (tone: 'success' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'danger', text: string) => void

onSaveDraft: () => void

onSubmit: () => void

onUpdateSamples: (samples: Sample[]) => void

operatorName: string

patient: {
  id: string;
  /** Patient ID barcode, format P + 4–8 digits. */
  pid: string;
  name: string;
  initials: string;
  sex: 'F' | 'M';
  dob: string;
  orderId: string;
  checkInAt: string;
  waitingMinutes: number;
  /** waiting = blocked upstream · pending = ready for this booth · done. */
  journey: { identity: JourneyState; vitals: JourneyState; phlebo: JourneyState };
  fasting: string;
  allergies: string[];
  samples: Sample[];
  vitals?: VitalsValues;
}

samples: Sample[]
Imports 
import { AppShell, DrawWorksheet, ScanGate, VitalsForm } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Vitals done, three tubes awaiting — the normal start of a draw.
const Default = () => <WorksheetPlayground patient={readyPatient} />;
Checklist Gates Collection story ok
The checklist gate: collect actions stay disabled until all five safety items are confirmed — the deliberate improvement over the legacy prototype.
const ChecklistGatesCollection = () => <WorksheetPlayground patient={readyPatient} />;
Vitals Missing Warning story ok
Vitals skipped upstream — warning banner with the two legacy paths.
const VitalsMissingWarning = () => <WorksheetPlayground patient={DEMO_QUEUE[1]} />;
Clot Clock Running story ok
Clot clock. The SST was drawn 18 minutes into a 30-minute limit, so the station is viewed 4 minutes later to sit inside the 10-minute warning band — the point at which the tone changes is the thing worth proving.
const ClotClockRunning = () => (
  <WorksheetPlayground initialNow={DEMO_NOW + 4 * 60 * 1000} patient={DEMO_QUEUE[2]} />
);
Submit Gate Rules story ok
Submit gate math, asserted directly on the pure rule.
const SubmitGateRules = () => <WorksheetPlayground patient={readyPatient} />;
Mobile story ok
Mobile: rail stacks above the table; wide rows scroll inside the table.
const Mobile = () => <WorksheetPlayground patient={readyPatient} />;
Station Scan Gate story ok
Station entry: scanner owns focus; queue is the fallback, not the default.
const StationScanGate = function ScanGateStory() {
  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState<CollectionPatient | null>(null);
  if (loaded) {
    return (
      <div role="status" style={{ padding: 'var(--space-6)', textAlign: 'center' }}>
        Loaded {loaded.name} ({loaded.pid})
      </div>
    );
  }
  return <ScanGate onMatch={setLoaded} queue={phleboQueue} role="phlebotomy" />;
};
Scan Gate Browse Queue story ok
Queue fallback with wait-tone escalation (>30 warn, >60 danger).
const ScanGateBrowseQueue = () => <ScanGate onMatch={() => {}} queue={phleboQueue} role="phlebotomy" />;
Vitals Capture story ok
Vitals station: required fields, BMI auto, abnormal-confirm gate.
const VitalsCapture = function VitalsStory() {
  const [done, setDone] = useState(false);
  const patient = vitalsQueue[0];
  if (done) {
    return (
      <div role="status" style={{ padding: 'var(--space-6)', textAlign: 'center' }}>
        Vitals recorded for {patient.name} — ready for phlebotomy.
      </div>
    );
  }
  return <VitalsForm onSubmit={() => setDone(true)} patientId={patient.id} />;
};
Collection Mode In Shell story ok
The collection mode end-to-end: station shell → scan → worksheet.
const CollectionModeInShell = function ShellFlow() {
  const [patient, setPatient] = useState<CollectionPatient | null>(null);
  const [samples, setSamples] = useState<Sample[]>([]);
  const [done, setDone] = useState<string | null>(null);

  return (
    <AppShell
      activeKey="scan-gate"
      availableModes={['front-desk', 'collection']}
      mode="collection"
      onNavigate={() => {}}
      posture="station"
      station={{ id: 'PSC-01', role: 'phlebotomy', shift: 'morning' }}
      user={{ name: DEMO_OPERATOR, email: 'neang@mekong.clinic', licenceVerified: false }}
      workspace={{ id: 'ws-mekong', name: 'Mekong Clinic' }}
    >
      {done ? (
        <div role="status" style={{ padding: 'var(--space-8)', textAlign: 'center' }}>
          {done}
        </div>
      ) : patient ? (
        <DrawWorksheet
          now={DEMO_NOW}
          onMarkVitalsDone={() => {}}
          onSaveDraft={() => {
            setPatient(null);
          }}
          onSubmit={() => setDone(`Collection complete for ${patient.name}`)}
          onUpdateSamples={setSamples}
          operatorName={DEMO_OPERATOR}
          patient={patient}
          samples={samples}
        />
      ) : (
        <ScanGate
          onMatch={(match) => {
            setPatient(match);
            setSamples(match.samples);
          }}
          queue={phleboQueue}
          role="phlebotomy"
        />
      )}
    </AppShell>
  );
};

DropdownMenu

design-system-components-dropdown-menu · ./src/components/ui/dropdown-menu.stories.tsx
A compact, anchored menu for secondary contextual actions or small stateful choices. Keep decision-critical or comparable choices visible in the owning workflow instead.
Imports 
import {
    ArchiveIcon,
    Button,
    CheckIcon,
    CopyIcon,
    DeleteIcon,
    DownloadIcon,
    DropdownMenu,
    DropdownMenuCheckboxItem,
    DropdownMenuContent,
    DropdownMenuGroup,
    DropdownMenuItem,
    DropdownMenuLabel,
    DropdownMenuRadioGroup,
    DropdownMenuRadioItem,
    DropdownMenuSeparator,
    DropdownMenuShortcut,
    DropdownMenuSub,
    DropdownMenuSubContent,
    DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
    DropdownMenuTrigger,
    EditIcon,
    IconButton,
    MoreVerticalIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Actions story ok 
const Actions = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="outline" disclosure>Record actions</Button>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent align="start" aria-label="Record actions">
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Draft consultation</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuGroup>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Review draft note</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Duplicate draft</DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuGroup>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">Discard draft</DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
Icons And Shortcuts story ok 
const IconsAndShortcuts = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <IconButton aria-label="Open document actions" variant="tertiary">
        <MoreVerticalIcon aria-hidden="true" />
      </IconButton>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent align="end" aria-label="Document actions">
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <EditIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        Edit note
        <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘E</DropdownMenuShortcut>
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <CopyIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        Copy reference
        <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘C</DropdownMenuShortcut>
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem>
        <ArchiveIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        Archive draft
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
        <DeleteIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        Delete draft
      </DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
Nested Actions story ok 
const NestedActions = () => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="outline">Export review</Button>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent aria-label="Export review">
      <DropdownMenuItem>Copy review link</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSub>
        <DropdownMenuSubTrigger>Export format</DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuSubContent aria-label="Export format">
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            <DownloadIcon aria-hidden="true" />
            Download PDF
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            <DownloadIcon aria-hidden="true" />
            Download CSV
          </DropdownMenuItem>
        </DropdownMenuSubContent>
      </DropdownMenuSub>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
Selection Controls story ok 
const SelectionControls = () => <SelectionControlsExample />;
Availability And Permission story ok 
const AvailabilityAndPermission = () => (
  <DropdownMenu defaultOpen>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="outline" disclosure>Consultation actions</Button>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent aria-label="Consultation actions">
      <DropdownMenuLabel>Verification required</DropdownMenuLabel>
      <DropdownMenuItem disabled>Share consultation summary</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem disabled>Complete consultation</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuSeparator />
      <DropdownMenuItem>Save draft locally</DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <DropdownMenu defaultOpen>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline" disclosure>Thao tác với hồ sơ</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent align="start" aria-label="Thao tác với hồ sơ">
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          Sao chép liên kết xem lại cho Trung tâm Chăm sóc Sức khỏe Nguyễn Trãi – Ca trực buổi chiều
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          Xuất bản tóm tắt hội chẩn song ngữ Việt–Anh cho nhóm điều trị được phân quyền
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">
          Huỷ bản nháp chưa gửi và giữ lại lịch sử kiểm toán
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </div>
);
Mobile Reference story ok 
const MobileReference = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full justify-end">
    <DropdownMenu defaultOpen>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <IconButton aria-label="Open appointment actions" variant="tertiary">

      </DropdownMenuTrigger>

Mobile Long Action List story ok 
const MobileLongActionList = () => (
  <div className="flex w-full justify-start">
    <DropdownMenu defaultOpen>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline" disclosure>More review actions</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent align="start" aria-label="More review actions">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>Draft consultation utilities</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Review patient identity details</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Open the clinical history timeline</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Copy the consultation reference</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Send a follow-up reminder</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Request a supervising clinician review</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Print the current consultation summary</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Export a read-only review copy</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem>Save a private working copy</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Mark the draft for later review</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Restore the previous saved version</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">Discard the current draft</DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </div>
);
Dense Action List story ok 
const DenseActionList = () => (

    </DropdownMenuTrigger>

EmptyState

design-system-patterns-empty-state · ./src/components/shared/empty-state/empty-state.stories.tsx
Explains why a collection or workspace has no useful content and presents the next available action. Loading and failure use their dedicated owners.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/components/shared/empty-state/empty-state.tsx::EmptyState
Props:
align?: 'center' | 'start' = 'center'

surface?: 'plain' | 'muted' | 'outlined' = 'plain'
Imports 
import {
    Button,
    CalendarIcon,
    DatabaseIcon,
    EmptyState,
    EmptyStateContent,
    EmptyStateDescription,
    EmptyStateHeader,
    EmptyStateMedia,
    EmptyStateTitle,
    Input,
    MedicalFileIcon,
    NotificationsIcon,
    SearchIcon,
    UploadIcon,
    UserGroupIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <EmptyState>
    <EmptyStateHeader>
      <EmptyStateMedia variant="icon"><MedicalFileIcon aria-hidden="true" /></EmptyStateMedia>
      <EmptyStateTitle>No documents recorded</EmptyStateTitle>
      <EmptyStateDescription>
        This patient record does not contain uploaded or generated documents yet.
      </EmptyStateDescription>
    </EmptyStateHeader>
    <EmptyStateContent>
      <Button>Add document</Button>
    </EmptyStateContent>
  </EmptyState>
);
Search No Results story ok 
const SearchNoResults = () => (
  <EmptyState surface="muted">
    <EmptyStateHeader>
      <EmptyStateMedia variant="icon"><SearchIcon aria-hidden="true" /></EmptyStateMedia>
      <EmptyStateTitle>No patients match “Sokha Chann”</EmptyStateTitle>
      <EmptyStateDescription>
        Check the spelling, remove a filter, or search by verified phone number or patient ID.
      </EmptyStateDescription>
    </EmptyStateHeader>
    <EmptyStateContent>
      <Button variant="outline">Clear search and filters</Button>
    </EmptyStateContent>
  </EmptyState>
);
Search Within Empty State story ok 
const SearchWithinEmptyState = () => (
  <EmptyState align="start" surface="outlined">
    <EmptyStateHeader>
      <EmptyStateMedia variant="icon"><DatabaseIcon aria-hidden="true" /></EmptyStateMedia>

      </EmptyStateTitle>
      <EmptyStateDescription>
        The specimen was collected, but the result has not been verified by the laboratory. Do not

      </EmptyStateDescription>
    </EmptyStateHeader>
  </EmptyState>
);

          <EmptyStateMedia variant="icon"><DatabaseIcon aria-hidden="true" /></EmptyStateMedia>
          <EmptyStateTitle>{surface} surface</EmptyStateTitle>
          <EmptyStateDescription>
            A surface is used only when it communicates a real boundary or interaction context.

        </EmptyStateHeader>

    ))}
  </div>
);

    <FieldLabel htmlFor="field-phone" required>

    </FieldLabel>

        id="field-phone"
        inputMode="tel"
        placeholder="012 345 678"
        required
      />
      <FieldDescription>

      </FieldDescription>
    </FieldContent>
  </Field>
);

    </Field>
  </FieldGroup>
);
Select Control story ok 
const SelectControl = () => (
  <Field>
    <FieldLabel htmlFor="field-language">Preferred language</FieldLabel>

      <Select
        id="field-language"
        defaultValue=""
        options={[
          { value: "km", label: "ខ្មែរ" },
          { value: "en", label: "English" },
          { value: "vi", label: "Tiếng Việt" },
        ]}
        placeholder="Choose a language"
      />
      <FieldDescription>
        This changes communication language, not clinical terminology.
      </FieldDescription>
    </FieldContent>
  </Field>
);
Choice Controls story ok 
const ChoiceControls = () => (
  <FieldSet>
    <FieldLegend>Contact preferences</FieldLegend>
    <FieldGroup>
      <Field orientation="horizontal">
        <Checkbox>SMS appointment reminders</Checkbox>
        <FieldDescription>
          Sent only to the verified patient phone.
        </FieldDescription>
      </Field>
      <RadioGroup
        defaultValue="morning"
        description="Preferred callback window, not a guaranteed appointment time."
        legend="Preferred callback window"
        name="contact-time"
        orientation="horizontal"
      >
        <Radio value="morning">Morning</Radio>
        <Radio value="afternoon">Afternoon</Radio>
      </RadioGroup>
    </FieldGroup>
  </FieldSet>
);

const ResponsiveLayout = () => (
  <FieldGroup style={{ width: "min(42rem, 90vw)" }}>
    <Field orientation="responsive">
      <FieldLabel htmlFor="field-clinic">Clinic workspace</FieldLabel>
      <FieldContent>
        <Select
          id="field-clinic"
          options={[
            { value: "pp", label: "Kura Phnom Penh Central Clinic" },
            { value: "sr", label: "Kura Siem Reap Riverside Clinic" },
          ]}
        />
        <FieldDescription>
          Records and queues remain scoped to this workspace.
        </FieldDescription>
      </FieldContent>
    </Field>
    <FieldSeparator>Patient details</FieldSeparator>
    <Field orientation="responsive">
      <FieldLabel htmlFor="field-address">Address</FieldLabel>
      <Input id="field-address" />
    </Field>
  </FieldGroup>
);

    <FieldLabel htmlFor="field-code">Booking code</FieldLabel>

      <FieldError
        errors={[
          { message: "Enter the complete booking code." },
          { message: "Enter the complete booking code." },
          { message: "Use letters and numbers only." },

Filters

design-system-patterns-filters · ./src/components/shared/filters/filters.stories.tsx
Controlled query-builder filters. This is a generic visual pattern only: routes own URL serialization, validation rules, permissions, and API mapping.

  operators?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig['operators']>;
  placeholders?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig['placeholders']>;
}

menuPopupClassName?: string

onChange: (filters: Filter<T>[]) => void

radius?: 'default' | 'full' = 'default'

shortcutKey?: string = 'f'

shortcutLabel?: string = 'F'

showSearchInput?: boolean = true

size?: 'compact' | 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg' = 'sm'

trigger?: ReactElement

variant?: 'solid' | 'default' = 'default'

import { Button, FilterIcon, Filters, SegmentedToggle } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Various Field Types story ok 
const VariousFieldTypes = () => <FilterDemo />;
Operator Editing story ok 
const OperatorEditing = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('patient', 'contains', ['Sophea'])]} />;
Custom Trigger story ok 
const CustomTrigger = () => <FilterDemo trigger={<Button leadingIcon={<FilterIcon aria-hidden="true" />}>Refine visit list</Button>} />;
Compact Controls story ok 
const CompactControls = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['phnom-penh'])]} size="compact" />;
Small Controls story ok 
const SmallControls = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['phnom-penh'])]} size="sm" />;
Default Controls story ok 
const DefaultControls = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['phnom-penh'])]} size="default" />;
Large Controls story ok 
const LargeControls = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['phnom-penh'])]} size="lg" />;
Custom Control story ok 
const CustomControl = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('priority', 'is', ['urgent'])]} />;
Async Options story ok 
const AsyncOptions = () => <AsyncOptionsDemo />;
Data Grid Controlled story ok 
const DataGridControlled = () => <FilterDemo initialFilters={[createFilter('status', 'is_any_of', ['waiting'])]} />;
Vietnamese story ok 
const Vietnamese = () => <FilterDemo i18n={vietnamese} />;
Keyboard Shortcut story ok 
const KeyboardShortcut = () => {
  const [activeFilters, setActiveFilters] = useState<Filter<string>[]>([]);
  return (
    <Filters
      enableShortcut
      fields={fields}
      filters={activeFilters}
      onChange={setActiveFilters}
      shortcutKey="f"
      shortcutLabel="F"
    />
  );
};
Single Filter Per Field story ok 
const SingleFilterPerField = () => <FilterDemo allowMultiple={false} initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['phnom-penh'])]} />;
Controlled Owner Rewrites Ids story ok 
const ControlledOwnerRewritesIds = () => <RewritingOwnerDemo />;
Mobile Interactive story ok 
const MobileInteractive = () => <FilterDemo />;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <FilterDemo
    customFields={[
      {
        key: 'clinic',
        label: 'Clinic workspace with a long translated operational name',
        type: 'select',
        options: [
          {
            value: 'community-diagnostics',
            label: 'Kura Phnom Penh Central Clinic and Extended Community Diagnostics Collection Centre',
          },
        ],
      },
    ]}
    initialFilters={[createFilter('clinic', 'is', ['community-diagnostics'])]}
  />
);

FirstSignInFlow

clinic-flows-first-sign-in · ./src/features/auth/first-sign-in-flow.stories.tsx
The complete first-contact journey: Door → (Wizard for new accounts) → Workspace Gate → the clinic app. A brand-new doctor lands in their own cabinet (auto-entered — the gate never flashes for a single branch-less workspace); a returning member picks a workspace and branch instead. The landing copy reflects source-backed per-member attribution and never turns licence state into a workspace-wide EXPLORER/PRACTICE mode.
Imports 
import { FirstSignInFlow, InviteeOnboardingFlow } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
New Doctor Journey story ok
New doctor, end to end: door sign-up → wizard (phone came verified from the door) → own cabinet, straight into the shell with scoped setup access.
const NewDoctorJourney = () => <FirstSignInFlow />;
New Non Licensed Journey story ok
ML = NO lands without a credential or an inappropriate licence nag.
const NewNonLicensedJourney = () => <FirstSignInFlow />;
New Invitee Journey story ok
Invite link: missing facts only → inviting workspace → one-time in-app ML prompt.
const NewInviteeJourney = () => <InviteeOnboardingFlow />;
Returning Member Journey story ok
Returning member: the same door routes to workspace entry; picking a branch-enabled workspace asks for the branch before the shell opens.
const ReturningMemberJourney = () => <FirstSignInFlow />;
Wrong Code Recovery story ok
Recovery inside the flow: a wrong code blocks with an explanation and the journey continues on the same screen — no restart.
const WrongCodeRecovery = () => <FirstSignInFlow />;
Mobile 320 story ok
Narrow viewport: the whole journey stays operable at 320px.
const Mobile320 = () => <FirstSignInFlow />;

GlobalSearch

clinic-shell-global-search · ./src/components/shared/app-shell/global-search.stories.tsx
The shell-owned ⌘K palette: renders an already permission-filtered registry through the canonical Command component and owns the global hotkey. Records resolve through the reception doors only; selecting a consequential action starts its governed flow — nothing clinical completes inside the palette.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/shared/app-shell/global-search.tsx::GlobalSearch
Props:
description?: ReactNode = 'Search the destinations and actions available in your current workspace.'

/**
 * Shown when nothing matches; defaults to explaining the reception doors.
 */
emptyContent?: ReactNode = <span className={styles.empty}>
  <span>No authorised match.</span>
  <span className={styles.emptyHint}>
    Patients resolve by exact phone or booking code, or from recent patients. Names are never
    searchable across the registry.
  </span>
</span>

/**
 * Attach the global ⌘K / Ctrl+K listener. Exactly one owner per page.
 */
hotkey?: boolean = true

onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void

open: boolean

placeholder?: string = 'Exact phone, booking code, test, or action'

/**
 * Permission-filtered registry supplied by the application shell.
 */
sections: GlobalSearchSection[]

title?: ReactNode = 'Search Kura'
Imports 
import {
    AppointmentIcon,
    AppShell,
    CalendarIcon,
    CheckInIcon,
    FileIcon,
    GlobalSearch,
    MicroscopeIcon,
    UserMultipleIcon,
    UserSearchIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Wired to the shell trigger + ⌘K story ok 
const WiredToShell = () => <ShellPlayground registry={FRONT_DESK_REGISTRY} />;
Name query → doors explanation story ok 
const DoorsExplainOnNameQuery = function DoorsStory() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(true);
  return <GlobalSearch onOpenChange={setOpen} open={open} sections={FRONT_DESK_REGISTRY} />;
};
Permission-limited registry (phlebotomy station) story ok 
const PermissionLimitedRegistry = function LimitedStory() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(true);
  const sections: GlobalSearchSection[] = [
    {
      id: 'navigation',
      heading: 'Navigation',
      items: [
        {
          id: 'nav-worklist',
          label: 'Collection draw worklist',
          icon: <FileIcon aria-hidden="true" />,
          keywords: ['draw', 'samples'],
        },
        {
          id: 'nav-schedule',
          label: 'Shift schedule',
          icon: <CalendarIcon aria-hidden="true" />,
          keywords: ['shift'],
        },
      ],
    },
  ];
  return (
    <GlobalSearch
      description="This station’s registry is filtered before it reaches the palette — workspace administration never appears here."
      onOpenChange={setOpen}
      open={open}
      sections={sections}
    />
  );
};

HomeResultReviewPreview

clinic-clinical-home-result-review-preview · ./src/features/home/home-result-review-preview.stories.tsx
Home previews patient identity and routes review into the Results owner.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/features/home/home-result-review-preview.tsx::HomeResultReviewPreview
Props:
onNavigate?: (targetKey: string) => void

onRetry?: (signalKey: string) => void

signal: {
  key: string;
  kind: 'worklist' | 'info';
  title: string;
  /** Loud number for countable work. Zero renders as zero, not as blank. */
  count?: number;
  /** Loud non-numeric value, e.g. a pickup window "16:40". */
  headline?: string;
  /** Loud money value in minor units as a digit string (money law: minor units, ×100). */
  moneyMinor?: string;
  currency?: 'USD' | 'KHR';
  /** Evidence sentence under the value — what changes the next decision. */
  detail: string;
  tone: SignalTone;
  /** Text cue that must accompany a non-neutral tone. Color is never the only signal. */
  toneLabel?: string;
  state: SignalState;
  /** Plain-language failure shown with the retry action when state is `error`. */
  errorMessage?: string;
  /** Patient-level preview supplied only for the Results review lifecycle axis. */
  reviewItems?: ResultReviewQueueEntry[];
  /** Patient-level preview for a non-Results work queue. */
  workItems?: HomeWorkQueueEntry[];
  /** Outcome-labelled deep link into the owning surface's nav key. */
  action?: { label: string; targetKey: string };
}
Imports 
import { HomeResultReviewPreview } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Five Patients story ok 
const FivePatients = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.busyMorning)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Critical First story ok 
const CriticalFirst = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.criticalDay)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Loading story ok 
const Loading = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.loading)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Error And Retry story ok 
const ErrorAndRetry = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.partialData)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Missing Patient Details story ok 
const MissingPatientDetails = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview
        signal={{ ...resultsSignal(demo.busyMorning), reviewItems: undefined }}
        onNavigate={fn()}
        onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.longContent)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;
Mobile Width 320 story ok 
const MobileWidth320 = () => <div style={{ width: 'min(44rem, calc(100vw - 2rem))' }}><HomeResultReviewPreview signal={resultsSignal(demo.busyMorning)} onNavigate={fn()} onRetry={fn()} /></div>;

HomeSignalRow

clinic-clinical-home-signal-row · ./src/features/home/home-signal-row.stories.tsx
One signal as a quiet row on the white page — title, tone, evidence, value, and the deep link into the surface that owns the work. It carries no surface of its own: Home spends its single tray on the results it previews in full.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/features/home/home-signal-row.tsx::HomeSignalRow
Props:
onNavigate?: (targetKey: string) => void

onRetry?: (signalKey: string) => void

signal: {
  key: string;
  kind: 'worklist' | 'info';
  title: string;
  /** Loud number for countable work. Zero renders as zero, not as blank. */
  count?: number;
  /** Loud non-numeric value, e.g. a pickup window "16:40". */
  headline?: string;
  /** Loud money value in minor units as a digit string (money law: minor units, ×100). */
  moneyMinor?: string;
  currency?: 'USD' | 'KHR';
  /** Evidence sentence under the value — what changes the next decision. */
  detail: string;
  tone: SignalTone;
  /** Text cue that must accompany a non-neutral tone. Color is never the only signal. */
  toneLabel?: string;
  state: SignalState;
  /** Plain-language failure shown with the retry action when state is `error`. */
  errorMessage?: string;
  /** Patient-level preview supplied only for the Results review lifecycle axis. */
  reviewItems?: ResultReviewQueueEntry[];
  /** Patient-level preview for a non-Results work queue. */
  workItems?: HomeWorkQueueEntry[];
  /** Outcome-labelled deep link into the owning surface's nav key. */
  action?: { label: string; targetKey: string };
}
Imports 
import { HomeSignalRow } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Work Count story ok
The whole row is the deep link into the surface that owns the work.
const WorkCount = () => <ul
    role="list"
    style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0, width: '22rem' }}>
    <li>
        <HomeSignalRow
            signal={signal(demo.busyMorning, 'bookings')}
            onNavigate={fn()}
            onRetry={fn()} />
    </li>
</ul>;
Critical Tone story ok
Tone never travels on colour alone: the Badge carries the word.
const CriticalTone = () => <ul
    role="list"
    style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0, width: '22rem' }}>
    <li>
        <HomeSignalRow
            signal={{
              ...signal(demo.busyMorning, 'bookings'),
              tone: 'critical',
              toneLabel: 'Critical',
              detail: '1 booking missed a STAT repeat.',
            }}
            onNavigate={fn()}
            onRetry={fn()} />
    </li>
</ul>;
Money Value story ok
Money always renders through MoneyText, in minor units.

HomeSignalTile

clinic-clinical-home-signal-tile · ./src/features/home/home-signal-tile.stories.tsx
The stat-tile composition: one lifecycle axis as a flat grey tray with a white icon chip, a loud count, its evidence sentence, and the deep link into the surface that owns the work. The link stretches over the tray, so the whole tile is the target while the accessible name stays the outcome label. Reach for it only where peer metrics need a stable comparison boundary. Home itself renders its signals as rows — a tray needs a functional reason, and "these counts are related" is not one.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/features/home/home-signal-tile.tsx::HomeSignalTile
Props:
onNavigate?: (targetKey: string) => void

onRetry?: (signalKey: string) => void

signal: {
  key: string;
  kind: 'worklist' | 'info';
  title: string;
  /** Loud number for countable work. Zero renders as zero, not as blank. */
  count?: number;
  /** Loud non-numeric value, e.g. a pickup window "16:40". */
  headline?: string;
  /** Loud money value in minor units as a digit string (money law: minor units, ×100). */
  moneyMinor?: string;
  currency?: 'USD' | 'KHR';
  /** Evidence sentence under the value — what changes the next decision. */
  detail: string;
  tone: SignalTone;
  /** Text cue that must accompany a non-neutral tone. Color is never the only signal. */
  toneLabel?: string;
  state: SignalState;
  /** Plain-language failure shown with the retry action when state is `error`. */
  errorMessage?: string;
  /** Patient-level preview supplied only for the Results review lifecycle axis. */
  reviewItems?: ResultReviewQueueEntry[];
  /** Patient-level preview for a non-Results work queue. */
  workItems?: HomeWorkQueueEntry[];
  /** Outcome-labelled deep link into the owning surface's nav key. */
  action?: { label: string; targetKey: string };
}
Imports

HomeToResultsFlow

./src/features/home/home-flow.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/nextjs-vite';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { expect, userEvent, waitFor, within } from 'storybook/test';

import { AppShell } from '../../components/shared';
import { CRITICAL_COMPLETE_SECTIONS, DEMO_RESULTS_PATIENT } from '../results/demo-data';
import { ResultsReviewFlow } from '../results/results-review-flow';

import * as demo from './demo-data';
import { HomeWorkspace } from './home-workspace';
import { isLiveLicence } from './logic';
import { HOME_STORYBOOK_KURA } from './storybook-metadata';
import type { HomeData } from './types';
import { READINESS } from '../../components/foundations/readiness-data';

const MEKONG_WORKSPACE = {
  id: 'mekong',
  name: 'Mekong Clinic',
  branches: [{ id: 'bkk1', name: 'BKK1 Branch' }],
  activeBranchId: 'bkk1',
};

const LOTUS_WORKSPACE = {
  id: 'lotus',
  name: 'Lotus Family Clinic',
  branches: [{ id: 'riverside', name: 'Riverside Branch' }],
  activeBranchId: 'riverside',
};

const LOTUS_HOME: HomeData = {
  ...demo.allCaughtUp,
  scopeLabel: 'Lotus Family Clinic · Riverside · 26 patients in view',
  signals: demo.allCaughtUp.signals.map((signal) =>
    signal.key === 'pickup'
      ? { ...signal, detail: '2 tubes ready · daily courier sweep' }
      : signal,
  ),
  nextActions: [
    {
      time: '14:00',
      label: 'Care team huddle',
      meta: 'Riverside consultation room',
    },
  ],
};

function HomeToResultsFlow() {
  const [route, setRoute] = useState<'home' | 'results'>('home');

  if (route === 'results') {
    return (
      <ResultsReviewFlow
        episodeLabel="Current episode · 17 July 2026"
        patient={DEMO_RESULTS_PATIENT}
        sections={CRITICAL_COMPLETE_SECTIONS}
      />
    );
  }

  return (
    <AppShell
      activeKey="home"
      availableModes={['clinical']}
      mode="clinical"
      onNavigate={(key) => {
        if (key === 'results') setRoute('results');
      }}
      user={{
        name: demo.criticalDay.doctorName,
        email: 'sok.vanna@mekong.clinic',
        licenceVerified: true,
      }}
      workspace={MEKONG_WORKSPACE}
    >
      <HomeWorkspace
        data={demo.criticalDay}
        onNavigate={(key) => {
          if (key === 'results') setRoute('results');
        }}
      />
    </AppShell>
  );
}

function WorkspaceSwitchFlow() {
  const [workspaceId, setWorkspaceId] = useState(MEKONG_WORKSPACE.id);
  const isMekong = workspaceId === MEKONG_WORKSPACE.id;
  const workspace = isMekong ? MEKONG_WORKSPACE : LOTUS_WORKSPACE;
  const data = isMekong ? demo.criticalDay : LOTUS_HOME;

  return (
    <AppShell
      activeKey="home"
      availableModes={['clinical']}
      mode="clinical"
      onNavigate={() => undefined}
      onWorkspaceChange={setWorkspaceId}
      user={{
        name: data.doctorName,
        email: 'sok.vanna@clinic.example',
        licenceVerified: isLiveLicence(data.licence.state),
      }}
      workspace={workspace}
      workspaces={[MEKONG_WORKSPACE, LOTUS_WORKSPACE]}
    >
      <HomeWorkspace data={data} />
    </AppShell>
  );
}

const meta = {
  title: 'Clinic/Flows/Morning Triage',
  component: HomeToResultsFlow,
  tags: ['autodocs', 'adapted-kura'],
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    kura: {
      ...HOME_STORYBOOK_KURA,
      readiness: READINESS.flows,
      flow: {
        pages: [
          'Clinic/Clinical/Home',
          'Clinic/Clinical/Results/Results Workspace',
          'Clinic/Flows/Result Review and Closure',
        ],
        terminal: 'Critical result opened in its owning review and closure flow',
      },
    },
    docs: {
      description: {
        component:
          'Executable cross-page Home journeys using real Kura feature surfaces. The first routes a safety-critical Home signal into the canonical Results review flow. The second proves a workspace change replaces tenant-scoped Home data instead of preserving patient context from the previous clinic.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta<typeof HomeToResultsFlow>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;

export const MorningTriageToCriticalResult: Story = {
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement);
    const queue = canvas.getByRole('list', { name: 'Patients with results to review' });
    await userEvent.click(within(queue).getAllByRole('link')[0]);

    await waitFor(async () => {
      await expect(canvas.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Results' })).toBeVisible();
    });
    await expect(canvas.getByText('Potassium')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(canvas.getByText('A critical released result still requires acknowledgment.')).toBeVisible();
  },
};

export const WorkspaceSwitchClearsPriorClinicContext: Story = {
  render: () => <WorkspaceSwitchFlow />,
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement);
    const documentBody = within(canvasElement.ownerDocument.body);

    await expect(canvas.getByText(/Potassium/)).toBeVisible();
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: /Mekong Clinic/ }));
    await userEvent.click(
      await documentBody.findByRole('menuitemradio', { name: 'Lotus Family Clinic' }),
    );

    await waitFor(async () => {
      await expect(canvas.getByText('Lotus Family Clinic · Riverside · 26 patients in view')).toBeVisible();
    });
    await expect(canvas.getByText('Care team huddle')).toBeVisible();
    await expect(canvas.queryByText(/Potassium/)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
    await expect(canvas.queryByText(/Sokha Chan/)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  },
};
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Morning Triage To Critical Result story error 
Could not generate snippet without component name.

HomeWorkspace

clinic-clinical-home · ./src/features/home/home-workspace.stories.tsx
Clinical Home (WQ-01): a start-of-shift briefing, not a second worklist. It previews priority and routes each item to its canonical owning surface.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/features/home/home-workspace.tsx::HomeWorkspace
Props:
data: {
  doctorName: string;
  /** Dedicated activation projection shown until the first booking exists. */
  firstUse?: boolean;
  /** 0–23 local hour, injected so rendering stays deterministic. */
  hour: number;
  dateLabel: string;
  /** Scope line under the greeting, e.g. "Mekong Clinic · BKK1 · 184 patients in view". */
  scopeLabel: string;
  licence: LicenceStatus;
  freshness: HomeFreshness;
  /** Page-level availability; individual signals still own partial failures. */
  viewState?: HomeViewState;
  signals: HomeSignal[];
  nextActions: NextAction[];
  /**
   * A seeded patient a new doctor can open before booking anyone real.
   * Present only during first use, and only while the workspace is empty —
   * once real work exists, a fabricated patient is noise at best and a
   * misreading risk at worst.
   */
  demoPatient?: {
    name: string;
    /** What the record already contains, e.g. "results already back". */
    summary: string;
  };
  /** First-use route action when the workspace has no signals yet. */
  emptyAction?: { label: string; targetKey: string };
  /** First-use explanation when no signal exists. */
  emptyDescription?: string;
  /** End-of-day closure summary. Present only when there is closed work to show. */
  closedToday?: {
    resultLoops: number;
    bookings: number;
    /** Minor-unit digit string. */
    earnedMinor: string;
  };
}

onChooseWorkspace?: () => void

/**
 * Deep link into the surface that owns the work.
 */
onNavigate?: (targetKey: string) => void

/**
 * Opens the seeded demo patient's record.
 */
onOpenDemoPatient?: () => void

onOpenLicence?: () => void

onRefresh?: () => void

onRetrySignal?: (signalKey: string) => void

/**
 * Starts the documented PSC-booking intent.
 */
onStartBooking?: () => void
Imports 
import { AppShell, HomeWorkspace } from "ultimate-final-dcm";

    onNavigate={fn()}
    onOpenDemoPatient={fn()}
    onOpenLicence={fn()}
    onStartBooking={fn()}
    onChooseWorkspace={fn()}
    onRetrySignal={fn()}
    onRefresh={fn()} />;

Seven-state backend contract: `none`.
const LicenceNone = () => <HomePageFrame
    data={demo.licenceNone}
    onNavigate={fn()}

Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.

Component: src/components/ui/hover-card.tsx::HoverCard
Props:
closeDelay?: any = 160

openDelay?: any = 260
Imports 
import {
    Avatar,
    AvatarFallback,
    Badge,
    Button,
    CalendarIcon,
    Dialog,
    DialogBody,
    DialogContent,
    DialogDescription,
    DialogHeader,
    DialogTitle,
    DialogTrigger,
    HoverCard,
    HoverCardContent,
    HoverCardTrigger,
    InformationIcon,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Basic story ok 
const Basic = () => <PreviewLink />;
Keyboard Focus story ok 
const KeyboardFocus = () => <PreviewLink>View patient context</PreviewLink>;
Positions story ok 
const Positions = () => (
  <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 'var(--space-6)' }}>
    {(['top', 'right', 'bottom', 'left'] as const).map((side) => (
      <HoverCard key={side}>
        <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
          <Button variant="outline">{side}</Button>
        </HoverCardTrigger>
        <HoverCardContent side={side} size="sm">
          Collision-aware preview on the {side}.
        </HoverCardContent>
      </HoverCard>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Profile Information story ok 
const ProfileInformation = () => (
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
      <a href="#clinician">@dr-sokha</a>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 'var(--space-3)' }}>
        <Avatar>
          <AvatarFallback>SS</AvatarFallback>
        </Avatar>
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-1)' }}>
          <strong>Dr Sokha Srey</strong>
          <span>General medicine · Phnom Penh Central</span>
          <Badge size="sm" variant="success">
            Available today
          </Badge>
        </div>
      </div>
    </HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
);
With Icon story ok 
const WithIcon = () => (
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
      <Button aria-label="About verification" size="icon" variant="ghost">
        <InformationIcon aria-hidden size={18} />
      </Button>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent size="sm">
      Verification confirms that reception matched the patient to an accepted identity document.
    </HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
);
Image And Text story ok 
const ImageAndText = () => (
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
      <a href="#clinic">Phnom Penh Central Clinic</a>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent size="lg">
      <div style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-2)' }}>
        <strong>Phnom Penh Central Clinic</strong>
        <span>Open 07:00–19:00 · Laboratory collection closes at 17:30.</span>
        <span style={{ color: 'var(--color-text-tertiary)' }}>
          123 Monivong Boulevard, Phnom Penh
        </span>
      </div>
    </HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
);
Inside Dialog story ok 
const InsideDialog = () => (
  <Dialog>
    <DialogTrigger asChild>
      <Button>Open booking details</Button>
    </DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent>
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>Booking details</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>Supplementary context can preview without escaping the modal layer.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      <DialogBody>
        Assigned clinician: <PreviewLink>Dr Sokha Srey</PreviewLink>
      </DialogBody>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);
Timestamp story ok 
const Timestamp = () => (
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
      <time dateTime="2026-07-16T09:42:00+07:00">18 minutes ago</time>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent size="sm">
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 'var(--space-2)' }}>
        <CalendarIcon aria-hidden size={18} />
        <span className="tabular-nums">16 Jul 2026, 09:42 ICT</span>
      </div>
    </HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
);
Mobile Supplementary Only story ok 
const MobileSupplementaryOnly = () => (
  <div style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-2)' }}>
    <strong>Patient ID HN-004821</strong>
    <span>Essential identity remains visible. The hover card only repeats supplementary context.</span>
    <PreviewLink>Preview additional context</PreviewLink>
  </div>
);

Icd10DiagnosisRail

clinic-clinical-patients-icd-10-diagnosis-rail · ./src/features/patients/icd10-diagnosis-rail.stories.tsx
Faithful Kura-owned port of FINAL DCM's DiagnosisReview rail. The anatomy, selection model, on-demand evidence, search, and primary action mirror the source; terminology lookup and clinical verification stay caller-owned.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/features/patients/icd10-diagnosis-rail.tsx::Icd10DiagnosisRail
Props:
/**
 * Fallback findings when a proposal has no own evidence.
 */
flaggedLabs: unknown

onAdd: (candidate: Icd10DiagnosisCandidate) => void

/**
 * Leaves the diagnosis step without changing caller-owned draft state.
 */
onClose?: () => void

onContinue?: () => void

onRemove: (candidate: Icd10DiagnosisCandidate) => void

/**
 * Caller-owned terminology results. This prototype does not imply a live WHO lookup.
 */
searchCandidates: unknown

/**
 * Caller-owned local draft selection; selected does not mean verified or signed.
 */
selectedIds: unknown

/**
 * Legacy DCM's first four AI-proposed diagnoses.
 */
suggestions: unknown
Imports 
import { Icd10DiagnosisRail } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Harness
    suggestions={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_DIAGNOSIS_SUGGESTIONS}
    searchCandidates={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_SEARCH_POOL}
    flaggedLabs={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_FLAGGED_LABS}
    selectedIds={[]}
    onAdd={fn()}
    onRemove={fn()}
    onContinue={fn()} />;

    onRemove={fn()}
    onContinue={fn()} />;

IconButton

design-system-primitives-iconbutton · ./src/components/ui/icon-button.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/icon-button.tsx::IconButton
Props:
/**
 * Required accessible name; icon-only controls must never rely on the glyph alone.
 */
aria-label: string

children: ReactNode

disabled?: any = false

loading?: boolean = false

/**
 * Default is a 44px touch target; use micro for a smaller visual glyph, not a smaller target.
 */
size?: 'micro' | 'default' | 'large' = 'default'

tone?: 'default' | 'critical' | 'success' = 'default'

variant?: 'default' | 'primary' | 'tertiary' = 'default'
Imports 
import { IconButton, PlusIcon, XIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <IconButton aria-label="Add diagnosis"><PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" /></IconButton>;
Variants And Tones story ok 
const VariantsAndTones = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    <IconButton aria-label="Add diagnosis">
      <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
    <IconButton aria-label="Confirm result" variant="primary" tone="success">
      <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
    <IconButton aria-label="Remove draft" variant="tertiary" tone="critical">
      <XIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
    <IconButton aria-label="Remove draft" tone="critical">
      <XIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
  </div>
);
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    {(['micro', 'default', 'large'] as const).map((size) => (
      <IconButton key={size} aria-label={`Add diagnosis (${size})`} size={size}>
        <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
      </IconButton>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Loading And Disabled story ok 
const LoadingAndDisabled = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
    <IconButton aria-label="Saving draft" loading>
      <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
    <IconButton aria-label="Unavailable action" disabled>
      <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </IconButton>
  </div>
);
Density Reference story ok 
const DensityReference = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start gap-6">
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <IconButton aria-label={`Add diagnosis (${density})`}>
          <PlusIcon aria-hidden="true" />
        </IconButton>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{density}</span>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);

IdentityProviderButton

design-system-patterns-authentication-identity-provider-button · ./src/components/shared/identity-provider/identity-provider-button.stories.tsx
A configured external identity-provider entry point. The owning auth flow supplies its configuration and handles redirect, state validation, session recovery, and the work-email fallback; this pattern never performs OAuth.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/shared/identity-provider/identity-provider-button.tsx::IdentityProviderButton
Props:
/**
 * Derived from the workspace's identity-provider configuration.
 */
availability?: 'available' | 'unavailable' = 'available'

disabled?: any = false

loading?: any = false

/**
 * An approved canonical Kura provider mark selected by the auth
 * configuration. Omit it for a provider without an approved brand mark.
 */
providerBrand?: 'google' | 'telegram'

/**
 * Display name supplied by the configured identity-provider record.
 */
providerName: string

/**
 * A visible fallback explains why a configured provider cannot be used.
 */
unavailableReason?: ReactNode
Imports 
import {
    Alert,
    AlertDescription,
    AlertTitle,
    IdentityProviderButton,
    IdentityProviderButtonGroup,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Configured Provider story ok 
const ConfiguredProvider = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <IdentityProviderButton providerName="Configured staff identity provider" />
  </div>
);
Configured Provider Options story ok 
const ConfiguredProviderOptions = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <IdentityProviderButtonGroup label="Configured sign-in methods">
      <IdentityProviderButton providerName="Clinic identity provider" />
      <IdentityProviderButton providerName="Regional staff identity provider" />
    </IdentityProviderButtonGroup>
  </div>
);
Unavailable With Work Email Fallback story ok 
const UnavailableWithWorkEmailFallback = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <IdentityProviderButton
      availability="unavailable"
      providerBrand="google"
      providerName="Google"
      unavailableReason="Google sign-in is not enabled for this clinic. Use your work email to receive a secure sign-in link."
    />
  </div>
);
Provider Failure And Recovery story ok 
const ProviderFailureAndRecovery = () => (
  <div className="grid w-full max-w-md gap-4">
    <Alert tone="warning">
      <AlertTitle>Google sign-in is temporarily unavailable</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>
        Your clinic access has not changed. Enter your work email to receive a magic link, then retry after the provider recovers.
      </AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
    <IdentityProviderButton
      availability="unavailable"
      providerBrand="google"
      providerName="Google"
      unavailableReason="The provider has not started a session. Use your work email instead."
    />
  </div>
);
Approved Provider Marks story ok 
const ApprovedProviderMarks = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
    <IdentityProviderButtonGroup label="Canonical provider marks">
      <IdentityProviderButton
        availability="unavailable"
        providerBrand="google"
        providerName="Google"
        unavailableReason="Google sign-in is not enabled for this workspace. Use your work email to receive a secure sign-in link."
      />
      <IdentityProviderButton
        availability="unavailable"
        providerBrand="telegram"
        providerName="Telegram"
        unavailableReason="Telegram sign-in is not enabled for this workspace. Use your work email to receive a secure sign-in link."
      />
    </IdentityProviderButtonGroup>
  </div>
);
Mobile Narrow And Long Content story ok 
const MobileNarrowAndLongContent = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <IdentityProviderButtonGroup label="Alternative sign-in methods for Mekong Clinic staff">
      <IdentityProviderButton
        providerBrand="google"
        providerName="Google Workspace for Mekong Clinic’s clinical operations team"
      />
      <IdentityProviderButton
        availability="unavailable"
        providerName="Regional health network staff identity"
        unavailableReason="This provider is not enabled for the current clinic workspace. Use your work email to receive a magic link."
      />
    </IdentityProviderButtonGroup>
  </div>
);

Input

design-system-primitives-input · ./src/components/ui/input.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/input.tsx::Input
Props:
disabled?: any = false

/**
 * Specific recovery guidance for an invalid value.
 */
error?: ReactNode

/**
 * Supporting text that helps the user enter the right value.
 */
helpText?: ReactNode

/**
 * Visible field label. Omit only when an external label references the input.
 */
label?: ReactNode

/**
 * Leading slot for an icon or short static text such as a country code.
 */
prefix?: ReactNode

readOnly?: any = false

ref?: Ref<HTMLInputElement>

required?: any = false

size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' = 'md'

/**
 * Trailing slot for an icon, unit, or shortcut hint.
 */
suffix?: ReactNode

/**
 * Selects the field surface for its immediate background.
 */
variant?: 'filled' | 'surface' = 'filled'
Imports 
import { Input, SearchIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Basic story ok
Native text input with an explicit accessible name when no visible label is required.
const Basic = () => <Input
    aria-label="Quick search"
    placeholder="Search by name or code"
    type="search" />;
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Input label="Patient name" placeholder="Sokha Chan" />;
Surface On Tray story ok
The white surface variant keeps a field distinct inside a gray tray.
const SurfaceOnTray = () => <Input label="Tendered (USD)" placeholder="0.00" variant="surface" />;
With Help Text story ok 
const WithHelpText = () => <Input
    label="Booking code"
    helpText="Letters and numbers from the SMS, for example FZ-48210."
    placeholder="FZ-48210" />;
With Prefix Icon story ok 
const WithPrefixIcon = () => <Input
    label="Search patients"
    prefix={<SearchIcon size={16} />}
    placeholder="Name, phone, or code"
    type="search" />;
With Suffix Unit story ok 
const WithSuffixUnit = () => <Input label="Weight" suffix="kg" inputMode="decimal" placeholder="62.5" />;
Required story ok 
const Required = () => <Input label="Full name" required placeholder="As shown on the ID document" />;
Invalid story ok 
const Invalid = () => <Input
    label="Work email"
    defaultValue="name@"
    error="Enter a complete email address."
    type="email" />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Input label="Workspace" defaultValue="Mekong Clinic" disabled />;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <Input
    defaultValue="HN-004821"
    helpText="The identifier is locked after patient verification."
    label="Verified patient ID"
    readOnly />;
Character Counter story ok
The counter composes native maxLength with existing Kura slots.
const CharacterCounter = () => <CharacterCounterInput />;
Native Text Types story ok
Native text-like types retain browser semantics without creating parallel primitives.
const NativeTextTypes = () => (
  <div style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-4)', width: 'min(320px, 90vw)' }}>
    <Input label="Work email" placeholder="name@clinic.example" type="email" />
    <Input label="Temporary password" placeholder="Enter password" type="password" />
    <Input label="Clinic website" placeholder="https://clinic.example" type="url" />
  </div>
);
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => (
  <div style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-4)', width: 'min(320px, 90vw)' }}>
    <Input label="Small" size="sm" placeholder="Dense table filter" />
    <Input label="Medium" size="md" placeholder="Default form field" />
    <Input label="Large" size="lg" placeholder="Touch-first station field" />
  </div>
);
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <Input
    label="Address line"
    defaultValue="Phum Prek Ho, Sangkat Prek Ho, Krong Ta Khmau, Kandal Province, near the old market opposite the pagoda gate" />;

/**
 * Use an anchor only when the complete item navigates to another location.

as?: 'div' | 'a' = 'div'

children?: ReactNode

/**

    </ItemContent>
  </Item>
);
Variants story ok 
const Variants = () => (
  <div style={frameStyle}>
    <Item variant="default">
      <ItemContent>
        <ItemTitle>Default item</ItemTitle>
        <ItemDescription>Use inside an already established list surface.</ItemDescription>
      </ItemContent>
    </Item>
    <Item variant="outline">
      <ItemContent>
        <ItemTitle>Outline item</ItemTitle>
        <ItemDescription>Use when this standalone boundary carries meaning.</ItemDescription>
      </ItemContent>
    </Item>
    <Item variant="muted">
      <ItemContent>
        <ItemTitle>Muted item</ItemTitle>
        <ItemDescription>Secondary information on a quiet surface.</ItemDescription>
      </ItemContent>
    </Item>
  </div>
);
Icon Media And Action story ok 
const IconMediaAndAction = () => (
  <div style={frameStyle}>
    <Item variant="outline">
      <ItemMedia variant="icon"><MailIcon aria-hidden="true" /></ItemMedia>
      <ItemContent>
        <ItemTitle>Email delivery</ItemTitle>
        <ItemDescription>Appointment messages use the verified patient address.</ItemDescription>
      </ItemContent>
      <ItemActions><Button size="sm" variant="outline">Configure</Button></ItemActions>
    </Item>
    <Item variant="outline">
      <ItemMedia variant="icon"><NotificationsIcon aria-hidden="true" /></ItemMedia>
      <ItemContent>
        <ItemTitle>Queue notifications</ItemTitle>
        <ItemDescription>Operational alerts for the active clinic workspace.</ItemDescription>
      </ItemContent>
      <ItemActions><Button size="sm">Enable</Button></ItemActions>
    </Item>
  </div>
);

    </ItemMedia>

      <ItemTitle>Dr. Sokha Kim</ItemTitle>

JourneyWorkspace

clinic-flows-first-patient-journey · ./src/features/journey/journey-workspace.stories.tsx
The journey conductor. It owns the episode and decides what comes next; the phase surfaces below it only read their input and hand back their output. The strip at the top is the point of the whole thing: at any moment it states which step the episode is in, who is expected to act, and — when the episode has stopped — what is holding it up. Money, specimen and result are reported separately, because a paid visit with no sample drawn is a real and common state.
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/features/journey/journey-workspace.tsx::JourneyWorkspace
Props:
/**
 * Start the journey partway through, for stories that open on one phase.
 */
initialEpisode?: {
  patientId: string;
  patientName: string;
  identity: IdentityState;
  assessment?: ClinicalAssessment;
  indication?: OrderIndication;
  orderedTestCount: number;
  payment: PaymentState;
  sample: SampleState;
  result: ResultState;
  plan?: CarePlan;
}
Imports 
import { JourneyWorkspace } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
From The Beginning story ok 
const FromTheBeginning = () => <JourneyWorkspace initialEpisode={start} />;
Paid But Not Drawn story ok 
const PaidButNotDrawn = () => <JourneyWorkspace
    initialEpisode={{
      ...start,
      identity: 'verified',
      assessment: WORKED_UP_ENCOUNTER,
      indication: {
        diagnosisId: 'dx-anaemia',
        code: 'D50.9',
        label: 'Iron deficiency anaemia, unspecified',
        certainty: 'working',
      },
      orderedTestCount: 10,
      payment: 'paid',
      sample: 'awaiting_collection',
    }} />;
Stopped Waiting On The Lab story ok 
const StoppedWaitingOnTheLab = () => <JourneyWorkspace
    initialEpisode={{
      ...start,
      identity: 'verified',
      assessment: WORKED_UP_ENCOUNTER,
      indication: {
        diagnosisId: 'dx-anaemia',
        code: 'D50.9',
        label: 'Iron deficiency anaemia, unspecified',
        certainty: 'working',
      },
      orderedTestCount: 10,
      payment: 'paid',
      sample: 'collected',
    }} />;
Run The Whole Journey story ok 
const RunTheWholeJourney = () => <JourneyWorkspace initialEpisode={start} />;
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => <JourneyWorkspace initialEpisode={start} />;

Kbd

design-system-primitives-kbd · ./src/components/ui/kbd.stories.tsx
Keyboard shortcut hint. Purely informative — never the only path to an action.
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/components/ui/kbd.tsx::Kbd
Props:
children: ReactNode
Imports 
import { ArrowLeftIcon, Input, Kbd, KbdGroup, MicrophoneIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Single keys and compact combined labels from the ReUI basic family.
const Default = () => (
  <div className={styles.inlineExamples}>
    <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd>
    <Kbd>⌘K</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Ctrl + B</Kbd>
  </div>
);
Grouped Keys story ok
Separate semantic keys grouped into one shortcut.
const GroupedKeys = () => (
  <KbdGroup aria-label="Control Shift P">
    <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd>
    <Kbd>Shift</Kbd>
    <Kbd>P</Kbd>
  </KbdGroup>
);
Keys With Icons story ok
Canonical Kura icons may appear inside a key when the key represents a direction or device action.
const KeysWithIcons = () => (
  <KbdGroup>
    <Kbd>
      <ArrowLeftIcon aria-hidden="true" />
      Left
    </Kbd>
    <Kbd>
      <MicrophoneIcon aria-hidden="true" />
      Voice
    </Kbd>
  </KbdGroup>
);
Within Input story ok
Input suffix composition for a discoverable keyboard accelerator.
const WithinInput = () => (
  <div className={styles.inputExample}>
    <Input
      aria-label="Search patients and orders"
      placeholder="Search patients and orders"
      suffix={<Kbd>⌘K</Kbd>}
    />
  </div>
);
Reference List story ok
Shortcut reference list for help or settings surfaces.
const ReferenceList = () => (
  <section aria-labelledby="shortcut-reference-title" className={styles.reference}>
    <h2 className={styles.referenceTitle} id="shortcut-reference-title">
      Keyboard shortcuts
    </h2>
    <div className={styles.referenceList}>
      {shortcutReference.map((shortcut) => (
        <div className={styles.referenceRow} key={shortcut.label}>
          <span className={styles.referenceLabel}>{shortcut.label}</span>
          <KbdGroup aria-label={`${shortcut.label}: ${shortcut.keys.join(' ')}`}>
            {shortcut.keys.map((key) => (
              <Kbd key={key}>{key}</Kbd>
            ))}
          </KbdGroup>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  </section>
);
Mobile Width 320 story ok
Narrow layout verifies that long labels wrap while key combinations remain legible.
const MobileWidth320 = () => (
  <div className={styles.mobileExample}>
    <span>Open the patient and booking search</span>
    <KbdGroup aria-label="Command K">
      <Kbd>⌘</Kbd>
      <Kbd>K</Kbd>
    </KbdGroup>
  </div>
);

LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow

clinic-flows-lab-order-and-sample-collection · ./src/features/care-loop/lab-order-collection-flow.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/features/care-loop/lab-order-collection-flow.tsx::LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow
Props:
/**
 * Opens the flow on one of the three service routes.
 */
initialDecisions?: {
  collectBy?: CollectBy;
  /** Only meaningful when Kura collects. */
  drawSite?: DrawSite;
  payment?: DoctorPaymentRoute;
}

initialStage?: | 'ordering'
| 'payment'
| 'scan'
| 'draw'
/** Self-draw route: the doctor drew, so the tubes are labelled in the room. */
| 'label-tubes'
/** Home route: the visit is booked and nothing physical exists yet. */
| 'home-visit-booked'
| 'handoff'
| 'ready-for-pickup'
| 'awaiting-results' = 'ordering'
Imports 
import { LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Full Journey story ok 
const FullJourney = () => <LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow initialStage="ordering" />;
Doctor Draws And Labels With Stickers story ok 
const DoctorDrawsAndLabelsWithStickers = () => <LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow
    initialStage="label-tubes"
    initialDecisions={{ collectBy: 'self', payment: 'pay-now' }} />;
Doctor Draws And Writes By Hand story ok 
const DoctorDrawsAndWritesByHand = () => <LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow
    initialStage="label-tubes"
    initialDecisions={{ collectBy: 'self', payment: 'pay-now' }} />;
Home Blood Collection Booked story ok 
const HomeBloodCollectionBooked = () => <LabOrderSampleCollectionFlow
    initialStage="home-visit-booked"
    initialDecisions={{ collectBy: 'kura', drawSite: 'patient-home', payment: 'pay-later-kura' }} />;

LabRangeBand

clinic-clinical-results-range-band · ./src/features/results/lab-range-band.stories.tsx
Reference-range band: equal-width tier zones tinted by severity with the patient value marked as a dot inside its zone. The first-visit reading — one result against its reference — per Figma "Flowsheet F — single visit".
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/results/lab-range-band.tsx::LabRangeBand
Props:
/**
 * Accessible summary; falls back to a generated zone/value description.
 */
aria-label?: string

range: {
  source?: string;
  valueType: RangeValueType;
  tiers: ReferenceTier[];
  display?: string;
}

/**
 * Hide the tick labels under the band (dense rows, popovers).
 */
showTicks?: boolean = true

/**
 * Print the measured value above the marker. Use when the band stands
 * alone; omit in rows that already show the value in their own column.
 */
showValue?: boolean = false

size?: 'sm' | 'md' = 'md'

/**
 * The released value to mark on the band. Omit to render the scale alone.
 */
value?: | { kind: 'numeric'; value: number; display?: string }
| { kind: 'text'; value: string }
| { kind: 'missing' }
Imports 
import { LabRangeBand } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Normal story ok 
const Normal = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 75 }} />;
Abnormal High story ok 
const AbnormalHigh = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 118 }} />;
Critical — explicit panic bound story ok 
const CriticalPanicBound = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 151 }} />;
Three tiers — HbA1c diabetes classification remains abnormal story ok 
const ThreeTierClassification = () => <LabRangeBand range={HBA1C_RANGE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 7.1 }} />;
Multiple adjacent normal tiers — HDL protective story ok 
const MultipleAdjacentNormalTiers = () => <LabRangeBand range={HDL_RANGE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 72 }} />;
Qualitative Exact Match story ok 
const QualitativeExactMatch = () => <LabRangeBand range={URINE_PROTEIN_RANGE} value={{ kind: 'text', value: 'Trace' }} />;
Qualitative value not mapped to a catalog tier story ok 
const QualitativeUnmappedValue = () => <LabRangeBand
    range={URINE_PROTEIN_RANGE}
    value={{ kind: 'text', value: 'Pending comment' }} />;
Unbounded Edge Value story ok 
const UnboundedEdgeValue = () => <LabRangeBand range={HBA1C_RANGE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 9.8 }} />;
Scale Only story ok 
const ScaleOnly = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} />;
Without Ticks story ok 
const WithoutTicks = () => <LabRangeBand
    range={FIVE_ZONE}
    value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 92 }}
    showTicks={false} />;
Standalone — measured value rides the marker story ok 
const StandaloneWithValue = () => <LabRangeBand
    range={FIVE_ZONE}
    value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 118, display: '118 mg/dL' }}
    showValue />;
Small Size story ok 
const SmallSize = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 92 }} size="sm" />;
Narrow Container story ok 
const NarrowContainer = () => <div className={`${styles.frame} ${styles.w288}`}>
    <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 118 }} />
</div>;
Dark Theme story ok 
const DarkTheme = () => <LabRangeBand range={FIVE_ZONE} value={{ kind: 'numeric', value: 151 }} />;

const HumanFacingLifecycleStates = () => (
  <div className={styles.stack}>
    {HUMAN_FACING_NON_RELEASED.map((status) => {
      const result: LabAnalyteResult = {
        ...pendingBase,
        orderLineItemId: `${pendingBase.orderLineItemId}-${status}`,
        testId: `${pendingBase.testId}-${status}`,
        analyteCode: `${pendingBase.analyteCode}-${status}`,
        status,
        value: { kind: 'missing' },
      };
      return <LabResultRow key={status} result={result} />;
    })}
  </div>
);

Default story ok 
const Default = (args) => <Frame args={args} />;

Select And Remove story ok 
const SelectAndRemove = function SelectionPlayground(args) {
  const [selectedTestIds, setSelectedTestIds] = useState<string[]>([]);
  return (
    <Frame
      args={{
        ...args,
        selectedTestIds,
        onSelectedTestIdsChange: setSelectedTestIds,
      }}
    />
  );
};

const HoverState = (args) => <Frame args={args} />;

LabTrendChart

clinic-clinical-results-trend-charts · ./src/features/results/lab-charts.stories.tsx
Longitudinal single-analyte line. The reading hierarchy is inverted from a generic chart: reference structure stays whisper-quiet (one tinted normal band + dashed tier boundaries), while the drawn series — gradient area, ink line, abnormal and latest readings — carries the emphasis.
Prop types (react-docgen) 2 prop types 
Component: src/features/results/lab-trend-chart.tsx::LabTrendChart

  supersedesTestId?: string | null;
  panelCode?: string;
  panelName?: string;
  analyteCode: string;
  name: string;
  loincCode?: string;
  unit?: string;
  status: TestStatus;
  verificationMode?: TestVerificationMode | null;
  value: LabResultValue;
  range?: ReferenceRange | null;
  history?: LabResultPoint[];
  observedAt?: string | null;
  releasedAt?: string | null;
}
Imports

MoneyText

design-system-primitives-money-text · ./src/components/ui/money-text.stories.tsx
Canonical, never-throw money renderer for universal exponent-2 wire values. Business arithmetic remains outside this atom; malformed values render an em dash so corrupt data cannot crash the component tree.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/money-text.tsx::MoneyText
Props:
/**
 * Animate value changes with a short fade-up so totals visibly react to
 * edits. Respects reduced motion. Off by default for dense tables.
 */
animateChanges?: boolean = false

as?: T

currency: 'USD' | 'KHR'

fallback?: string = '—'

minor: string | null | undefined

style?: 'symbol' | 'code' = 'symbol'
