OnboardingWizard

clinic-auth-onboarding-wizard · ./src/features/auth/onboarding-wizard.stories.tsx
Product-spec onboarding: self-serve Name → Phone-if-needed → Clinic → Licence; invitees only supply missing name/phone facts. A verified phone is the hard gate, Clinic and Licence can be skipped, and cross-account phone reuse is support-only — never self-merged.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/features/auth/onboarding-wizard.tsx::OnboardingWizard
Props:
entry: WizardEntryBase &
(
  | {
      phoneVerified: false;
      verifiedPhone?: never;
    }
  | {
      phoneVerified: true;
      /** E.164 phone verified at the door or already attached to the account. */
      verifiedPhone: string;
    }
)

expectedCode?: string = '123456'

onDone: (result: WizardResult) => void

phoneRegistry?: {
  /** Phones already owned by another account. Never self-merged. */
  inUse: readonly string[];
  /** Phones attached to a revoked or otherwise unavailable account. */
  blocked: readonly string[];
} = {
  inUse: ['+85599000001', '+85599000002'],
  blocked: ['+85599000009'],
}

resendCooldownSecs?: number = 30
Imports 
import { OnboardingWizard } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Self Serve story ok
Full self-serve path requires a document for a medical-licence declaration.
const SelfServe = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Email Phone Gate story ok
Email path: phone verification is a hard gate before Clinic.
const EmailPhoneGate = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Name Prefill story ok
A provider name is prefilled but remains editable before the cabinet default is formed.
const NamePrefill = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      initialName: "Bopha Kim",
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Name Validation story ok
Required name validation is announced without advancing the stepper.
const NameValidation = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Phone Validation story ok
A short phone is rejected before any OTP state is entered.
const PhoneValidation = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Phone Verification story ok
OTP keeps the resend state with the code and number recovery with the destination.
const PhoneVerification = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Resend Code story ok
Resend clears the previous code and requires six fresh digits.
const ResendCode = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }}
    onDone={fn()}
    resendCooldownSecs={0} />;
Invalid Otp Recovery story ok
Incorrect OTP recovers in place and preserves the verified-phone task.
const InvalidOtpRecovery = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Vietnam Phone story ok
The supported +84 path stores a normalized Vietnam E.164 phone.
const VietnamPhone = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Phone Already In Use story ok
Cross-account identifier reuse is blocked with support copy and no merge action.
const PhoneAlreadyInUse = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Phone On Unavailable Account story ok
A phone held by an unavailable account uses the same privacy-safe support path.
const PhoneOnUnavailableAccount = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
New Invitee story ok
New invitee: Name → mandatory Phone only; Clinic and Licence stay deferred.
const NewInvitee = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Existing Invitee Needs Phone story ok
Existing invitee name is preserved; only the missing phone is requested.
const ExistingInviteeNeedsPhone = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      existingName: "Dr. Dara Phan",
      isInvitee: true,
      phoneVerified: false,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Existing Invitee Ready story ok
Existing invitee with name and phone bypasses the wizard entirely.
const ExistingInviteeReady = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      existingName: "Dr. Dara Phan",
      isInvitee: true,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: "+85512777088",
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Phone Already Verified story ok
Phone-path signup never re-asks the verified phone and marks that step complete.
const PhoneAlreadyVerified = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Clinic Skip Creates Cabinet story ok
Skipping Clinic still creates the default cabinet and advances to Licence.
const ClinicSkipCreatesCabinet = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Clinic Validation story ok
Explicit Create rejects an empty clinic name; Skip remains a safe alternative.
const ClinicValidation = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Licence No story ok
NO records no credential and completes without a licence nag.
const LicenceNo = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Licence Answer Required story ok
Finish requires an explicit YES/NO answer unless the user deliberately skips.
const LicenceAnswerRequired = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Licence Skip story ok
The entire licence question can be deferred without fabricating an answer.
const LicenceSkip = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Licence Validation story ok
YES validates profession and the required licence document.
const LicenceValidation = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Licence Validation Mobile 320 story ok
The profession error stays attached to its field and the action remains reachable at 320px.
const LicenceValidationMobile320 = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: false, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;
Licence Upload story ok
A licence declaration returns the canonical FileUpload attachment in the result.
const LicenceUpload = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
Narrow viewport keeps the densest licence-upload state operable at 320px.
const Mobile320 = () => <OnboardingWizard
    entry={{
      initialName: "Dr. Chanthou Sok-Sereyvorlak",
      isInvitee: false,
      phoneVerified: true,
      verifiedPhone: VERIFIED_PHONE,
    }}
    onDone={fn()} />;
Phone Verification Mobile 320 story ok
At 320px, the OTP status and primary verification action retain their hierarchy.
const PhoneVerificationMobile320 = () => <OnboardingWizard entry={{ isInvitee: true, phoneVerified: false }} onDone={fn()} />;

OrderCart

design-system-clinical-components-order-cart · ./src/features/order-cart/order-cart.stories.tsx
The one clinic order cart (Figma `OrderCart / HBC workflow`): doctor and receptionist share the shell — selected tests, a collection-and-payment decision card, totals with clinician earnings, a collected-money attestation, and one primary action whose label follows the lifecycle.
Prop types (react-docgen) 20 prop types 
Component: src/features/order-cart/order-cart.tsx::OrderCart
Props:
cart: {
  id: string;
  reference?: string;
  patient?: OrderCartPatient;
  lifecycle: OrderCartLifecycle;
  items: OrderCartItem[];
  pricing: OrderCartPricing;
}

className?: string

onAcceptReprice?: () => void

onAddFirst?: () => void

onAttestChange?: (attested: boolean) => void

onBackToCart?: () => void

onBlockerAction?: (blockerId: string) => void

onClear?: () => void

/**
 * Decision card interactions.
 */
onDecisionsChange?: (next: CollectionDecisions) => void

/**
 * Receptionist tender choice.
 */
onMethodChange?: (method: ReceptionPaymentMethod) => void

onPanelChange?: (state: 'unset' | 'expanded' | 'summary') => void

onPrimaryAction?: () => void

onRemoveItem?: (itemId: string) => void

onRetryPricing?: () => void

onSuggestionAccept?: (suggestion: CartSuggestion) => void

onSuggestionDismiss?: (suggestion: CartSuggestion) => void

onTubeMethodChange?: (method: TubePrepMethod) => void

/**
 * Tube preparation (doctor self-draw).
 */
onTubeScan?: (tubeId: string, scanned: boolean) => void

/**
 * Engine verdicts, rendered in engine order below the items.
 */
suggestions?: CartSuggestion[]

workflow: | DoctorOrderCartWorkflow
| ReceptionistOrderCartWorkflow

Hierarchy · panel channels and derived inputs story ok
Container ontology in the cart: a panel lists its channels, a derived test lists its inputs. Members are facts of the container — priceless, never individually removable.
const HierarchicalRelations = (args) => <Playground args={args} />;
Shared credit · never double-charged story ok
Shared-atom dedupe: an analyte delivered twice is credited, the gross price is struck through, and the totals carry the credit line — the patient can see they were not double-charged.
const SharedAtomCredit = (args) => <Playground args={args} />;
Suggestions · four engine verdicts story ok
The four engine verdicts with locked semantics. The upsell rail is REAL upstream (cart/expand, exclude_upsell=false); order is engine-owned.
const EngineSuggestions = (args) => <Playground args={args} />;

OtpInput

design-system-patterns-otpinput · ./src/components/ui/otp-input.stories.tsx
One-time-code entry. The library renders one accessible input beneath the segmented visual so native SMS autofill, paste, selection, and screen-reader behaviour stay equivalent to a standard input.
Prop types (react-docgen) 14 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/otp-input.tsx::OtpInput
Props:
/**
 * Accessible name for label-free compositions. Ignored when `label` is present.
 */
accessibleLabel?: string

autoFocus?: boolean = false

className?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Error text; also flags the digits invalid.
 */
error?: ReactNode

/**
 * Stretches the visual slot groups to the width of their containing form.
 */
fullWidth?: boolean = false

/**
 * Number of joined slots per visual group. Defaults to 3 for six-digit codes.
 */
groupSize?: number

helpText?: ReactNode

id?: string

/**
 * Visible field label. When omitted, the input receives a generic accessible name.
 */
label?: ReactNode

/**
 * Number of code digits.
 */
length?: number = 6

/**
 * Fires once when every digit is filled.
 */
onComplete?: (value: string) => void

onValueChange: (value: string) => void

/**
 * Controlled digit string (may be shorter than `length` while typing).
 */
value: string
Imports 
import { OtpInput } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
ReUI default anatomy: two compact joined groups with one separator.
const Default = () => <Playground />;
Accessible Name Only story ok
A dialog title can name the task; preserve the field name for assistive technology.
const AccessibleNameOnly = () => <OtpInput value="" onValueChange={fn()} accessibleLabel="SMS code" />;
Full Width story ok
Auth forms can stretch both groups to the available field width.
const FullWidth = () => <Playground fullWidth />;
Typed Completion story ok
Typing advances through the same logical input; the sixth digit fires onComplete once.
const TypedCompletion = function Render() {
  const [done, setDone] = useState<string | null>(null);
  return (
    <div>
      <Playground onComplete={setDone} />
      {done ? <p role="status">Completed: {done}</p> : null}
    </div>
  );
};
Digits Only story ok
Six numeric slots joined into one uninterrupted group.
const DigitsOnly = () => <OtpInput value="123456" onValueChange={fn()} label="Digits only" groupSize={6} />;
Multiple Separators story ok
Three compact groups reproduce ReUI's multiple-separator composition.
const MultipleSeparators = () => <OtpInput value="123456" onValueChange={fn()} label="Multi-separator" groupSize={2} />;
Paste Distribution story ok
Paste distributes an entire code across the slots.
const PasteDistribution = () => <Playground />;
Backspace Retreat story ok
Backspace clears the current digit, then retreats.
const BackspaceRetreat = () => <Playground />;
Error State story ok
Invalid code: destructive border + announced error.
const ErrorState = () => <Playground error="Incorrect or expired code — try again." />;
Disabled story ok
Disabled while a verify request is in flight.
const Disabled = () => <OtpInput value="123" onValueChange={fn()} label="SMS code" disabled />;
Four Digits story ok
Four-digit variant for shorter PIN codes.
const FourDigits = () => <OtpInput value="" onValueChange={fn()} label="PIN" length={4} groupSize={4} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
At 320px, the six-slot row fills its field without horizontal overflow.
const Mobile320 = () => <Playground fullWidth />;

PatientAcquisitionFlow

clinic-flows-patient-acquisition-and-intake · ./src/features/care-loop/patient-acquisition-flow.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 9 prop types 
Component: src/features/care-loop/patient-acquisition-flow.tsx::PatientAcquisitionFlow
Props:
/**
 * Optional Storybook/prototype adapter that simulates the patient replying
 * after a successful send. Without it, the honest target state is waiting.
 */
demoIntakeRecord?: {
  reasonForVisit: string;
  allergies: string;
  medicines: string;
  familyHistory: string;
}

/**
 * Deterministic patient-reported data for direct complete-state stories.
 */
initialIntakeRecord?: {
  reasonForVisit: string;
  allergies: string;
  medicines: string;
  familyHistory: string;
}

initialStage?: | 'patients-empty'
| 'phone-gate'
| 'intake-unknown'
| 'intake-sending'
| 'intake-error'
| 'intake-requested'
| 'intake-form'
| 'intake-complete'
| 'ready-to-order' = 'patients-empty'

/**
 * What the patient has answered so far, while the clinic waits. Supplied by
 * the caller rather than derived: the clinic has no live channel into the
 * patient's phone, and inventing one here would claim a capability the
 * platform does not have.
 */
intakeProgress?: {
  openedLabel: string;
  items: readonly { label: string; answer?: string }[];
}

intakeSendDelayMs?: number = 300

intakeSendResult?: 'success' | 'error' = 'success'

/**
 * What the verified number resolves to. A first-time patient is only one of
 * the outcomes: the same number can already belong to someone, or to a
 * household. Defaults to no match so the empty-clinic journey stays the
 * default reading.
 */
lookup?: (e164: string) => PhoneLookupResult = () => ({ kind: 'no_match' })

/**
 * Returns to the surface that launched the phone gate when it is dismissed.
 */
onExit?: () => void

phoneGateDelayMs?: number = 250
Imports 
import { PatientAcquisitionFlow } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Clinic Journey To Intake Handoff story ok 
const ClinicJourneyToIntakeHandoff = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="patients-empty"
    intakeSendDelayMs={300}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    demoIntakeRecord={CARE_LOOP_DEMO_INTAKE_RECORD} />;
Intake Unknown story ok 
const IntakeUnknown = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-unknown"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Intake Sent story ok 
const IntakeSent = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-requested"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Existing Patient Found story ok 
const ExistingPatientFound = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="phone-gate"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    lookup={() => ({ kind: 'known_match', patient: DEMO_MATCH_PATIENT })} />;
Shared Household Phone story ok 
const SharedHouseholdPhone = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="phone-gate"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    lookup={() => ({ kind: 'shared_matches', candidates: DEMO_SHARED_PHONE_PATIENTS })} />;
Intake Filling story ok 
const IntakeFilling = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-requested"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    intakeProgress={FILLING_PROGRESS} />;
Intake Complete story ok 
const IntakeComplete = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-complete"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    initialIntakeRecord={CARE_LOOP_DEMO_INTAKE_RECORD} />;
Intake Unknown Mobile 320 story ok 
const IntakeUnknownMobile320 = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-unknown"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Intake Filling Tablet 768 story ok 
const IntakeFillingTablet768 = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-requested"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    intakeProgress={FILLING_PROGRESS} />;
Intake Complete Mobile 320 story ok 
const IntakeCompleteMobile320 = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-complete"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0}
    initialIntakeRecord={CARE_LOOP_DEMO_INTAKE_RECORD} />;
Intake Delivery Failure story ok 
const IntakeDeliveryFailure = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-error"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="error"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Intake Sending story ok 
const IntakeSending = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-sending"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Patient Completes Medical History story ok 
const PatientCompletesMedicalHistory = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-form"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Patient Completes Medical History Mobile story ok 
const PatientCompletesMedicalHistoryMobile = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="intake-form"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;
Mobile Width 320 story ok 
const MobileWidth320 = () => <PatientAcquisitionFlow
    initialStage="patients-empty"
    intakeSendDelayMs={0}
    intakeSendResult="success"
    phoneGateDelayMs={0} />;

PatientChart

clinic-clinical-patients-chart · ./src/features/patients/patient-chart.stories.tsx
The patient chart shell: a pinned identity bar over a persistent context rail and a tabbed work area. Deceased and merged records block clinical work before any tab renders.
Prop types (react-docgen) 20 prop types 
Component: src/features/patients/patient-chart.tsx::PatientChart
Props:
/**
 * Situational right rail. Workspace mode keeps decision evidence visible
 * beside bounded clinical drafting work.
 */
actionRail?: ReactNode

actionRailMode?: 'launcher' | 'workspace' = 'launcher'

defaultTab?: 'overview' | 'orders' | 'results' = 'overview'

focusedOrderId?: string

/**
 * Recovery navigation when the requested record is unavailable.
 */
onBack?: () => void

onOpenMergedRecord?: () => void

onRetry?: () => void

onRetryOrders?: () => void

onSwitchPatient?: (userId: string) => void

onTabChange?: (tab: PatientChartTab) => void

onVerifyIdentity?: (docType: IdentityDocumentType) => void

orders?: unknown = []

ordersState?: 'ready' | 'loading' | 'error' | 'permission-restricted' = 'ready'

patient: {
  userId: string;
  /** Decrypted display name; empty when the record is crypto-shredded. */
  displayName: string;
  sexAtBirth: PatientSex;
  /** Derived server-side from date or year of birth; 0 when unknown. */
  age: number;
  hasAge: boolean;
  /** `··` + last two digits of the provisional code; empty when none. */
  mrnMasked: string;
  /** `+XX*****1234`; empty when no verified primary phone. */
  phoneMasked: string;
  assurance: PatientAssurance;
  /** '' | 'deceased' | 'merged' — terminal states outrank assurance. */
  status: PatientTerminalStatus;
  /**
   * True when the per-patient encryption key was destroyed: the record
   * exists but its name and phone can never be revealed again.
   */
  shredded?: boolean;
}

/**
 * Registry rows for the in-place switcher; id-resolved, never by name.
 */
patients?: unknown

/**
 * Canonical PatientContextRail composition, supplied by the caller.
 */
rail?: ReactNode

/**
 * Canonical results composition (results feature), supplied by the caller.
 */
results?: ReactNode

/**
 * Controlled selected record view for completion and deep-link handoffs.
 */
selectedTab?: 'overview' | 'orders' | 'results'

state?: 'ready' | 'loading' | 'error' | 'not-found' = 'ready'

/**
 * Governed clinical work rendered in the center column instead of chart tabs.
 */
workflow?: ReactNode
Imports 
import {
    LabFlowsheet,
    LabOrderRail,
    NextActionsRail,
    PatientChart,
    PatientContextRail,
    PatientOrderFlow,
    PrescribeFlow,
    ResultsProgressRail,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()} />;
Demo Tour Patient story ok
The record a new doctor lands on from the first-use home offer. It carries real clinical context — problems, medicines, safety, and returned orders — because an empty chart would break the promise that offer makes.
const DemoTourPatient = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOKHA_CHANN}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_TOUR_CHART.orders}
    rail={(<PatientContextRail
      patient={{
        initials: 'SC',
        name: SOKHA_CHANN.displayName,
        demographics: `${SOKHA_CHANN.age} y · ${SOKHA_CHANN.sexAtBirth} · MRN ${SOKHA_CHANN.mrnMasked}`,
      }}
      reasonForVisit={DEMO_TOUR_CHART.reasonForVisit}
      safety={DEMO_TOUR_CHART.safety}
      sections={DEMO_TOUR_CHART.sections}
      showIdentity={false}
      todaySummary={DEMO_TOUR_CHART.todaySummary}
    />)}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()} />;
Next Actions story ok
Calm-moment third rail: three launchers for the next clinical step. The rail launches governed flows; nothing completes inside it.
const NextActions = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    actionRail={(<NextActionsRail
      onOrder={fn()}
      onPrescribe={fn()}
      onSchedule={fn()}
      patientName="Nimol"
    />)} />;
Order Workspace story ok
Order drafting expands the right workspace without replacing the visible results.
const OrderWorkspace = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    actionRail={(<LabOrderRail
      categories={LAB_CATALOG_CATEGORIES}
      onClose={fn()}
      onReview={fn()}
      tests={LAB_CATALOG_TESTS}
    />)}
    actionRailMode="workspace"
    defaultTab="results" />;
Order Workspace Continuity story ok
Opening Order changes only the right rail; the current chart view stays anchored.
const OrderWorkspaceContinuity = (args) => {
  function Harness() {
    const [orderOpen, setOrderOpen] = useState(false);
    return (
      <PatientChart
        {...args}
        actionRail={
          orderOpen ? (
            <LabOrderRail
              categories={LAB_CATALOG_CATEGORIES}
              onClose={() => setOrderOpen(false)}
              onReview={fn()}
              tests={LAB_CATALOG_TESTS}
            />
          ) : (
            <NextActionsRail
              onOrder={() => setOrderOpen(true)}
              patientName="Nimol"
            />
          )
        }
        actionRailMode={orderOpen ? 'workspace' : 'launcher'}
      />
    );
  }

  return <Harness />;
};
Results Arriving story ok
Results-arriving moment: progress, what needs eyes now, and a one-tap subscription instead of watching the page.
const ResultsArriving = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    defaultTab="results"
    actionRail={(<ResultsProgressRail
      onReviewAvailable={fn()}
      progress={DEMO_RESULTS_PROGRESS}
    />)} />;
Prescribe Review story ok
Prescribing begins with indication confirmation while clinical evidence remains visible.
const PrescribeReview = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    actionRail={(<PrescribeFlow
      diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
      diagnosisSearchCandidates={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_SEARCH_POOL}
      diagnosisSuggestions={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_DIAGNOSIS_SUGGESTIONS}
      flaggedLabs={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_FLAGGED_LABS}
      needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
      onClose={fn()}
      onComplete={fn()}
      patientName="Sok Nimol"
      searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
      settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
      suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    />)}
    actionRailMode="workspace"
    defaultTab="results" />;
Prescribe Workspace Continuity story ok
Opening Prescribe changes only the right rail; the selected chart tab stays anchored.
const PrescribeWorkspaceContinuity = (args) => {
  function Harness() {
    const [prescribeOpen, setPrescribeOpen] = useState(false);
    return (
      <PatientChart
        {...args}
        actionRail={
          prescribeOpen ? (
            <PrescribeFlow
              diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
              diagnosisSearchCandidates={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_SEARCH_POOL}
              diagnosisSuggestions={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_DIAGNOSIS_SUGGESTIONS}
              flaggedLabs={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_FLAGGED_LABS}
              needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
              onClose={() => setPrescribeOpen(false)}
              onComplete={() => setPrescribeOpen(false)}
              patientName="Sok Nimol"
              searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
              settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
              suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
            />
          ) : (
            <NextActionsRail
              onPrescribe={() => setPrescribeOpen(true)}
              patientName="Nimol"
            />
          )
        }
        actionRailMode={prescribeOpen ? 'workspace' : 'launcher'}
      />
    );
  }

  return <Harness />;
};
Deceased Hides Action Rail story ok
Terminal records never show an action rail, even when one is supplied.
const DeceasedHidesActionRail = () => <PatientChart
    patient={CHAN_THOEUN_DECEASED}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    actionRail={<NextActionsRail patientName="Thoeun" />} />;

Order Placement And Record story ok
The governed flow adds an active record, then View order takes the clinician to it.
const OrderPlacementAndRecord = (args) => {
  function Harness() {
    const [orders, setOrders] = useState<readonly PatientOrder[]>(DEMO_ORDERS);
    const [orderOpen, setOrderOpen] = useState(false);
    const [selectedTab, setSelectedTab] = useState<'overview' | 'orders' | 'results'>('results');
    const [focusedOrderId, setFocusedOrderId] = useState<string>();

    return (
      <PatientChart
        {...args}
        actionRail={
          orderOpen ? (
            <PatientOrderFlow
              categories={LAB_CATALOG_CATEGORIES}
              onClose={() => setOrderOpen(false)}
              onPlaceOrder={(selectedTestIds) => {
                const order: PatientOrder = {
                  ordId: 'ord-new',
                  code: 'AB12891',
                  placedAtLabel: 'Placed just now',
                  status: 'placed',
                  lineItems: LAB_CATALOG_TESTS
                    .filter((test) => selectedTestIds.includes(test.testCatalogId))
                    .map((test) => ({ code: test.abbrv ?? test.code, displayName: test.displayName })),
                };
                setOrders((current) => [order, ...current]);
                return order;
              }}
              onViewOrder={(orderId) => {
                setFocusedOrderId(orderId);
                setOrderOpen(false);
                setSelectedTab('orders');
              }}
              tests={LAB_CATALOG_TESTS}
            />
          ) : (
            <NextActionsRail onOrder={() => setOrderOpen(true)} patientName="Nimol" />
          )
        }
        actionRailMode={orderOpen ? 'workspace' : 'launcher'}
        focusedOrderId={focusedOrderId}
        onTabChange={(tab) => {
          setFocusedOrderId(undefined);
          setSelectedTab(tab);
        }}
        orders={orders}
        selectedTab={selectedTab}
      />
    );
  }

  return <Harness />;
};
Results Tab story ok 
const ResultsTab = () => <PatientChart
    patient={SOK_NIMOL}
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    orders={DEMO_ORDERS}
    rail={RAIL}
    results={RESULTS}
    onBack={fn()}
    onSwitchPatient={fn()}
    defaultTab="results" />;
Verify Identity Flow story ok
Sighted-document verification: choose a type, verify, badge clears.
const VerifyIdentityFlow = (args) => {
  function Harness() {
    const [patient, setPatient] =
      useState<PatientSummary>(LINA_PRUM_UNVERIFIED);
    return (
      <ChartFrame>
        <PatientChart
          {...args}
          onVerifyIdentity={() =>
            setPatient({ ...patient, assurance: 'verified' })
          }
          patient={patient}
        />
      </ChartFrame>
    );
  }
  return <Harness />;
};

    onSwitchPatient={fn()} />;

PatientContextRail

clinic-clinical-patient-context-rail · ./src/features/patient-context/patient-context-rail.stories.tsx
Fixture-only clinical context rail for the future patient workspace. It intentionally exposes no edit, prescribe, or verification mutation.
Prop types (react-docgen) 12 prop types 
Component: src/features/patient-context/patient-context-rail.tsx::PatientContextRail
Props:
/**
 * Open section IDs are local disclosure state, not a clinical record mutation.
 */
defaultExpanded?: unknown

/**
 * Controlled disclosure state for flows that reveal newly confirmed context.
 */
expandedSections?: unknown

onExpandedSectionsChange?: (sections: PatientContextSectionId[]) => void

onRetry?: () => void

/**
 * The rail is fixture-only until a patient-chart context contract exists.
 */
patient: {
  initials: string;
  name: string;
  demographics: string;
  status?: string;
}

readOnly?: boolean = false

reasonForVisit?: unknown

safety?: unknown

sections?: unknown

/**
 * Hide the identity block when a surrounding chart header already carries
 * it, so identity is never stated twice with room to disagree.
 */
showIdentity?: boolean = true

state?: | 'ready'
| 'loading'
| 'error'
| 'offline'
| 'permission-denied' = 'ready'

todaySummary?: string
Imports 
import { PatientContextRail } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Established story ok 
const Established = () => <PatientContextRail />;
New Patient story ok 
const NewPatient = () => <PatientContextRail />;
Identity Hidden story ok
Inside the patient chart the workbar owns identity; the rail must not repeat it.
const IdentityHidden = () => <PatientContextRail showIdentity={false} />;
Active Problems story ok 
const ActiveProblems = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['problems']} />;
Current Medications story ok 
const CurrentMedications = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['medications']} />;
Pending Verification story ok 
const PendingVerification = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['verification']} />;
Past History story ok 
const PastHistory = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['history']} />;
Admin Details story ok 
const AdminDetails = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['administration']} />;
Active Problems Empty story ok 
const ActiveProblemsEmpty = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['problems']} />;
Current Medications Empty story ok 
const CurrentMedicationsEmpty = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['medications']} />;
All Expanded story ok 
const AllExpanded = () => <PatientContextRail
    sections={[
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.activeProblems.sections[0],
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.currentMedications.sections[1],
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.pendingVerification.sections[2],
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.pastHistory.sections[3],
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.adminDetails.sections[4],
    ]}
    defaultExpanded={['problems', 'medications', 'verification', 'history', 'administration']} />;
Disclosure Interaction story ok 
const DisclosureInteraction = () => <PatientContextRail />;
Pointer Affordance story ok 
const PointerAffordance = () => <PatientContextRail />;
Keyboard Disclosure story ok 
const KeyboardDisclosure = () => <PatientContextRail />;
Loading story ok 
const Loading = () => <PatientContextRail state="loading" />;
Error And Recovery story ok 
const ErrorAndRecovery = () => <ErrorRecoveryHarness />;
Offline story ok 
const Offline = () => <PatientContextRail state="offline" onRetry={fn()} />;
Permission Denied story ok 
const PermissionDenied = () => <PatientContextRail state="permission-denied" />;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['medications']} readOnly />;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <PatientContextRail
    patient={{
      initials: 'NP',
      name: 'Nary Phalla Chann with a deliberately long clinical-record name',
      demographics: '57 y · F · MRN P-7133-EXTENDED-IDENTIFIER',
    }}
    sections={[
      PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.currentMedications.sections[0],
      {
        id: 'medications',
        label: 'Current medications',
        items: [
          {
            label: 'Atorvastatin 20 mg with extended-release dosing instructions',
            detail: 'One tablet nightly after the evening meal; reconciliation pending',
          },
        ],
      },
      ...PATIENT_CONTEXT_FIXTURES.currentMedications.sections.slice(2),
    ]}
    defaultExpanded={['medications']} />;
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => <PatientContextRail defaultExpanded={['medications']} />;

PatientsRegistry

clinic-clinical-patients-registry · ./src/features/patients/patients-registry.stories.tsx
The workspace patient registry: who this workspace has seen, most recent first, opening into the chart. Mirrors the ListWorkspacePatients contract; deliberately has no name search (see storybook-metadata exclusions).
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/patients/patients-registry.tsx::PatientsRegistry
Props:
/**
 * Starts the governed phone-check and patient-resolution flow.
 */
onAddPatient?: () => void

onOpenPatient?: (userId: string) => void

onRetry?: () => void

patients: unknown

state?: 'ready' | 'loading' | 'error' = 'ready'

/**
 * Optional target-contract layer; when absent, its column does not render.
 */
triage?: Readonly<Record<string, PatientTriage>>
Imports 
import { PatientsRegistry } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Backend-true core: four columns, recency order, no triage layer.
const Default = () => <PatientsRegistry patients={DEMO_PATIENTS} onAddPatient={fn()} onOpenPatient={fn()} />;
Triage Layer story ok
The triage layer on: one honest "why now" per patient that has one.
const TriageLayer = () => <PatientsRegistry
    patients={DEMO_PATIENTS}
    onAddPatient={fn()}
    onOpenPatient={fn()}
    triage={DEMO_TRIAGE} />;

Filter To Unverified story ok

Terminal And Sealed Records story ok
Terminal and sealed records render as facts: deceased and merged carry a neutral badge and outrank assurance; a crypto-shredded record keeps its row with "Name unavailable" instead of disappearing.
const TerminalAndSealedRecords = () => <PatientsRegistry patients={DEMO_PATIENTS} onAddPatient={fn()} onOpenPatient={fn()} />;
Empty story ok 
const Empty = () => <PatientsRegistry patients={[]} onAddPatient={fn()} onOpenPatient={fn()} />;

    onAddPatient={fn()}
    onOpenPatient={fn()}
    state="loading" />;
Error And Recovery story ok

    onAddPatient={fn()}
    onOpenPatient={fn()}
    state="error"
    onRetry={fn()} />;

PaymentReceipt

clinic-front-desk-payment-receipt · ./src/features/front-desk/payment-receipt.stories.tsx
Immutable payment evidence. A receipt is never edited: a paid-edit issues a supplemental receipt that references this one, and a void keeps the original readable with a voided marker. The amount is the server-derived capture amount — never desk-entered.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/features/front-desk/payment-receipt.tsx::PaymentReceipt
Props:
/**
 * Branch that captured the payment — required by the capture contract.
 */
branchLabel: string

items: CartItem[]

onPrint?: () => void

patientName: string

payment: {
  status: PaymentStatus;
  method: PaymentMethod;
  tendered: string;
  changeMinor: string;
  receiptId: string | null;
  confirmedAt: string | null;
  amountMinor: string | null;
  cashier?: string;
  /** Paid-edit outcomes. */
  supplementalDue?: boolean;
  previousReceiptId?: string | null;
  previousPaidAmountMinor?: string;
  voidedReceiptId?: string | null;
  /** Split flow: confirmed cash portion in USD. */
  cashPortionMinor?: string;
  /**
   * KHQR intent lifecycle while `status` is `waiting`/`split-cash`. The QR is
   * an expiring intent: it can lapse or be cancelled and regenerated — the
   * desk never treats a stale QR as collectable. PROTOTYPE: no Bakong
   * provider integration exists upstream.
   */
  khqrState?: 'waiting' | 'expired' | 'cancelled';
}

/**
 * Voided evidence view: the receipt stays readable, never deleted.
 */
voided?: boolean = false
Imports 
import { PaymentReceipt } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Paid story ok 
const Paid = () => <PaymentReceipt
    patientName="Dara Phan"
    items={ITEMS}
    payment={PAID}
    branchLabel="Branch BKK1"
    onPrint={fn()} />;
Supplemental Chain story ok
A paid-edit adjustment: the new receipt references the original, never edits it.
const SupplementalChain = () => <PaymentReceipt
    patientName="Dara Phan"
    items={[...ITEMS, { id: 'cbc', kind: 'lab', name: 'CBC', priceMinor: '600', currencyCode: 'USD', qty: 1 }]}
    payment={{
      ...PAID,
      receiptId: 'R-58214',
      supplementalDue: true,
      previousReceiptId: 'R-58213',
      previousPaidAmountMinor: '2100',
      amountMinor: '600',
    }}
    branchLabel="Branch BKK1"
    onPrint={fn()} />;
Voided Evidence story ok
Voided evidence stays readable — history is never deleted.
const VoidedEvidence = () => <PaymentReceipt
    patientName="Dara Phan"
    items={ITEMS}
    payment={PAID}
    branchLabel="Branch BKK1"
    onPrint={fn()}
    voided />;
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => <PaymentReceipt
    patientName="Dara Phan"
    items={ITEMS}
    payment={PAID}
    branchLabel="Branch BKK1"
    onPrint={fn()} />;
Dark Theme story ok 
const DarkTheme = () => <PaymentReceipt
    patientName="Dara Phan"
    items={ITEMS}
    payment={PAID}
    branchLabel="Branch BKK1"
    onPrint={fn()} />;

PhoneGateModal

clinic-clinical-phone-gate · ./src/features/phone-gate/phone-gate-modal.stories.tsx
Prop type error
File: /Users/macbook/Documents/UltimateFinalDCM/src/features/phone-gate/phone-gate-modal.tsx
Error:
"." is not exported under no conditions from package /Users/macbook/Documents/UltimateFinalDCM/node_modules/react-phone-number-input (see exports field in /Users/macbook/Documents/UltimateFinalDCM/node_modules/react-phone-number-input/package.json)
You can debug your component file in this playground: https://react-docgen.dev/playground
Code:
'use client';

import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { formatPhoneNumber } from 'react-phone-number-input';

import {
  Alert,
  AlertAction,
  AlertDescription,
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogAction,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
  AlertTitle,
  Button,
  Dialog,
  DialogBody,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  OtpInput,
  PhoneInput,
  type PhoneValue,
} from '../../components/ui';

import { PatientDetailsForm } from './patient-details-form';
import { PatientIdentity } from './patient-identity';
import { SharedPhoneMatches } from './shared-phone-matches';
import { VerifiedPhoneLine } from './verified-phone-line';
import {
  demoLookup,
  demoRateLimited,
  DEMO_MATCH_PATIENT,
  DEMO_OTP,
  DEMO_RESEND_COOLDOWN_SECS,
  DEMO_SHARED_PHONE_PATIENTS,
} from './demo-data';
import {
  draftPatientErrors,
  EMPTY_DRAFT,
  hasDraftErrors,
  hasUnsavedEntries,
  isValidKhLocalPhone,
  maskPhoneForOtp,
  PHONE_GATE_COPY,
  stateAfterLookup,
  verifyGateOtp,
} from './logic';
import type {
  DraftPatient,
  DraftPatientErrors,
  MatchedPatient,
  PhoneGateOutcome,
  PhoneGateState,
  PhoneLookupResult,
} from './logic';
import styles from './phone-gate.module.css';

export type PhoneGateCloseReason = 'completed' | 'dismissed';

export type PhoneGateModalProps = {
  open: boolean;
  onClose: (reason: PhoneGateCloseReason) => void;
  onOutcome: (outcome: PhoneGateOutcome) => void;
  /** Lookup + throttle verdicts; defaults cover the demo journeys. */
  lookup?: (e164: string) => PhoneLookupResult;
  rateLimited?: (e164: string) => boolean;
  expectedCode?: string;
  resendCooldownSecs?: number;
  /** Temporary-patient creation latency; raise it to inspect `submitting`. */
  createDelayMs?: number;
  /** OTP-verification latency; raise it to inspect `verifyingOtp`. */
  verificationDelayMs?: number;
  /** Story hook: open directly on a post-verification state. */
  initial?: {
    state: Extract<
      PhoneGateState,
      | 'verifyOtp'
      | 'verifyingOtp'
      | 'knownMatch'
      | 'sharedMatches'
      | 'differentPatient'
      | 'noMatch'
      | 'error'
    >;
    phone: PhoneValue;
    matchPatient?: MatchedPatient;
    candidates?: MatchedPatient[];
    draft?: DraftPatient;
  };
};

/** Steps that follow a verified code, where the bound number stays on screen. */
const VERIFIED_STATES: PhoneGateState[] = [
  'knownMatch',
  'sharedMatches',
  'differentPatient',
  'noMatch',
  'submitting',
  'error',
];

function titleFor(state: PhoneGateState): string {
  if (state === 'verifyOtp' || state === 'verifyingOtp') return PHONE_GATE_COPY.otpTitle;
  if (state === 'knownMatch') return PHONE_GATE_COPY.matchTitle;
  if (state === 'sharedMatches') return PHONE_GATE_COPY.sharedTitle;
  if (state === 'differentPatient' || state === 'noMatch' || state === 'submitting') {
    return PHONE_GATE_COPY.newPatientTitle;
  }
  if (state === 'error') return PHONE_GATE_COPY.lookupTitle;
  return PHONE_GATE_COPY.phoneTitle;
}

/**
 * The phone gate (spec: docs/design/phone-gate/phone-gate-ui-spec.md).
 * A safety checkpoint before a booking code is sent: verify the phone by OTP,
 * detect an existing patient, attach it or create a temporary patient. One
 * column, one question per step, with the verified number visible wherever it
 * is bound to a person. The catalog behind stays inert; backdrop clicks never
 * dismiss; Esc asks before discarding entered data.
 */
export function PhoneGateModal({
  createDelayMs = 300,
  expectedCode = DEMO_OTP,
  initial,
  lookup = demoLookup,
  onClose,
  onOutcome,
  open,
  rateLimited = demoRateLimited,
  resendCooldownSecs = DEMO_RESEND_COOLDOWN_SECS,
  verificationDelayMs = 300,
}: PhoneGateModalProps) {
  const [state, setState] = useState<PhoneGateState>(initial?.state ?? 'enterPhone');
  const [phone, setPhone] = useState<PhoneValue | undefined>(initial?.phone);
  const [phoneError, setPhoneError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [code, setCode] = useState('');
  const [codeError, setCodeError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [resendLeft, setResendLeft] = useState(0);
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState<DraftPatient>(initial?.draft ?? EMPTY_DRAFT);
  const [draftErrors, setDraftErrors] = useState<DraftPatientErrors>({});
  const [confirmDiscard, setConfirmDiscard] = useState(false);
  const [matchedPatient, setMatchedPatient] = useState<MatchedPatient>(
    initial?.matchPatient ?? DEMO_MATCH_PATIENT,
  );
  const [sharedCandidates, setSharedCandidates] = useState<MatchedPatient[]>(
    initial?.candidates ?? DEMO_SHARED_PHONE_PATIENTS,
  );
  const [selectedCandidateId, setSelectedCandidateId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [selectionError, setSelectionError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [provisionalReason, setProvisionalReason] = useState<
    'different_patient' | 'shared_phone_override' | 'no_match'
  >(initial?.state === 'differentPatient' ? 'different_patient' : 'no_match');
  const submitTimer = useRef<number | undefined>(undefined);
  const verificationTimer = useRef<number | undefined>(undefined);

  useEffect(
    () => () => {
      window.clearTimeout(submitTimer.current);
      window.clearTimeout(verificationTimer.current);
    },
    [],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (resendLeft <= 0) return;
    const timer = setInterval(() => setResendLeft((seconds) => seconds - 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [resendLeft]);

  const phoneDisplay = phone ? formatPhoneNumber(phone) || phone : '';

  function sendCode() {
    if (!phone || !isValidKhLocalPhone(phoneDisplay || phone)) {
      setPhoneError(PHONE_GATE_COPY.invalidPhone);
      return;
    }
    if (rateLimited(phone)) {
      setPhoneError(PHONE_GATE_COPY.rateLimited);
      return;
    }
    setPhoneError(null);
    setCode('');
    setCodeError(null);
    setResendLeft(resendCooldownSecs);
    setState('verifyOtp');
  }

  function runLookup() {
    if (!phone) return;
    const result = lookup(phone);
    if (result.kind === 'known_match') {
      setMatchedPatient(result.patient);
    }
    if (result.kind === 'shared_matches') {
      setSharedCandidates(result.candidates);
      setSelectedCandidateId(null);
      setSelectionError(null);
    }
    if (result.kind === 'no_match') {
      setProvisionalReason('no_match');
    }
    setState(stateAfterLookup(result));
  }

  function verifyCode() {
    if (verifyGateOtp(code, expectedCode) === 'invalid') {
      setCodeError(PHONE_GATE_COPY.invalidCode);
      return;
    }
    setCodeError(null);
    setState('verifyingOtp');
    verificationTimer.current = window.setTimeout(runLookup, verificationDelayMs);
  }

  /** Change: back to entry; the OTP and any lookup result are invalidated. */
  function changePhone() {
    window.clearTimeout(verificationTimer.current);
    setState('enterPhone');
    setCode('');
    setCodeError(null);
    setDraftErrors({});
    setSelectionError(null);
  }

  function attachSelectedCandidate() {
    const patient = sharedCandidates.find(
      (candidate) => candidate.patientId === selectedCandidateId,
    );
    if (!patient) {
      setSelectionError(PHONE_GATE_COPY.noSelection);
      return;
    }
    onOutcome({ kind: 'existing', matchReason: 'shared_phone', patient });
    onClose('completed');
  }

  function startTemporaryPatient(reason: 'different_patient' | 'shared_phone_override') {
    setDraftErrors({});
    setSelectionError(null);
    setProvisionalReason(reason);
    setState('differentPatient');
  }

  function createTemporaryPatient() {
    const errors = draftPatientErrors(draft);
    if (hasDraftErrors(errors)) {
      setDraftErrors(errors);
      return;
    }
    setDraftErrors({});
    setState('submitting');
    submitTimer.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
      onOutcome({
        kind: 'temporary',
        draft,
        phone: phone ?? '',
        knownPhoneOverride: provisionalReason !== 'no_match',
        auditReason: provisionalReason,
      });
      onClose('completed');
    }, createDelayMs);
  }

  function attemptDismiss() {
    if (hasUnsavedEntries({ state, localPhone: phoneDisplay, code, draft })) {
      setConfirmDiscard(true);
      return;
    }
    onClose('dismissed');
  }

  const showDetails =
    state === 'differentPatient' || state === 'noMatch' || state === 'submitting';
  // The branch survives `submitting`, so the warning and the description never
  // swap under the user while creation is in flight.
  const detailsMode = provisionalReason === 'no_match' ? 'noMatch' : 'differentPatient';
  const description =
    state === 'enterPhone'
      ? PHONE_GATE_COPY.phoneSubtitle
      : state === 'knownMatch'
        ? PHONE_GATE_COPY.identityCaveat
        : showDetails && detailsMode === 'noMatch'
          ? PHONE_GATE_COPY.noMatchBody
          : null;

  return (
    <Dialog
      onOpenChange={(next) => {
        if (!next) attemptDismiss();
      }}
      open={open}
    >
      <DialogContent
        className={styles.content}
        closeLabel={PHONE_GATE_COPY.closeLabel}
        onEscapeKeyDown={(event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          attemptDismiss();
        }}
        onInteractOutside={(event) => event.preventDefault()}
        onPointerDownOutside={(event) => event.preventDefault()}
        size="sm"
      >
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>{titleFor(state)}</DialogTitle>
          {description ? <DialogDescription>{description}</DialogDescription> : null}
        </DialogHeader>

        <DialogBody className={styles.body}>
          {state === 'verifyOtp' || state === 'verifyingOtp' ? (
            <VerifiedPhoneLine
              inline
              label={PHONE_GATE_COPY.sentToLabel}
              onChange={changePhone}
              value={phone ? maskPhoneForOtp(phone) : ''}
            />
          ) : null}

          {VERIFIED_STATES.includes(state) ? (
            <VerifiedPhoneLine
              label={PHONE_GATE_COPY.verifiedLabel}
              onChange={changePhone}
              value={phoneDisplay}
              verified
            />
          ) : null}

          {state === 'enterPhone' ? (
            <PhoneInput
              autoFocus
              countries={['KH']}
              defaultCountry="KH"
              error={phoneError}
              label="Phone number"
              onChange={(next) => {
                setPhone(next);
                setPhoneError(null);
              }}
              placeholder="12 345 678"
              required
              size="lg"
              value={phone}
            />
          ) : null}

          {state === 'verifyOtp' || state === 'verifyingOtp' ? (
            <OtpInput
              autoFocus
              disabled={state === 'verifyingOtp'}
              error={codeError}
              accessibleLabel="SMS code"
              onValueChange={(next) => {
                setCode(next);
                setCodeError(null);
              }}
              value={code}
            />
          ) : null}

          {state === 'knownMatch' ? <PatientIdentity patient={matchedPatient} /> : null}

          {state === 'sharedMatches' ? (
            <SharedPhoneMatches
              candidates={sharedCandidates}
              error={selectionError}
              onSelect={(patientId) => {
                setSelectedCandidateId(patientId);
                setSelectionError(null);
              }}
              selectedId={selectedCandidateId}
            />
          ) : null}

          {showDetails ? (
            <PatientDetailsForm
              draft={draft}
              errors={draftErrors}
              mode={detailsMode}
              onChange={(next) => {
                setDraft(next);
                setDraftErrors({});
              }}
            />
          ) : null}

          {state === 'error' ? (
            <Alert tone="danger">
              <AlertTitle>{PHONE_GATE_COPY.lookupErrorTitle}</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription>{PHONE_GATE_COPY.lookupError}</AlertDescription>
              <AlertAction>
                <Button onClick={runLookup} size="sm" variant="primary">
                  Retry
                </Button>
              </AlertAction>
            </Alert>
          ) : null}
        </DialogBody>

        {/* Recovery for a failed lookup sits inside the alert, so that state
            has no action bar — an empty footer rule would be pure chrome. */}
        {state === 'error' ? null : (
          <DialogFooter className={styles.footer}>
            {state === 'enterPhone' ? (
              <Button onClick={sendCode} variant="primary">
                {PHONE_GATE_COPY.sendCode}
              </Button>
            ) : null}

            {state === 'verifyOtp' || state === 'verifyingOtp' ? (
              <>
                <Button
                  disabled={resendLeft > 0 || state === 'verifyingOtp'}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setCode('');
                    setCodeError(null);
                    setResendLeft(resendCooldownSecs);
                  }}
                  variant="ghost"
                >
                  {resendLeft > 0
                    ? `Resend in ${resendLeft}s`
                    : PHONE_GATE_COPY.resendCode}
                </Button>
                <Button
                  disabled={code.length !== 6}
                  loading={state === 'verifyingOtp'}
                  onClick={verifyCode}
                  variant="primary"
                >
                  {state === 'verifyingOtp'
                    ? PHONE_GATE_COPY.verifying
                    : PHONE_GATE_COPY.verifyCode}
                </Button>
              </>
            ) : null}

            {state === 'knownMatch' ? (
              <>
                <Button
                  onClick={() => startTemporaryPatient('different_patient')}
                  variant="ghost"
                >
                  {PHONE_GATE_COPY.someoneElse}
                </Button>
                <Button
                  autoFocus
                  onClick={() => {
                    onOutcome({
                      kind: 'existing',
                      matchReason: 'verified_phone',
                      patient: matchedPatient,
                    });
                    onClose('completed');
                  }}
                  variant="primary"
                >
                  {PHONE_GATE_COPY.useThisPatient}
                </Button>
              </>
            ) : null}

            {state === 'sharedMatches' ? (
              <>
                <Button
                  onClick={() => startTemporaryPatient('shared_phone_override')}
                  variant="ghost"
                >
                  {PHONE_GATE_COPY.noneOfThese}
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={attachSelectedCandidate} variant="primary">
                  {PHONE_GATE_COPY.choosePatient}
                </Button>
              </>
            ) : null}

            {showDetails ? (
              <Button
                loading={state === 'submitting'}
                onClick={createTemporaryPatient}
                variant="primary"
              >
                {state === 'submitting'
                  ? PHONE_GATE_COPY.creating
                  : PHONE_GATE_COPY.createTemporary}
              </Button>
            ) : null}
          </DialogFooter>
        )}

        <AlertDialog onOpenChange={(next) => setConfirmDiscard(next)} open={confirmDiscard}>
          <AlertDialogContent size="sm">
            <AlertDialogHeader>
              <AlertDialogTitle>Discard what you entered?</AlertDialogTitle>
              <AlertDialogDescription>
                The phone, code, or patient details typed here will be lost.
              </AlertDialogDescription>
            </AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogFooter>
              <AlertDialogCancel onClick={() => setConfirmDiscard(false)}>
                Keep editing
              </AlertDialogCancel>
              <AlertDialogAction
                onClick={() => {
                  setConfirmDiscard(false);
                  onClose('dismissed');
                }}
                variant="destructive"
              >
                Discard &amp; close
              </AlertDialogAction>
            </AlertDialogFooter>
          </AlertDialogContent>
        </AlertDialog>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Imports 
import { PhoneGateModal } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Enter Phone story ok
State 1 — enter phone: the title names the step, Send SMS code validates.
const EnterPhone = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Verify Otp story ok
State 2 — OTP: destination supports the code task instead of becoming a second field.
const VerifyOtp = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Known Match story ok
State 3 — known match: the checked number stays on screen beside the record.
const KnownMatch = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'knownMatch', phone: '+85570123496' }} />;
Shared Phone Matches story ok
State 3B — shared phone: one radio set, one primary, no silent default.
const SharedPhoneMatches = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{
      state: 'sharedMatches',
      phone: '+85570123497',
      candidates: DEMO_SHARED_PHONE_PATIENTS,
    }} />;
Verifying Otp story ok
Verification pends on the action, so the step never blanks out.
const VerifyingOtp = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'verifyingOtp', phone: '+85599111222' }} />;
Different Patient story ok
State 4 — different patient: warning banner, audit-flagged creation.
const DifferentPatient = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'knownMatch', phone: '+85570123496' }}
    createDelayMs={0} />;
No Match story ok
State 5 — no match: the fact is a description line, not a tinted banner.
const NoMatch = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'noMatch', phone: '+85599111222' }}
    createDelayMs={0} />;
Change Verified Phone story ok
One control changes the bound number, from every post-verification step.
const ChangeVerifiedPhone = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'noMatch', phone: '+85599111222' }} />;
Submitting Temporary Patient story ok
Submitting — the form stays put; the action carries the pending state.
const SubmittingTemporaryPatient = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'noMatch', phone: '+85599111222' }}
    createDelayMs={60000} />;
Lookup Error story ok
Lookup failure: entries kept, retry offered, the number still changeable.
const LookupError = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Rate Limited story ok
OTP rate limit surfaces on the entry state without leaking existence.
const RateLimited = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Unsaved Data Guard story ok
Esc with entered data asks before discarding; backdrop never dismisses.
const UnsavedDataGuard = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Full Journey Temporary story ok
Full journey — fresh phone to provisional patient, end to end.
const FullJourneyTemporary = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} createDelayMs={0} />;
Full Journey Known Match story ok
Full journey — known phone to existing patient attach.
const FullJourneyKnownMatch = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
320px: the step is the first thing on screen, full-width presentation.
const Mobile320 = () => <PhoneGateModal open onClose={fn()} onOutcome={fn()} />;
Mobile Shared Phone Matches story ok
320px shared-phone safety state: every candidate stays selectable.
const MobileSharedPhoneMatches = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{
      state: 'sharedMatches',
      phone: '+85570123497',
      candidates: DEMO_SHARED_PHONE_PATIENTS,
    }} />;
Mobile No Match Long Content story ok
320px long content: the body scrolls, the primary action stays reachable.
const MobileNoMatchLongContent = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{
      state: 'noMatch',
      phone: '+85599111222',
      draft: {
        name: 'Sreymom Nguyễn Thị Hồng Phương',
        dobOrAge: '12-09-1994',
        sex: 'Female',
      },
    }} />;
Mobile Lookup Error story ok
320px recoverable lookup failure: retry and change actions remain usable.
const MobileLookupError = () => <PhoneGateModal
    open
    onClose={fn()}
    onOutcome={fn()}
    initial={{ state: 'error', phone: '+85599111000' }} />;

Error:
"." is not exported under no conditions from package /Users/macbook/Documents/UltimateFinalDCM/node_modules/react-phone-number-input (see exports field in /Users/macbook/Documents/UltimateFinalDCM/node_modules/react-phone-number-input/package.json)
You can debug your component file in this playground: https://react-docgen.dev/playground
Code:
'use client';

import PhoneNumberInput, {
  getCountryCallingCode,
  type Country,
  type FlagProps,
  type Labels,
  type Value,
} from 'react-phone-number-input';
import flags from 'react-phone-number-input/flags';
import { createContext, forwardRef, useContext, useId, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import type { ComponentPropsWithoutRef, ReactNode } from 'react';

import {
  Combobox,
  ComboboxContent,
  ComboboxEmpty,
  ComboboxInput,
  ComboboxItem,
  ComboboxList,
  ComboboxTrigger,
} from './combobox';
import { GlobeIcon } from './icons';
import styles from './phone-input.module.css';

export type PhoneInputSize = 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';

type PhoneCountryOption = {
  label: string;
  value: Country;
};

type PhoneInputContextValue = {
  readOnly: boolean;
  size: PhoneInputSize;
};

const PhoneInputContext = createContext<PhoneInputContextValue>({
  readOnly: false,
  size: 'lg',
});

export type PhoneInputProps = Omit<
  ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'input'>,
  'defaultValue' | 'onChange' | 'size' | 'type' | 'value'
> & {
  /** Visible field label. Omit only when an external label references the phone input. */
  label?: ReactNode;
  /** Supporting text that helps a person enter a reachable number. */
  helpText?: ReactNode;
  /** Specific recovery guidance for an invalid or unavailable number. */
  error?: ReactNode;
  /** Controls the field's visual density without changing its phone value. */
  size?: PhoneInputSize;
  /** E.164 value supplied by the owning form or workflow. */
  value?: Value | string;
  /** Initial E.164 value for an uncontrolled field. */
  defaultValue?: Value | string;
  /** Called with an E.164 value, or `undefined` when the field is cleared. */
  onChange?: (value: Value | undefined) => void;
  /** Initial country used to format national input and select a calling code. */
  defaultCountry?: Country;
  /** Limits the selectable countries to an owner-authorised set. */
  countries?: Country[];
  /** Localized country names forwarded to the international-number formatter. */
  labels?: Labels;
  /** Enables international entry instead of a default-country national format. */
  international?: boolean;
  /** Lets a person edit the country calling code as part of the number. */
  countryCallingCodeEditable?: boolean;
  /** Receives the selected ISO country code when the calling code changes. */
  onCountryChange?: (country: Country | undefined) => void;
};

function joinClasses(...classes: Array<string | undefined | false>) {
  return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
}

/**
 * Country-aware telephone entry that returns an E.164 value. Use workflow-owned
 * validation for reachability, verification, consent, and any identity decision.
 */
export function PhoneInput({
  'aria-describedby': ariaDescribedBy,
  'aria-invalid': ariaInvalid,
  className,
  defaultValue,
  disabled = false,
  error,
  helpText,
  id,
  international = false,
  label,
  onChange,
  readOnly = false,
  required = false,
  size = 'lg',
  value,
  ...props
}: PhoneInputProps) {
  const generatedId = useId();
  const inputId = id ?? `phone-input-${generatedId}`;
  const helpId = helpText ? `${inputId}-help` : undefined;
  const errorId = error ? `${inputId}-error` : undefined;
  const describedBy = [ariaDescribedBy, helpId, errorId].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || undefined;
  const invalid = error ? true : ariaInvalid;
  const [uncontrolledValue, setUncontrolledValue] = useState<Value | string | undefined>(defaultValue);
  const isControlled = value !== undefined;
  const phoneValue = isControlled ? value : uncontrolledValue;

  return (
    <PhoneInputContext.Provider value={{ readOnly, size }}>
      <div
        className={joinClasses(styles.field, className)}
        data-disabled={disabled ? 'true' : undefined}
        data-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined}
        data-read-only={readOnly ? 'true' : undefined}
        data-size={size}
        data-slot="phone-input-field"
      >
        {label ? (
          <label className={styles.label} htmlFor={inputId}>
            {label}
            {required ? (
              <span aria-hidden="true" className={styles.requiredMark}>
                *
              </span>
            ) : null}
          </label>
        ) : null}
        <PhoneNumberInput
          {...props}
          aria-describedby={describedBy}
          aria-invalid={invalid}
          className={styles.control}
          countrySelectComponent={CountrySelect}
          disabled={disabled}
          flagComponent={CountryFlag}
          id={inputId}
          international={international}
          inputComponent={NumberInput}
          onChange={(nextValue) => {
            if (!isControlled) {
              setUncontrolledValue(nextValue);
            }
            onChange?.(nextValue);
          }}
          readOnly={readOnly}
          required={required}
          smartCaret={false}
          value={phoneValue}
        />
        {helpText ? (
          <span className={styles.helpText} id={helpId}>
            {helpText}
          </span>
        ) : null}
        {error ? (
          <span className={styles.errorText} id={errorId} role="alert">
            {error}
          </span>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </PhoneInputContext.Provider>
  );
}

const NumberInput = forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'input'>>(
  function NumberInput({ className, ...props }, ref) {
    return (
      <input
        {...props}
        ref={ref}
        className={joinClasses(styles.input, className)}
        data-slot="phone-input"
        inputMode="tel"
        type="tel"
      />
    );
  },
);

type CountrySelectProps = {
  disabled?: boolean;
  onChange: (country: Country) => void;
  options: Array<{ label: string; value?: Country }>;
  value?: Country;
};

function CountrySelect({ disabled = false, onChange, options, value: selectedCountry }: CountrySelectProps) {
  const { readOnly } = useContext(PhoneInputContext);
  const countryOptions = useMemo<PhoneCountryOption[]>(
    () =>
      options.flatMap((option) => (option.value ? [{ label: option.label, value: option.value }] : [])),
    [options],
  );
  const selectedOption = countryOptions.find((option) => option.value === selectedCountry);
  const selectedCallingCode = selectedCountry ? `+${getCountryCallingCode(selectedCountry)}` : undefined;
  const countryLabel = selectedOption
    ? `${selectedOption.label}, ${selectedCallingCode}`
    : 'international number';
  const unavailable = disabled || readOnly;

  return (
    <Combobox<PhoneCountryOption>
      disabled={unavailable}
      itemToStringLabel={(option) => `${option.label} +${getCountryCallingCode(option.value)}`}
      itemToStringValue={(option) => option.value}
      items={countryOptions}
      onValueChange={(option) => {
        if (option) {
          onChange(option.value);
        }
      }}
      value={selectedOption}
    >
      <ComboboxTrigger
        aria-label={`Change country or region, currently ${countryLabel}`}
        className={styles.countryTrigger}
        disabled={unavailable}
      >
        <CountryFlag country={selectedCountry} countryName={selectedOption?.label ?? 'International number'} />
        {selectedCallingCode ? (
          <span className={styles.selectedCountryCode}>{selectedCallingCode}</span>
        ) : null}
      </ComboboxTrigger>
      <ComboboxContent className={styles.countryContent}>
        <ComboboxInput
          aria-label="Search country or region"
          placeholder="e.g. United States"
          showTrigger={false}
        />
        <ComboboxEmpty>No country or region matches this search.</ComboboxEmpty>
        <ComboboxList>
          {(option: PhoneCountryOption) => (
            <ComboboxItem key={option.value} value={option}>
              <span className={styles.countryOption}>
                <CountryFlag country={option.value} countryName={option.label} />
                <span className={styles.countryName}>{option.label}</span>
                <span className={styles.countryCode}>+{getCountryCallingCode(option.value)}</span>
              </span>
            </ComboboxItem>
          )}
        </ComboboxList>
      </ComboboxContent>
    </Combobox>
  );
}

function CountryFlag({ country, countryName }: Omit<FlagProps, 'country'> & { country?: Country }) {
  const Flag = country ? flags[country] : undefined;

  return (
    <span aria-hidden="true" className={styles.flag} data-slot="phone-input-flag">
      {Flag ? <Flag title={countryName} /> : <GlobeIcon size={16} />}
    </span>
  );
}

export type { Country, Value as PhoneValue } from 'react-phone-number-input';
export { isPossiblePhoneNumber, isValidPhoneNumber } from 'react-phone-number-input';
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Imports 
import { PhoneInput } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Empty, controlled international entry with country search.
const Default = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <ControlledPhoneInput />
  </div>
);
Small story ok
Dense, table-adjacent field treatment.
const Small = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-xs">
    <ControlledPhoneInput size="sm" />
  </div>
);
Large story ok
Comfortable field treatment for a focused form.
const Large = () => (
  <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <ControlledPhoneInput size="lg" />
  </div>
);
Disabled story ok
Keeps the displayed number while interaction is unavailable.
const Disabled = () => <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <PhoneInput
        defaultCountry="KH"
        disabled
        helpText="Phone details cannot be changed while the record is being updated."
        label="Phone number"
        value="+85598111222" />
</div>;
Preset Value story ok
Displays an existing stored E.164 value in its country-aware format.
const PresetValue = () => <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <PhoneInput
        defaultCountry="US"
        helpText="This example starts from the E.164 value stored by the owning form."
        label="Phone number"
        value="+14155552671" />
</div>;
Error story ok
Error feedback is supplied by the owning validation rule.
const Error = () => <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <PhoneInput
        defaultCountry="KH"
        error="Enter a complete phone number before continuing."
        label="Phone number"
        value="+85512" />
</div>;
Specific Default Country story ok
The default country is an explicit, caller-owned local policy.
const SpecificDefaultCountry = () => <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <PhoneInput
        countries={['KH', 'VN', 'TH']}
        defaultCountry="VN"
        helpText="Only the countries permitted by this form are available."
        label="Phone number"
        placeholder="Enter phone number" />
</div>;
Read Only story ok
Read-only locks both number editing and country changes.
const ReadOnly = () => <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
    <PhoneInput
        defaultCountry="GB"
        helpText="The value can be reviewed but not changed in this state."
        label="Phone number"
        readOnly
        value="+447700900123" />
</div>;
Long Content Mobile story ok
Narrow viewport and long copy keep the picker usable without a decorative outer card.
const LongContentMobile = () => (
  <div className="w-full">
    <PhoneInput
      countries={['KH', 'VN', 'TH', 'US', 'GB']}
      defaultCountry="KH"
      helpText="Choose the country or region associated with this number. The form will store the number in a consistent international format."
      label="Contact number for a person receiving appointment updates"
      placeholder="Enter phone number"
    />
  </div>
);

Popover

design-system-components-popover · ./src/components/ui/popover.stories.tsx
An anchored, non-modal disclosure surface for a short, reversible task. Use Dialog when the task needs a dedicated mobile surface or focus containment.
Imports 
import {
    Button,
    Popover,
    PopoverContent,
    PopoverDescription,
    PopoverTitle,
    PopoverTrigger,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <Popover>
    <PopoverTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Review date guidance</Button>} />
    <PopoverContent aria-label="Date guidance" initialFocus={false} role="dialog">
      <PopoverTitle>Use an exact date</PopoverTitle>
      <PopoverDescription>
        Confirm the date before applying it to a schedule, specimen, or report filter.
      </PopoverDescription>
    </PopoverContent>
  </Popover>
);
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-start gap-3">
      <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
        <PopoverTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Open controlled guidance</Button>} />
        <PopoverContent aria-label="Controlled guidance" initialFocus={false} role="dialog">
          <PopoverTitle>Controlled disclosure</PopoverTitle>
          <PopoverDescription>The owning composition controls whether this surface is open.</PopoverDescription>
        </PopoverContent>
      </Popover>
      <span aria-live="polite" className="k-caption">Popover is {open ? 'open' : 'closed'}.</span>
    </div>
  );
};
Mobile Default story ok 
const MobileDefault = () => (
  <Popover>
    <PopoverTrigger render={<Button fullWidth variant="outline">Open date help</Button>} />
    <PopoverContent aria-label="Date help" initialFocus={false} role="dialog">
      <PopoverTitle>Choose the intended date</PopoverTitle>
      <PopoverDescription>
        Keep this anchored surface for short reversible guidance. Use a Dialog when a mobile task needs more room.
      </PopoverDescription>
    </PopoverContent>
  </Popover>
);
Disabled Trigger story ok 
const DisabledTrigger = () => (
  <Popover>
    <PopoverTrigger disabled render={<Button variant="outline">Review archived guidance</Button>} />
    <PopoverContent aria-label="Archived guidance" role="dialog">
      <PopoverTitle>Archived guidance</PopoverTitle>
    </PopoverContent>
  </Popover>
);

PrescribeFlow

clinic-flows-prescribing · ./src/features/patients/prescribe-flow.stories.tsx
Storybook-owned prescribing journey. It keeps ICD-10 selection and the medication draft in one patient action workspace without treating a draft selection as a verified or signed diagnosis.
Prop types (react-docgen) 12 prop types 
Component: src/features/patients/prescribe-flow.tsx::PrescribeFlow
Props:
diagnoses: unknown

diagnosisSearchCandidates: unknown

diagnosisSuggestions: unknown

flaggedLabs: unknown

initialDraft?: {
  /** Caller-owned ICD-10 draft selection. Selection is not verification or signature. */
  diagnosisIds?: readonly string[];
  decisions: Readonly<Record<string, PrescribeDraftDecision>>;
  additions: readonly PrescribeDraftAddition[];
}

needsReview: unknown

onClose?: (draft: PrescribeDraft) => void

onComplete: (draft: PrescribeDraft) => void

patientName: string

searchPool?: unknown

settled?: unknown

suggestions?: unknown
Imports 
import { PrescribeFlow } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Existing Diagnoses story ok
Existing chart diagnoses are ready to confirm without clerical re-entry.
const ExistingDiagnoses = () => <PrescribeFlow
    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    diagnosisSuggestions={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_DIAGNOSIS_SUGGESTIONS}
    diagnosisSearchCandidates={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_SEARCH_POOL}
    flaggedLabs={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_FLAGGED_LABS}
    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onClose={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;

Missing indication blocks the medication step until the clinician selects one.

    patientName="Sok Nimol"

    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onClose={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;
Preserve Medication Draft story ok
Returning to diagnosis selection does not discard medication work.
const PreserveMedicationDraft = () => <PrescribeFlow
    patientName="Sok Nimol"

    diagnosisSuggestions={DEMO_LEGACY_ICD10_DIAGNOSIS_SUGGESTIONS}

    onClose={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;
