PrescribeRail

clinic-clinical-patients-prescribing-medication-draft · ./src/features/patients/prescribe-rail.stories.tsx
Target-contract medication review workspace. The current regimen stays in one stable list, additions share one draft, and AI proposals remain visibly separate from clinician-authored work. Nothing is signed or persisted here.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/features/patients/prescribe-rail.tsx::PrescribeRail
Props:
diagnoses: unknown

/**
 * Rehydrates a local prototype draft when the workflow is reopened.
 */
initialDraft?: {
  /** Caller-owned ICD-10 draft selection. Selection is not verification or signature. */
  diagnosisIds?: readonly string[];
  decisions: Readonly<Record<string, PrescribeDraftDecision>>;
  additions: readonly PrescribeDraftAddition[];
}

needsReview: unknown

onAddDiagnosis?: () => void

/**
 * Leaves the workflow while preserving the local draft in the caller.
 */
onBack?: (draft: PrescribeDraft) => void

/**
 * Returns a reviewed local draft. It does not sign or persist a prescription.
 */
onComplete: (draft: PrescribeDraft) => void

/**
 * Returns to the diagnosis step while preserving the current medication draft.
 */
onEditDiagnoses?: (draft: PrescribeDraft) => void

/**
 * Display name as the registry provides it; never split or reordered.
 */
patientName: string

/**
 * Formulary shown in the add-medication search.
 */
searchPool?: unknown = []

settled?: unknown = []

suggestions?: unknown = []
Imports 
import { PrescribeRail } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
Review work appears first; new medication work is revealed only once the regimen is resolved.
const Default = () => <PrescribeRail
    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;
Review Gate story ok
Decisions update in place; the reviewed draft is returned without signing anything.
const ReviewGate = () => <PrescribeRail
    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;

Adjust opens the inline dose editor and keeps the medication in place.

    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;

    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;

Restored Draft story ok
A restored session draft preserves decisions and additions after leaving the workflow.
const RestoredDraft = () => <PrescribeRail
    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    needsReview={DEMO_NEEDS_REVIEW}
    suggestions={DEMO_SUGGESTIONS}
    settled={DEMO_SETTLED}
    searchPool={DEMO_SEARCH_POOL}
    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()}
    initialDraft={{
      decisions: {
        'med-metformin': {
          decision: 'adjust',
          dose: '500 mg',
          frequency: 'once daily',
        },
      },
      additions: [
        {
          id: 'srch-atorvastatin',
          drug: 'Atorvastatin',
          dose: '20 mg tablet',
          source: 'formulary',
        },
      ],
    }} />;

    patientName="Sok Nimol"
    diagnoses={DEMO_DIAGNOSES}
    needsReview={[]}
    suggestions={[]}
    settled={[]}

    onBack={fn()}
    onComplete={fn()} />;

design-system-primitives-radio · ./src/components/ui/radio.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 11 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/radio.tsx::Radio
Props:
/**
 * Card appearance makes the complete labelled option one compact selectable surface.
 */
appearance?: "default" | "card" = "default"

/**
 * Visible label for the option.
 */
children?: ReactNode

defaultChecked?: any = false

/**
 * Gives descriptive card choices more inset and label-to-help spacing.
 */
density?: "standard" | "comfortable" = "standard"

/**
 * Specific recovery guidance for an invalid choice.
 */
error?: ReactNode

/**
 * Supporting text that clarifies the option.
 */
helpText?: ReactNode

onChange?: ChangeEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>

/**
 * Controlled-friendly callback with the next selected state.
 */
onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean) => void

/**
 * Keeps the current choice available for review but prevents mutation.
 */
readOnly?: boolean

ref?: Ref<HTMLInputElement>

/**
 * Stable value used by RadioGroup and native form submission.
 */
value?: string
Imports 
import { Radio, RadioGroup } from "ultimate-final-dcm";

const Default = () => <Radio name="processing-mode-default" value="standard">Standard processing</Radio>;
Group story ok

  <RadioGroup
    className="w-full max-w-md"
    defaultValue="portal"
    legend="Result delivery"
    name="delivery"
  >
    <Radio value="portal">Add to patient portal</Radio>
    <Radio value="clinician">Send to referring clinician</Radio>
    <Radio value="none">Do not send a copy</Radio>
  </RadioGroup>
);

States story ok

    className="max-w-3xl"
    defaultValue="selected"
    legend="Radio states"
    name="states"
    orientation="horizontal"
  >
    <Radio value="available">Available</Radio>
    <Radio value="selected">Selected</Radio>
    <Radio value="disabled" disabled>
      Unavailable
    </Radio>
    <Radio value="invalid" error="Choose a delivery method">
      Required choice
    </Radio>
  </RadioGroup>
);

      Send through the secure clinic workspace
    </Radio>
  </div>
);

      defaultValue="yes"
      legend="Medical licence status"
      name="comfortable-medical-licence-status"
    >
      <Radio
        appearance="card"
        density="comfortable"
        helpText="Choose your profession, then upload a licence document."
        value="yes"
      >
        Yes — I have a medical licence
      </Radio>
      <Radio
        appearance="card"
        density="comfortable"
        helpText="No credential is created or requested. You can change this later."
        value="no"
      >
        No — not at this time
      </Radio>
    </RadioGroup>
  </div>
);

RadioGroup

design-system-patterns-radio-group · ./src/components/ui/radio-group.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 13 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx::RadioGroup
Props:
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Initial selected value for uncontrolled use.
 */
defaultValue?: string

/**
 * Visible context that helps a clinician make the selection safely.
 */
description?: ReactNode

/**
 * Disables the complete group while retaining each option's reason nearby.
 */
disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Specific recovery guidance when no valid choice has been made.
 */
error?: ReactNode

/**
 * Grid is a two-column choice layout that stacks at the mobile threshold.
 */
layout?: "list" | "grid" = "list"

/**
 * Required group label, announced as the radio set's legend.
 */
legend: ReactNode

/**
 * Shared native form name for every Radio within this group.
 */
name?: string

/**
 * Called when a selectable option becomes selected.
 */
onValueChange?: (value: string) => void

/**
 * Horizontal choices wrap, then stack below the mobile threshold.
 */
orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical" = "vertical"

/**
 * Preserves the selected option for review without allowing mutation.
 */
readOnly?: boolean = false

/**
 * Applies native required semantics to each option in the group.
 */
required?: boolean = false

/**
 * Controlled selected value.
 */
value?: string
Imports 
import {
    Avatar,
    AvatarFallback,
    Badge,
    CalendarIcon,
    Card,
    CardContent,
    HomeIcon,
    InformationIcon,
    Radio,
    RadioGroup,
    Separator,
    TestTubeIcon,
    Tooltip,
    TooltipContent,
    TooltipProvider,
    TooltipTrigger,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <RadioGroup
    legend="Collection route"
    name="collection-route"
    className={styles.frame}
    defaultValue="clinic"
    description="Choose where the ordered tests will be collected before preparing the next step.">(<>
      <Radio value="clinic">Clinic draw</Radio>
      <Radio value="psc">Patient service centre</Radio>
    </>)</RadioGroup>;
Inline story ok 
const Inline = () => <RadioGroup
    legend="Order urgency"
    name="order-urgency"
    className={styles.frame}
    defaultValue="routine"
    orientation="horizontal">(<>
      <Radio value="routine">Routine</Radio>
      <Radio value="urgent">Urgent</Radio>
      <Radio value="stat">Stat</Radio>
    </>)</RadioGroup>;
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => <ControlledRadioGroupStory />;
Validation story ok 
const Validation = () => <RadioGroup
    legend="Collection route"
    name="collection-route-validation"
    className={styles.frame}
    error="Choose a collection route before continuing."
    required>(<>
      <Radio value="clinic">Clinic draw</Radio>
      <Radio value="psc">Patient service centre</Radio>
    </>)</RadioGroup>;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <RadioGroup
    legend="Collection route"
    name="collection-route-disabled"
    className={styles.frame}
    defaultValue="clinic"
    description="The collection route is locked while a booking confirmation is pending."
    disabled>(<>
      <Radio value="clinic">Clinic draw</Radio>
      <Radio value="psc">Patient service centre</Radio>
    </>)</RadioGroup>;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <RadioGroup
    legend="Collection route"
    name="collection-route-read-only"
    className={styles.frame}
    defaultValue="psc"
    description="The route is fixed after the collection appointment has been confirmed."
    readOnly>(<>
      <Radio value="clinic">Clinic draw</Radio>
      <Radio value="psc">Patient service centre</Radio>
    </>)</RadioGroup>;
Card Composition story ok 
const CardComposition = () => (
  <div className={styles.frame}>
    <Card className={styles.card} variant="outline">
      <CardContent>
        <RadioGroup
          defaultValue="secure-message"
          legend="Result delivery"
          name="result-delivery"
        >
          <Radio value="secure-message">
            <span className={styles.optionContent}>
              <span className={styles.optionCopy}>
                <span className={styles.optionTitle}>
                  Secure workspace message
                </span>
                <span className={styles.optionDescription}>
                  Send a notification when the result is released for
                  clinician review.
                </span>
              </span>
              <Badge variant="primary">Recommended</Badge>
            </span>
          </Radio>
          <Radio value="patient-portal">
            <span className={styles.optionContent}>
              <span className={styles.optionCopy}>
                <span className={styles.optionTitle}>Patient portal</span>
                <span className={styles.optionDescription}>
                  Make the result available only after its configured release
                  gate has passed.
                </span>
              </span>
            </span>
          </Radio>
        </RadioGroup>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </div>
);

  );
};

RedBalanceSettlementFlow

No component file found for the "RedBalanceSettlementFlow" component.

     | ^

./src/features/doctor-banking/doctor-banking-flow.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/nextjs-vite';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { expect, userEvent, waitFor, within } from 'storybook/test';

import { READINESS } from '../../components/foundations/readiness-data';

import { confirmedKhqr, pendingKhqr, redDoctorFixture } from './demo-data';
import { DoctorEarningsWorkspace } from './earnings-workspace';
import { DOCTOR_BANKING_STORYBOOK_KURA } from './storybook-metadata';
import { DoctorBankingStoryFrame } from './story-frame';
import type { EarningsRoute } from './earnings-workspace';
import type { KhqrIntent } from './types';

function RedBalanceSettlementFlow() {
  const [route, setRoute] = useState<EarningsRoute>('overview');
  const [intent, setIntent] = useState<KhqrIntent | null>(null);

  return (
    <DoctorBankingStoryFrame onNavigate={(key) => key === 'earnings' && setRoute('overview')}>
      <DoctorEarningsWorkspace
        data={redDoctorFixture}
        intent={intent}
        onCreateKhqr={() => setIntent(pendingKhqr)}
        onNavigate={setRoute}
        onRefresh={() => setIntent(confirmedKhqr)}
        onRegenerate={() => setIntent(pendingKhqr)}
        route={route}
      />
    </DoctorBankingStoryFrame>
  );
}

const meta = {
  title: 'Clinic/Flows/Earnings Settlement',
  component: RedBalanceSettlementFlow,
  tags: ['autodocs', 'source-reui', 'adapted-kura'],
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    kura: {
      ...DOCTOR_BANKING_STORYBOOK_KURA,
      readiness: READINESS.flows,
      flow: {
        pages: [
          'Clinic/Finance/Earnings/Overview',
          'Clinic/Finance/Earnings/Settle',
        ],
        terminal: 'The exact KHQR amount is provider-confirmed and applied to the ledger',
      },
      journeys: ['doctor-red-balance-to-provider-confirmed-khqr'],
    },
    docs: {
      description: {
        component:
          'Executable doctor-owned settlement journey. It routes from the signed person-global balance to an immutable exact-amount KHQR request, waits for provider confirmation, and ends only after the provider-confirmed success state appears.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta<typeof RedBalanceSettlementFlow>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;

export const RedBalanceToConfirmedKhqr: Story = {
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement);

    await expect(canvas.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Earnings' })).toBeVisible();
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: 'Settle now' }));

    await waitFor(async () => {
      await expect(canvas.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Settle balance' })).toBeVisible();
    });
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: 'Create exact KHQR' }));
    await expect(canvas.getByText('Awaiting confirmation')).toBeVisible();
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: 'Check confirmation' }));

    await waitFor(async () => {
      await expect(canvas.getByText('Settlement confirmed')).toBeVisible();
    });
    await expect(canvas.getByText('$48.60')).toBeVisible();
  },
};

export const Mobile320: Story = {
  parameters: { viewport: { defaultViewport: 'kura320' } },
};
Info

design-system-primitives-resizable · ./src/components/ui/resizable.stories.tsx
Groups directly nested resizable panels and handles along one axis.
Imports 
import { ResizableHandle, ResizablePanel, ResizablePanelGroup } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.frame}>
    <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="horizontal">
      <ResizablePanel id="result-list" defaultSize="36%" minSize="24%">
        <PanelContent title="Result list" muted>
          Scan recent laboratory results and select one for detailed review.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
      <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize result list and result detail" showIndicator />
      <ResizablePanel id="result-detail" defaultSize="64%" minSize="40%">
        <PanelContent title="Result detail">
          Review the selected value, reference range, trend, and verification context.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
    </ResizablePanelGroup>
  </div>
);
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => (
  <div className={`${storyStyles.frame} ${storyStyles.frameCompact}`}>
    <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="vertical">
      <ResizablePanel id="visit-context" defaultSize="38%" minSize="25%">
        <PanelContent title="Visit context" muted>
          Keep patient identity and current encounter context visible.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
      <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize visit context and working notes" />
      <ResizablePanel id="working-notes" defaultSize="62%" minSize="35%">
        <PanelContent title="Working notes">
          Continue the assessment while preserving the context above.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
    </ResizablePanelGroup>
  </div>
);
Nested story ok 
const Nested = () => (
  <div className={`${storyStyles.frame} ${storyStyles.frameTall}`}>
    <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="horizontal">
      <ResizablePanel id="queue" defaultSize="30%" minSize="22%">
        <PanelContent title="Review queue" muted>
          Prioritized results awaiting acknowledgement.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
      <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize review queue and result workspace" showIndicator />
      <ResizablePanel id="workspace" defaultSize="70%" minSize="45%">
        <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="vertical">
          <ResizablePanel id="summary" defaultSize="42%" minSize="28%">
            <PanelContent title="Result summary">
              Selected values, flags, and verification status.
            </PanelContent>
          </ResizablePanel>
          <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize result summary and clinical notes" showIndicator />
          <ResizablePanel id="notes" defaultSize="58%" minSize="30%">
            <PanelContent title="Clinical notes" muted>
              Supporting interpretation and acknowledgement context.
            </PanelContent>
          </ResizablePanel>
        </ResizablePanelGroup>
      </ResizablePanel>
    </ResizablePanelGroup>
  </div>
);
State Tracked story ok 
const StateTracked = () => {
  const [layout, setLayout] = useState<ResizableLayout>({ evidence: 40, decision: 60 });

  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
      <div className={`${storyStyles.frame} ${storyStyles.frameCompact}`}>
        <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="horizontal" onLayoutChange={setLayout}>
          <ResizablePanel id="evidence" defaultSize="40%" minSize="25%">
            <PanelContent title="Evidence">
              Supporting observations remain available beside the decision area.
            </PanelContent>
          </ResizablePanel>
          <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize evidence and decision panels" showIndicator />
          <ResizablePanel id="decision" defaultSize="60%" minSize="35%">
            <PanelContent title="Decision" muted>
              The owning workspace can respond to layout changes without coupling state to the primitive.
            </PanelContent>
          </ResizablePanel>
        </ResizablePanelGroup>
      </div>
      <p className={storyStyles.statusText} aria-live="polite">
        Evidence {Math.round(layout.evidence ?? 40)}%; decision {Math.round(layout.decision ?? 60)}%.
      </p>
    </div>
  );
};
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
    <div className={`${storyStyles.frame} ${storyStyles.disabledFrame}`}>
      <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="horizontal" disabled>
        <ResizablePanel id="locked-context" defaultSize="40%">
          <PanelContent title="Required context" muted>
            This region remains fixed while the guided review step is active.
          </PanelContent>
        </ResizablePanel>
        <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize required context and guided action" disabled showIndicator />
        <ResizablePanel id="guided-action" defaultSize="60%">
          <PanelContent title="Guided action">
            Complete the current review step before changing the workspace layout.
          </PanelContent>
        </ResizablePanel>
      </ResizablePanelGroup>
    </div>
    <p className={storyStyles.disabledReason}>
      Resizing is unavailable until the guided review step is complete.
    </p>
  </div>
);
Mobile Vertical story ok 
const MobileVertical = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.frame}>
    <ResizablePanelGroup orientation="vertical">
      <ResizablePanel id="mobile-context" defaultSize="42%" minSize="30%">
        <PanelContent title="Patient context" muted>
          Nguyễn Thị Minh Anh · verified identity · today’s result review.
        </PanelContent>
      </ResizablePanel>
      <ResizableHandle aria-label="Resize patient context and result review" showIndicator />
      <ResizablePanel id="mobile-review" defaultSize="58%" minSize="35%">

ScrollArea

design-system-primitives-scroll-area · ./src/components/ui/scroll-area.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx::ScrollArea
Props:
children?: ReactNode

/**
 * Adds a content fade only where more block-axis content remains.
 */
fadeEdges?: boolean = false

/**
 * Keeps content clear of an overlaid scrollbar when overflow is present.
 */
scrollbarGutter?: boolean = false

/**
 * Scrollbars rendered when no explicit ScrollBar children are supplied.
 */
scrollbars?: 'vertical' | 'horizontal' | 'both' | 'none' = 'vertical'

viewportRef?: Ref<HTMLDivElement>
Imports 
import {
    ScrollArea,
    ScrollBar,
    Table,
    TableBody,
    TableCell,
    TableHead,
    TableHeader,
    TableRow,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Release history" className={storyStyles.verticalFrame} role="region">
    <ReleaseList />
  </ScrollArea>
);
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => (
  <ScrollArea
    aria-label="Recent result summaries"
    className={storyStyles.horizontalFrame}
    role="region"
    scrollbars="horizontal"
  >
    <div className={storyStyles.horizontalContent}>
      {resultItems.map(([name, metaText]) => (
        <article className={storyStyles.resultCard} key={name}>
          <p className={storyStyles.resultName}>{name}</p>
          <p className={storyStyles.resultMeta}>{metaText}</p>
        </article>
      ))}
    </div>
  </ScrollArea>
);
Both Axes story ok 
const BothAxes = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Wide result history" className={storyStyles.bothFrame} role="region" scrollbars="both">
    <Table className={storyStyles.wideTable}>
      <TableHeader>
        <TableRow>
          <TableHead>Test</TableHead>
          <TableHead>17 Jul</TableHead>
          <TableHead>16 Jul</TableHead>
          <TableHead>15 Jul</TableHead>
          <TableHead>14 Jul</TableHead>
          <TableHead>Reference</TableHead>
        </TableRow>
      </TableHeader>
      <TableBody>
        {['Haemoglobin', 'Platelets', 'White cells', 'Neutrophils', 'Lymphocytes', 'MCV', 'MCH'].map((name, index) => (
          <TableRow key={name}>
            <TableCell>{name}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{128 + index}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{126 + index}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{127 + index}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{125 + index}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>120–160</TableCell>
          </TableRow>
        ))}
      </TableBody>
    </Table>
  </ScrollArea>
);
Fade Edges story ok 
const FadeEdges = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Faded release history" className={storyStyles.verticalFrame} fadeEdges role="region">
    <ReleaseList />
  </ScrollArea>
);
Scrollbar Gutter story ok 
const ScrollbarGutter = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Release history with scrollbar gutter" className={storyStyles.gutterFrame} role="region" scrollbarGutter>
    <ReleaseList />
  </ScrollArea>
);
Explicit Scroll Bar story ok 
const ExplicitScrollBar = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Explicit horizontal scrollbar" className={storyStyles.horizontalFrame} role="region">
    <div className={storyStyles.horizontalContent}>
      {resultItems.map(([name, metaText]) => (
        <article className={storyStyles.resultCard} key={name}>
          <p className={storyStyles.resultName}>{name}</p>
          <p className={storyStyles.resultMeta}>{metaText}</p>
        </article>
      ))}
    </div>
    <ScrollBar orientation="horizontal" />
  </ScrollArea>
);
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => (
  <ScrollArea aria-label="Mobile result history" className={storyStyles.mobileFrame} fadeEdges role="region" scrollbarGutter>
    <ReleaseList />
  </ScrollArea>
);

Scrollspy

design-system-primitives-scrollspy · ./src/components/ui/scrollspy.stories.tsx
Keeps local navigation synchronized with sections inside one scrolling viewport.
Prop types (react-docgen) 3 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/scrollspy.tsx::Scrollspy
Props:
/**
 * Distance from the viewport start at which a section becomes current.
 */
offset?: number = 0

onActiveChange?: (id: string) => void

/**
 * Ref to the scrollable viewport or an ancestor containing one.
 */
targetRef: RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
Imports 
import { Button, ScrollArea, Scrollspy } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => {
  const viewportRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.layout}>
      <Scrollspy aria-label="Result review sections" className={storyStyles.verticalNav} targetRef={viewportRef}>
        {sections.map(([id, title]) => (
          <Button data-scrollspy-anchor={id} key={id} variant="outline">{title}</Button>
        ))}
      </Scrollspy>
      <ScrollArea aria-label="Result review content" className={storyStyles.viewport} role="region" viewportRef={viewportRef}>
        <SectionContent />
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
};
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => {
  const viewportRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.horizontalLayout}>
      <Scrollspy aria-label="Horizontal result review sections" className={storyStyles.horizontalNav} targetRef={viewportRef}>
        {sections.map(([id, title]) => (
          <Button data-scrollspy-anchor={id} key={id} variant="outline">{title}</Button>
        ))}
      </Scrollspy>
      <ScrollArea aria-label="Horizontal navigation content" className={storyStyles.viewport} role="region" viewportRef={viewportRef}>
        <SectionContent />
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
};
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => {
  const viewportRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.layout}>
      <Scrollspy aria-label="Mobile result review sections" className={storyStyles.verticalNav} targetRef={viewportRef}>
        {sections.map(([id, title]) => (
          <Button data-scrollspy-anchor={id} key={id} size="sm" variant="outline">{title}</Button>
        ))}
      </Scrollspy>
      <ScrollArea aria-label="Mobile result review content" className={storyStyles.viewport} fadeEdges role="region" viewportRef={viewportRef}>
        <SectionContent />
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
};

SegmentedToggle

design-system-patterns-segmentedtoggle · ./src/components/ui/segmented-toggle.stories.tsx
Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.
Prop types (react-docgen) 8 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/segmented-toggle.tsx::SegmentedToggle
Props:
className?: string

defaultValue?: string

disabled?: boolean = false

/**
 * Accessible name that describes the decision represented by the segments.
 */
label: string

/**
 * Render the label above the segments like a form-field label. Use inside
 * forms where every field needs a visible name; omit for toolbar segments
 * whose meaning is carried by surrounding context.
 */
labelVisible?: boolean = false

onValueChange?: (value: string) => void

options: unknown

value?: string
Imports 
import { CalendarIcon, ClockIcon, HistoryIcon, SegmentedToggle, UserMultipleIcon } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <SegmentedToggle label="Visit detail mode" options={viewOptions} defaultValue="overview" />;
Filter Mode story ok 
const FilterMode = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Result filter mode"
    options={[
      { value: 'all', label: 'All results' },
      { value: 'review', label: 'Needs review' },
    ]}
    defaultValue="all" />;
Rapid Retargeting story ok
Rapid changes retarget the same indicator instead of cross-fading two selected surfaces.
const RapidRetargeting = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Lab unit system"
    options={[
      { value: 'conventional', label: 'Conventional' },
      { value: 'si', label: 'SI' },
    ]}
    defaultValue="conventional" />;
With Icons story ok
Kura segmented-control finish with canonical Kura icons and mode semantics.
const WithIcons = () => <div className="w-80 max-w-full">
    <SegmentedToggle
        label="Reporting period"
        options={[
          { value: 'daily', label: 'Daily', leadingIcon: <CalendarIcon aria-hidden="true" size={14} /> },
          { value: 'weekly', label: 'Weekly', leadingIcon: <HistoryIcon aria-hidden="true" size={14} /> },
          { value: 'monthly', label: 'Monthly', leadingIcon: <UserMultipleIcon aria-hidden="true" size={14} /> },
          { value: 'yearly', label: 'Yearly', leadingIcon: <ClockIcon aria-hidden="true" size={14} /> },
        ]}
        defaultValue="monthly" />
</div>;
Disabled Option story ok 
const DisabledOption = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Visit detail mode"
    options={[
      { value: 'overview', label: 'Overview' },
      { value: 'timeline', label: 'Timeline', disabled: true },
      { value: 'audit', label: 'Audit' },
    ]}
    defaultValue="overview" />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Unavailable mode"
    options={viewOptions}
    defaultValue="overview"
    disabled />;
Mobile Long Labels story ok 
const MobileLongLabels = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Consultation record mode"
    options={[
      { value: 'current', label: 'Current consultation' },
      { value: 'previous', label: 'Previous consultations' },
    ]}
    defaultValue="current" />;
Density Reference story ok 
const DensityReference = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start gap-6">
    {(['compact', 'cozy', 'comfortable'] as const).map((density) => (
      <div key={density} data-density={density} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
        <SegmentedToggle label={`${density} result mode`} options={viewOptions} />
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{density}</span>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
);
Visible Label story ok
Form-field presentation: `labelVisible` renders the accessible name above the segments.
const VisibleLabel = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Sex at birth"
    labelVisible
    options={[
      { value: 'female', label: 'Female' },
      { value: 'male', label: 'Male' },
    ]} />;
Controlled No Selection story ok
Controlled with no value yet: no segment pre-selected; selection only reflects real data.
const ControlledNoSelection = () => <SegmentedToggle
    label="Sex at birth"
    labelVisible
    value=""
    options={[
      { value: 'female', label: 'Female' },
      { value: 'male', label: 'Male' },
    ]} />;

Select

design-system-primitives-select · ./src/components/ui/select.stories.tsx
Kura single-select with a custom, collision-safe listbox popup. Base UI provides the ReUI-style trigger, portal, keyboard navigation, selection semantics, hidden form input, and focus restoration; Kura owns the field anatomy, tokens, copy, states, and visual finish.
Prop types (react-docgen) 18 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/select.tsx::Select
Props:
autoComplete?: string

className?: string

/**
 * Initial value for an uncontrolled select.
 */
defaultValue?: string | null

disabled?: boolean = false

error?: ReactNode

form?: string

helpText?: ReactNode

id?: string

label?: ReactNode

name?: string

/**
 * Compatibility change event containing the selected option value.
 */
onChange?: (event: SelectChangeEvent) => void

/**
 * Preferred value callback for new consumers.
 */
onValueChange?: (value: string | null) => void

options: unknown

/**
 * Renders an initial non-selectable prompt row and trigger value.
 */
placeholder?: string

readOnly?: boolean = false

ref?: Ref<HTMLButtonElement>

required?: boolean = false

/**
 * Current value for a controlled select. An empty string shows the prompt.
 */
value?: string | null
Imports 
import { Select } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Select label="Draw site" options={SITES} defaultValue="Antecubital fossa" />;
With Placeholder story ok 
const WithPlaceholder = () => <Select
    label="Defer reason"
    placeholder="Choose a reason"
    defaultValue=""
    options={[
      { value: 'Patient refused', label: 'Patient refused' },
      { value: 'Difficult vein', label: 'Difficult vein' },
      { value: 'Insufficient volume', label: 'Insufficient volume' },
    ]} />;
Invalid story ok 
const Invalid = () => <Select
    label="Insurance provider"
    options={[{ value: 'forte', label: 'Forte' }]}
    defaultValue=""
    placeholder="Choose a provider"
    error="Choose the provider shown on the member card." />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Select
    label="Station"
    options={[{ value: 'PSC-01', label: 'PSC-01 · Main station' }]}
    defaultValue="PSC-01"
    disabled
    helpText="Assigned by the shift lead." />;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <Select
    label="Collection location"
    options={[
      {
        value: 'community-outreach',
        label: 'Community outreach collection station — Riverside District mobile clinic',
      },
    ]}
    defaultValue="community-outreach" />;
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => <Select label="Draw site" options={SITES} defaultValue="Forearm" />;

Separator

A visual boundary between adjacent content groups, not an interactive resize handle.

Props:
/**
 * Decorative separators are ignored by assistive technology.
 */
decorative?: boolean = true

orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal'
Imports 
import { FieldSeparator, MoneyText, Separator } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
    <div>
      <h3 className={storyStyles.sectionTitle}>Result verification</h3>
      <p className={storyStyles.body}>Verified by the assigned laboratory reviewer.</p>
    </div>
    <Separator />
    <p className={storyStyles.body}>The result is ready for clinical acknowledgement.</p>
  </div>
);
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.inline}>
    <span>Today</span>
    <Separator orientation="vertical" />
    <span>Verified</span>
    <Separator orientation="vertical" />
    <span>Final</span>
  </div>
);
Semantic story ok 
const Semantic = () => (
  <div className={`${storyStyles.stack} ${storyStyles.semanticFrame}`}>
    <p className={storyStyles.body}>Current encounter</p>
    <Separator aria-label="Previous encounters" decorative={false} />
    <p className={storyStyles.body}>Earlier encounters</p>
  </div>
);
Order Summary story ok 
const OrderSummary = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
    <div className={storyStyles.summaryRow}><span className={storyStyles.body}>Subtotal</span><MoneyText currency="USD" minor="4900" /></div>
    <div className={storyStyles.summaryRow}><span className={storyStyles.body}>Service fee</span><MoneyText currency="USD" minor="500" /></div>
    <Separator />
    <div className={storyStyles.summaryRow}><span className={storyStyles.sectionTitle}>Total</span><MoneyText currency="USD" minor="5400" /></div>
  </div>
);
Labelled Form Division Uses Field Separator story ok 
const LabelledFormDivisionUsesFieldSeparator = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
    <FieldSeparator>or continue with</FieldSeparator>
  </div>
);

SettingsModal

design-system-patterns-settings-modal · ./src/components/ui/settings-modal.stories.tsx
Kura settings-modal anatomy with canonical tokens, dialog behavior, and icons. It owns shell navigation only; feature content and authority rules stay with the consumer.
Prop types (react-docgen) 7 prop types 
Component: src/components/ui/settings-modal.tsx::SettingsModal
Props:
/**
 * Initial section for uncontrolled use.
 */
defaultSection?: string

onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void

onValueChange?: (value: string) => void

open: boolean

sections: unknown

title?: string = 'Settings'

/**
 * Controlled section value. Use this when the host owns settings navigation.
 */
value?: string
Imports 
import { Input, SettingsModal, Switch } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <SettingsModal onOpenChange={() => undefined} open sections={sections} />;
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => <SettingsModal onOpenChange={() => undefined} open sections={sections} />;

SettingsView

clinic-settings · ./src/features/settings/settings-view.stories.tsx
One canonical surface for low-frequency workspace configuration: identity, cabinet, team, money, documents, and security. A vertical Tabs rail swaps dense panels — no hero, no decorative dashboard; status rows and one obvious action each. The presentation promotes ReUI settings-7's real page, side-tab, card, and row anatomy into the feature owner while Kura keeps all behavior.
Prop types (react-docgen) 5 prop types 
Component: src/features/settings/settings-view.tsx::SettingsView
Props:
/**
 * page: standalone route with its own header. dialog: fills SettingsDialog —
 * the dialog provides the accessible title and the rail is the only
 * settings navigation, so the page header is dropped.
 */
frame?: 'page' | 'dialog' = "page"

onSectionChange?: (section: SettingsSectionId) => void

/**
 * Opens the shared verification modal in the host application.
 */
onVerify?: () => void

/**
 * Active section; the surface also navigates internally.
 */
section?: | 'overview'
| 'account'
| 'cabinet'
| 'members'
| 'preferences'
| 'communications'
| 'billing'
| 'directory'
| 'esign'
| 'security'

/**
 * Mirrors the verification store; settings never contradicts the gate.
 */
verification?: | 'none'
| 'pending_review'
| 'rejected'
| 'verified'
| 'expiring'
| 'in_grace'
| 'lapsed' = "verified"
Imports 
import { SettingsDialog, SettingsView, Toaster } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Overview story ok
Landing state: license countdown banner, status rows, jump links.
const Overview = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} />;
Account Verified story ok
Verified account: locked identity fields and the license renewal badge.
const AccountVerified = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="account" />;
Account Rejected story ok
Rejected submissions preserve history and route to a corrected submission.
const AccountRejected = () => <SettingsView
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="account"
    verification="rejected" />;
Account Under Review story ok
Verification under review: informational banner, no warning tone.
const AccountUnderReview = () => <SettingsView
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="account"
    verification="pending_review" />;
Account Expiring story ok
Expiring credentials remain live while clearly routing to renewal.
const AccountExpiring = () => <SettingsView
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="account"
    verification="expiring" />;
Account In Grace story ok
Grace is still live for attribution but carries a renewal warning.
const AccountInGrace = () => <SettingsView
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="account"
    verification="in_grace" />;
Account Lapsed story ok
Lapse blocks only new attribution; placed episodes remain intact.
const AccountLapsed = () => <SettingsView
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="account"
    verification="lapsed" />;
Cabinet story ok
Cabinet: locked country, courier editor requires at least one pickup day.
const Cabinet = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="cabinet" />;
Team Access story ok
Team access: invite validation, then a guarded approve with AlertDialog.
const TeamAccess = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="members" />;
Preferences story ok
Preferences: segmented + switch controls save on every change.
const Preferences = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="preferences" />;
Patient Messages story ok
Patient messages: ranked channels, template editing with validation.
const PatientMessages = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="communications" />;
Payments story ok
Workspace payments stay separate from person-owned Earnings.
const Payments = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="billing" />;
Directory Profile story ok
Directory: chip remove with undo, duplicate guard, locked public fields.
const DirectoryProfile = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="directory" />;
Signed Documents story ok
Signed documents: certificate chain status and the signing log export.
const SignedDocuments = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="esign" />;
Security story ok
Security: guarded session sign-out empties the list and disables bulk.
const Security = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} section="security" />;
Rail Walkthrough story ok
Full journey: the rail reaches all ten sections in order.
const RailWalkthrough = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} />;
Mobile 320 story ok
320px: the rail becomes a horizontal strip and rows stack.
const Mobile320 = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} />;
Tablet 768 story ok
Tablet: two-column shell still holds at 768px.
const Tablet768 = () => <SettingsView onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} />;
Dialog Frame story ok
Overlay frame: the dialog rail is the only settings navigation.
const DialogFrame = () => <SettingsDialog onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} onOpenChange={() => {}} open />;
Dialog Preferences story ok
Wide dialog: preference labels, values, and controls share stable columns.
const DialogPreferences = () => <SettingsDialog
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    section="preferences"
    onOpenChange={() => {}}
    open />;
Dialog First Use Doctor story ok
Fresh-workspace settings keeps all ten sections and carries no established fixture.
const DialogFirstUseDoctor = () => <SettingsDialog
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    firstUse
    identity={{ contact: '+85598111222', name: 'Dr. Bopha Kim' }}
    onOpenChange={() => {}}
    open
    verification="none"
    workspaceName="Dr. Bopha Kim's cabinet" />;
Dialog First Use Doctor Mobile 320 story ok
Fresh-workspace settings keeps every section reachable at 320px.
const DialogFirstUseDoctorMobile320 = () => <SettingsDialog
    onSectionChange={fn()}
    onVerify={fn()}
    firstUse
    identity={{ contact: '+85598111222', name: 'Dr. Bopha Kim' }}
    onOpenChange={() => {}}
    open
    verification="none"
    workspaceName="Dr. Bopha Kim's cabinet" />;
Dialog Mobile 320 story ok
320px: the dialog fills the screen; the rail becomes a horizontal strip.
const DialogMobile320 = () => <SettingsDialog onSectionChange={fn()} onVerify={fn()} onOpenChange={() => {}} open />;

Imports 
import {
    Badge,
    Button,
    Field,
    FieldGroup,
    FieldLabel,
    Input,
    Sheet,
    SheetBody,
    SheetClose,
    SheetContent,
    SheetDescription,
    SheetFooter,
    SheetHeader,
    SheetTitle,
    SheetTrigger,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <Sheet>
    <SheetTrigger>Open queue</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="right">
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Waiting queue</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>Longest wait first.</SheetDescription>
        </div>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close queue" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <p style={{ margin: 0, font: 'inherit' }}>Queue content renders here.</p>
      </SheetBody>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
Left Navigation story ok 
const LeftNavigation = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Open navigation</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="left">
      <SheetHeader>
        <SheetTitle>Menu</SheetTitle>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close menu" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <nav aria-label="Primary">
          <ul style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0, display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-1)' }}>
            {['Arrivals', 'Queue', 'Patients', 'Bookings'].map((item) => (
              <li key={item}>{item}</li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </nav>
      </SheetBody>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
Bottom Mobile story ok 
const BottomMobile = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Review order</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="bottom">
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Order cart</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>3 tests · $24.00</SheetDescription>
        </div>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close cart" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <ul style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0, display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-2)' }}>
          <li>
            CBC <Badge variant="secondary">EDTA</Badge>
          </li>
          <li>
            HbA1c <Badge variant="secondary">EDTA</Badge>
          </li>
          <li>
            Lipid panel <Badge variant="secondary">SST</Badge>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </SheetBody>
      <SheetFooter>
        <Button variant="primary">Continue to payment</Button>
      </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
No Backdrop Dismiss story ok 
const NoBackdropDismiss = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Open draw worksheet</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="right" closeOnBackdrop={false}>
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Draw in progress</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>Finish or defer before leaving this worksheet.</SheetDescription>
        </div>
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <p style={{ margin: 0 }}>Backdrop clicks are ignored while a draw is active.</p>
      </SheetBody>
      <SheetFooter>
        <Button variant="outline">Defer draw</Button>
        <Button variant="primary">Complete draw</Button>
      </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
Top Context story ok 
const TopContext = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Open visit context</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="top">
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Visit context</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>Keep the verified encounter visible before continuing.</SheetDescription>
        </div>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close visit context" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <p style={{ margin: 0 }}>Nguyễn Thị Minh Anh · verified identity · today’s consultation.</p>
      </SheetBody>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
Form Content story ok 
const FormContent = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Edit contact details</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="right">
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Edit contact details</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>Update operational contact information for this patient record.</SheetDescription>
        </div>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close contact details" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <FieldGroup>
          <Field>
            <FieldLabel htmlFor="sheet-preferred-name">Preferred name</FieldLabel>
            <Input id="sheet-preferred-name" defaultValue="Minh Anh" />
          </Field>
          <Field>
            <FieldLabel htmlFor="sheet-contact-phone">Contact phone</FieldLabel>
            <Input id="sheet-contact-phone" defaultValue="012 345 678" inputMode="tel" />
          </Field>
        </FieldGroup>
      </SheetBody>
      <SheetFooter>
        <Button variant="primary">Save changes</Button>
      </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);
Scrollable Content story ok 
const ScrollableContent = () => (
  <Sheet defaultOpen>
    <SheetTrigger>Open result history</SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent side="right">
      <SheetHeader>
        <div>
          <SheetTitle>Result history</SheetTitle>
          <SheetDescription>Verified and amended values, newest first.</SheetDescription>
        </div>
        <SheetClose aria-label="Close result history" />
      </SheetHeader>
      <SheetBody>
        <ol style={{ display: 'grid', gap: 'var(--space-4)', margin: 0, paddingInlineStart: 'var(--space-5)' }}>
          {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, index) => (
            <li key={index}>Result review {24 - index} · verified</li>
          ))}
        </ol>
      </SheetBody>
      <SheetFooter>
        <Button variant="outline">Export history</Button>
      </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
  </Sheet>
);

import { Skeleton } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Skeleton className={styles.skeletonBlock} />;
Shapes story ok 
const Shapes = () => (
  <div className={styles.frame} role="status" aria-label="Loading patient summary">
    <div className={styles.skeletonRow}>
      <Skeleton shape="circle" />
      <div className={styles.skeletonCopy}>
        <Skeleton className={styles.skeletonMedium} shape="text" />
        <Skeleton className={styles.skeletonShort} shape="text" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
);
Static story ok 
const Static = () => <Skeleton animated={false} className={styles.skeletonBlock} />;
Loading List story ok 
const LoadingList = () => (
  <div className={styles.frame} role="status" aria-label="Loading appointment queue">
    <p className={styles.supporting}>Loading appointment queue…</p>
    <div className={styles.stack} aria-hidden="true">
      {[1, 2, 3].map((row) => (
        <div className={styles.skeletonRow} key={row}>
          <Skeleton shape="circle" />
          <div className={styles.skeletonCopy}>
            <Skeleton className={styles.skeletonMedium} shape="text" />
            <Skeleton className={styles.skeletonShort} shape="text" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  </div>
);
Mobile Narrow story ok 
const MobileNarrow = () => <Skeleton />;

Props:
/**
 * Accessible label for the field when no visible label is rendered.
 */
aria-label?: string

defaultValue?: any = 0

/**
 * Visible label associated with every slider thumb.
 */
label?: ReactNode

orientation?: any = 'horizontal'

/**
 * Shows the formatted current value beside the label.
 */
showValue?: boolean = false

/**
 * Accessible labels for individual thumbs in a range slider.
 */
thumbLabels?: unknown
Imports 
import { Slider } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Slider defaultValue={30} label="Urgency threshold" max={100} min={0} showValue />;
Range story ok 
const Range = () => <Slider
    defaultValue={[8, 16]}
    label="Arrival window"
    max={24}
    min={0}
    showValue
    thumbLabels={['Window start', 'Window end']} />;
Discrete Values story ok 
const DiscreteValues = () => <Slider
    defaultValue={15}
    label="Reminder interval"
    max={60}
    min={0}
    showValue
    step={5} />;
Vertical Range story ok 
const VerticalRange = () => <Slider
    aria-label="Accepted result range"
    className={styles.sliderVertical}
    defaultValue={[25, 75]}
    orientation="vertical"
    thumbLabels={['Lower bound', 'Upper bound']} />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Slider defaultValue={40} disabled label="Locked threshold" showValue />;
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = () => {
    const [value, setValue] = useState<number | readonly number[]>(20);

    return (
        <Slider
            label="Follow-up interval"
            max={60}
            onValueChange={setValue}
            showValue
            step={5}
            value={value} />
    );
};
Mobile Narrow story ok 
const MobileNarrow = () => <Slider
    defaultValue={[15, 45]}
    label="Collection window"
    max={60}
    showValue
    thumbLabels={['Start', 'End']} />;

Imports 
import { Badge, DragIcon, Sortable, SortableItem, SortableItemHandle } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <SortableFields />;
Keyboard Reorder story ok 
const KeyboardReorder = () => <Sortable />;
Grid story ok 
const Grid = () => <SortableFields strategy="grid" />;
Nested Composition story ok 
const NestedComposition = function NestedSortable() {
  const [sections, setSections] = useState([
    { id: 'arrival', label: 'Arrival details' },
    { id: 'review', label: 'Review details' },
  ]);
  return (
    <Sortable aria-label="Form section order" className={styles.frame} getItemValue={(item) => item.id} onValueChange={setSections} value={sections}>
      {sections.map((section) => (
        <SortableItem key={section.id} value={section.id}>
          <SortableItemHandle aria-label={`Reorder ${section.label}`}><DragIcon aria-hidden="true" /></SortableItemHandle>
          <div className={styles.nestedGroup}>
            <p className={styles.itemTitle}>{section.label}</p>
            <div className={styles.nestedList}>
              <SortableFields />
            </div>
          </div>
        </SortableItem>
      ))}
    </Sortable>
  );
};
Disabled Item story ok 
const DisabledItem = () => <SortableFields disabledId="identity" />;
Mobile Touch story ok 
const MobileTouch = () => <SortableFields />;

Info
No description found. Write a jsdoc comment such as /** Component description */.

Component: src/components/ui/stepper.tsx::Stepper
Props:
/**
 * The step index to start with (uncontrolled). Steps are 1-indexed.
 */
defaultValue?: number = 1

/**
 * Custom indicator content per step state.
 */
indicators?: {
  active?: ReactNode;
  completed?: ReactNode;
  inactive?: ReactNode;
  loading?: ReactNode;
} = {}

onValueChange?: (value: number) => void

orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal'

/**
 * The current active step index (controlled).
 */
value?: number
Imports 
import {
    Button,
    CheckIcon,
    LoadingIcon,
    Stepper,
    StepperContent,
    StepperDescription,
    StepperIndicator,
    StepperItem,
    StepperNav,
    StepperPanel,
    StepperSeparator,
    StepperTitle,
    StepperTrigger,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={2}>
    <StepperNav>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.map(({ step, title }, index) => (
        <StepperItem key={step} step={step}>
          <StepperTrigger>
            <StepperIndicator>{step}</StepperIndicator>
            <StepperTitle>{title}</StepperTitle>
          </StepperTrigger>
          {index < CHECK_IN_STEPS.length - 1 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
        </StepperItem>
      ))}
    </StepperNav>
    <StepperPanel>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.map(({ step, title }) => (
        <StepperContent key={step} value={step}>
          Step {step}: {title}
        </StepperContent>
      ))}
    </StepperPanel>
  </Stepper>
);
Keyboard Navigation story ok 
const KeyboardNavigation = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={1}>
    <StepperNav>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.slice(0, 3).map(({ step, title }, index) => (
        <StepperItem key={step} step={step}>
          <StepperTrigger>
            <StepperIndicator>{step}</StepperIndicator>
            <StepperTitle>{title}</StepperTitle>
          </StepperTrigger>
          {index < 2 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
        </StepperItem>
      ))}
    </StepperNav>
    <StepperPanel>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.slice(0, 3).map(({ step, title }) => (
        <StepperContent key={step} value={step}>
          Panel: {title}
        </StepperContent>
      ))}
    </StepperPanel>
  </Stepper>
);
Completed With Icons story ok 
const CompletedWithIcons = () => (
  <Stepper
    defaultValue={3}
    indicators={{
      completed: <CheckIcon size={14} />,
      loading: <LoadingIcon size={14} />,
    }}
  >
    <StepperNav>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.map(({ step, title }, index) => (
        <StepperItem key={step} step={step}>
          <StepperTrigger>
            <StepperIndicator>{step}</StepperIndicator>
            <StepperTitle>{title}</StepperTitle>
          </StepperTrigger>
          {index < CHECK_IN_STEPS.length - 1 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
        </StepperItem>
      ))}
    </StepperNav>
  </Stepper>
);
Loading Step story ok 
const LoadingStep = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={2} indicators={{ loading: <LoadingIcon size={14} /> }}>
    <StepperNav>
      <StepperItem step={1}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>1</StepperIndicator>
          <StepperTitle>Identity</StepperTitle>
        </StepperTrigger>
        <StepperSeparator />
      </StepperItem>
      <StepperItem loading step={2}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>2</StepperIndicator>
          <StepperTitle>Checking coverage…</StepperTitle>
        </StepperTrigger>
        <StepperSeparator />
      </StepperItem>
      <StepperItem step={3}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>3</StepperIndicator>
          <StepperTitle>Payment</StepperTitle>
        </StepperTrigger>
      </StepperItem>
    </StepperNav>
  </Stepper>
);
Disabled Step story ok 
const DisabledStep = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={1}>
    <StepperNav>
      <StepperItem step={1}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>1</StepperIndicator>
          <StepperTitle>Identity</StepperTitle>
        </StepperTrigger>
        <StepperSeparator />
      </StepperItem>
      <StepperItem disabled step={2}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>2</StepperIndicator>
          <StepperTitle>Insurance</StepperTitle>
          <StepperDescription>Needs identity first</StepperDescription>
        </StepperTrigger>
      </StepperItem>
    </StepperNav>
  </Stepper>
);
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={2} orientation="vertical">
    <StepperNav>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.slice(0, 4).map(({ step, title }, index) => (
        <StepperItem key={step} step={step}>
          <StepperTrigger>
            <StepperIndicator>{step}</StepperIndicator>
            <div>
              <StepperTitle>{title}</StepperTitle>
              <StepperDescription>Step {step} of 4</StepperDescription>
            </div>
          </StepperTrigger>
          {index < 3 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
        </StepperItem>
      ))}
    </StepperNav>
  </Stepper>
);
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = function ControlledStepper() {
  const [step, setStep] = useState(1);

  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.stack}>
      <Stepper onValueChange={setStep} value={step}>
        <StepperNav>
          {CHECK_IN_STEPS.slice(0, 3).map(({ step: s, title }, index) => (
            <StepperItem key={s} step={s}>
              <StepperTrigger>
                <StepperIndicator>{s}</StepperIndicator>
                <StepperTitle>{title}</StepperTitle>
              </StepperTrigger>
              {index < 2 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
            </StepperItem>
          ))}
        </StepperNav>
        <StepperPanel>
          {CHECK_IN_STEPS.slice(0, 3).map(({ step: s, title }) => (
            <StepperContent key={s} value={s}>
              {title} content
            </StepperContent>
          ))}
        </StepperPanel>
      </Stepper>
      <div className={storyStyles.toolbar}>
        <Button disabled={step <= 1} onClick={() => setStep(step - 1)} variant="outline">
          Back
        </Button>
        <Button disabled={step >= 3} onClick={() => setStep(step + 1)} variant="primary">
          Continue
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={2} orientation="vertical">
    <StepperNav>
      <StepperItem step={1}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>1</StepperIndicator>
          <div>
            <StepperTitle>Confirm patient identity and appointment context</StepperTitle>
            <StepperDescription>Name, date of birth, clinic, appointment time, and the person completing check-in.</StepperDescription>
          </div>
        </StepperTrigger>
        <StepperSeparator />
      </StepperItem>
      <StepperItem step={2}>
        <StepperTrigger>
          <StepperIndicator>2</StepperIndicator>
          <div>
            <StepperTitle>Review preparation and requested laboratory tests</StepperTitle>
            <StepperDescription>Check fasting instructions, specimen requirements, payment route, and any collection notes.</StepperDescription>
          </div>
        </StepperTrigger>
      </StepperItem>
    </StepperNav>
  </Stepper>
);
Mobile Narrow story ok 
const MobileNarrow = () => (
  <Stepper defaultValue={3}>
    <StepperNav>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.map(({ step }, index) => (
        <StepperItem key={step} step={step}>
          <StepperTrigger aria-label={CHECK_IN_STEPS[index].title}>
            <StepperIndicator>{step}</StepperIndicator>
          </StepperTrigger>
          {index < CHECK_IN_STEPS.length - 1 ? <StepperSeparator /> : null}
        </StepperItem>
      ))}
    </StepperNav>
    <StepperPanel>
      {CHECK_IN_STEPS.map(({ step, title }) => (
        <StepperContent key={step} value={step}>
          {title}
        </StepperContent>
      ))}
    </StepperPanel>
  </Stepper>
);

SubjectHeader

design-system-clinical-components-subject-header · ./src/components/shared/subject-header/subject-header.stories.tsx
Identity strip for the top of a workflow: who this is, how the desk refers to them, and one derived state. Front desk and collection both mount it, so it names a *subject* rather than a patient — a draw worksheet and a check-in wizard are about the same person for different reasons. Adapted from the upstream Kura ui-kit `SubjectHeader` organism (avatar → title → meta → actions → status, sticky, two-row on mobile). The bordered meta chips are dropped: the Kura surface direction reserves containers for regions with their own state, so metadata is dot-separated text.
Prop types (react-docgen) 6 prop types 
Component: src/components/shared/subject-header/subject-header.tsx::SubjectHeader
Props:
/**
 * Trailing controls. Keep to one — this strip is context, not a toolbar.
 */
actions?: ReactNode

/**
 * Heading level, so a page can own its own `h1`.
 */
as?: 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' = 'h2'

/**
 * Shown while the subject has no name yet.
 */
placeholderTitle?: string = 'New visit'

/**
 * One derived state, never an action. The page footer owns the primary action.
 */
status?: { label: string; variant?: BadgeVariant }

/**
 * Sticks to `--subject-header-offset` (default 0). Set that variable when a
 * sticky topbar sits above the scroll container.
 */
sticky?: boolean = true

subject: {
  name?: string;
  /** Rendered with `lang="km"` so Khmer shapes correctly beside the Latin name. */
  nameKhmer?: string;
  /** Overrides the derived initials when the record carries its own. */
  initials?: string;
  /** How the desk calls this person today — a queue number or booth PID. */
  reference?: string;
  /** ISO date of birth; rendered with the derived age. */
  dob?: string;
  sexAtBirth?: 'Female' | 'Male' | '';
  /** Pre-formatted arrival, e.g. "08:24 · 12 min ago". Never computed here. */
  arrivedLabel?: string;
  /** Extra facts appended after the derived ones, in the caller's order. */
  meta?: readonly string[];
}
Imports 
import { Button, SubjectHeader } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok
A captured identity: name, how the desk calls them, and the facts to read back.
const Default = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={CAPTURED}
    status={{ label: 'Identity captured', variant: 'success' }} />;
Blank Walk In story ok
Nothing captured yet. The strip still holds the queue number and arrival — the two facts that exist before an identity does.
const BlankWalkIn = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={{ reference: 'Q-028', arrivedLabel: 'Just now' }}
    status={{ label: 'Awaiting check-in', variant: 'info' }} />;
Needs Verification story ok
Verification is unfinished — the state is loud, but it is still a fact, not a CTA.
const NeedsVerification = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={{ ...CAPTURED, name: 'Chenda Sreymom', nameKhmer: 'ចិន្តា ស្រីមុំ' }}
    status={{ label: 'Phone unverified', variant: 'warning' }} />;
With Action story ok
A trailing control is allowed, but only one — this strip is context, not a toolbar.
const WithAction = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={CAPTURED}
    status={{ label: 'Identity captured', variant: 'success' }}
    actions={(<Button size="sm" variant="outline">Open record
            </Button>)} />;
Collection Booth story ok
The collection booth names the same person by their booth PID.
const CollectionBooth = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={{
      name: 'Sokha Chan',
      nameKhmer: 'សុខា ចាន់',
      reference: 'P104481',
      dob: '1992-03-14',
      sexAtBirth: 'Female',
      meta: ['Order KO-4471'],
    }}
    status={{ label: 'Vitals recorded', variant: 'success' }} />;
Long Name story ok
Long names truncate; the meta line keeps every fact.
const LongName = () => <SubjectHeader
    subject={{
      ...CAPTURED,
      name: 'Bopha Sreyleak Chanthavy Rattanakiri',
      nameKhmer: 'បុប្ផា ស្រីលក្ខណ៍ ចន្ទថាវី',
      meta: ['Guardian present'],
    }}
    status={{ label: 'Identity captured', variant: 'success' }} />;
Sparse Facts story ok
No date of birth, no arrival — the strip renders only what it actually has.
const SparseFacts = () => <SubjectHeader subject={{ name: 'Vibol Keo', reference: 'Q-031' }} />;
Mobile story ok 
const Mobile = () => <SubjectHeader />;
Mobile 320 story ok 
const Mobile320 = () => <SubjectHeader
    actions={(<Button size="sm" variant="outline">Open record
            </Button>)} />;

import { Switch } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Switch description="Notify the patient when the appointment is confirmed.">Send appointment reminders</Switch>;
Sizes story ok 
const Sizes = () => (
  <div className={styles.switchGroup}>
    <Switch defaultChecked size="sm">Compact queue setting</Switch>
    <Switch defaultChecked size="md">Standard form setting</Switch>
  </div>
);
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Switch description="Unavailable until consent is recorded." disabled>Share results automatically</Switch>;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <Switch
    description="Managed by the clinic administrator."
    defaultChecked
    readOnly>Online booking enabled</Switch>;
Setting Group story ok 
const SettingGroup = () => (
  <div className={styles.switchGroup} aria-label="Notification settings" role="group">
    <Switch defaultChecked description="Notify the assigned clinician about critical updates.">Critical result alerts</Switch>
    <Switch description="Send a summary after the visit is completed.">Visit summary</Switch>
    <Switch defaultChecked description="Notify reception when a booking changes.">Booking changes</Switch>
  </div>
);
Mobile Long Content story ok 
const MobileLongContent = () => <Switch
    description="The patient receives one message with the updated clinic, time, and preparation instructions."
    defaultChecked>Send a reminder when a rescheduled appointment is ready for patient confirmation</Switch>;

Table

design-system-primitives-table · ./src/components/ui/table.stories.tsx
Semantic data table for operational lists. Wraps in a scroll container so wide clinical rows scroll inside the table, never the page.
Prop types (react-docgen) 1 prop type 
Component: src/components/ui/table.tsx::Table
Props:
/**
 * Compact rows for dense operational lists.
 */
density?: 'default' | 'compact' = 'default'
Imports 
import {
    Badge,
    Button,
    Table,
    TableBody,
    TableCaption,
    TableCell,
    TableFooter,
    TableHead,
    TableHeader,
    TableRow,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => (
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Code</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Patient</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Tests</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Due</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      {rows.map((row) => (
        <TableRow key={row.code}>
          <TableCell>{row.code}</TableCell>
          <TableCell>{row.patient}</TableCell>
          <TableCell numeric>{row.tests}</TableCell>
          <TableCell numeric>{row.due}</TableCell>
          <TableCell>
            <Badge variant={row.status === 'Done' ? 'success' : row.status === 'Waiting' ? 'neutral' : 'info'}>
              {row.status}
            </Badge>
          </TableCell>
        </TableRow>
      ))}
    </TableBody>
    <TableCaption>3 bookings · Toul Kork Branch · today</TableCaption>
  </Table>
);
Interactive Rows story ok 
const InteractiveRows = () => (
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Code</TableHead>
        <TableHead>Patient</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow interactive>
        <TableCell><Button onClick={() => undefined} size="compact" variant="link">Open FZ-48210</Button></TableCell>
        <TableCell>Sokha Chan</TableCell>
      </TableRow>
      <TableRow interactive selected>
        <TableCell><Button onClick={() => undefined} size="compact" variant="link">Open KM-77031</Button></TableCell>
        <TableCell>Lina Sroeun</TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
);
With Footer story ok 
const WithFooter = () => (
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Service</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Items</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Amount</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow><TableCell>Laboratory tests</TableCell><TableCell numeric>3</TableCell><TableCell numeric>$24.00</TableCell></TableRow>
      <TableRow><TableCell>Collection fee</TableCell><TableCell numeric>1</TableCell><TableCell numeric>$4.00</TableCell></TableRow>
    </TableBody>
    <TableFooter>
      <TableRow><TableCell>Total due</TableCell><TableCell numeric>4</TableCell><TableCell numeric>$28.00</TableCell></TableRow>
    </TableFooter>
    <TableCaption>Booking FZ-48210 · patient-pay summary</TableCaption>
  </Table>
);
Compact Density story ok 
const CompactDensity = () => (
  <Table density="compact">
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        <TableHead>Analyte</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Value</TableHead>
        <TableHead numeric>Ref range</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      {[
        ['Creatinine', '3.86', '0.51–0.95'],
        ['BUN', '38', '6–20'],
        ['Potassium', '5.2', '3.5–5.1'],
      ].map(([name, value, range]) => (
        <TableRow key={name}>
          <TableCell>{name}</TableCell>
          <TableCell numeric>{value}</TableCell>
          <TableCell numeric>{range}</TableCell>
        </TableRow>
      ))}
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
);
Mobile Overflow story ok 
const MobileOverflow = () => (
  <Table>
    <TableHeader>
      <TableRow>
        {['Sample', 'Tube', 'Tests', 'Volume', 'Container', 'Priority', 'Status'].map((head) => (
          <TableHead key={head}>{head}</TableHead>
        ))}
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      <TableRow>
        <TableCell>104481920733</TableCell>
        <TableCell>Lavender · EDTA</TableCell>
        <TableCell>CBC, HbA1c</TableCell>
        <TableCell numeric>4 mL</TableCell>
        <TableCell>4 mL K₂ EDTA</TableCell>
        <TableCell>
          <Badge variant="danger">STAT</Badge>
        </TableCell>
        <TableCell>
          <Badge variant="neutral">Awaiting collection</Badge>
        </TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    </TableBody>
    <TableCaption>Wide clinical rows scroll inside the table — the page never scrolls sideways.</TableCaption>
  </Table>
);

appearance?: 'underline' | 'subtle' = 'underline'
Imports 
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <BookingTabs />;
Subtle story ok 
const Subtle = () => <BookingTabs appearance="subtle" />;
Vertical story ok 
const Vertical = () => <BookingTabs orientation="vertical" />;
Disabled Tab story ok 
const DisabledTab = () => (
  <Tabs defaultValue="summary">
    <TabsList aria-label="Record sections">
      <TabsTrigger value="summary">Summary</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger disabled value="results">Results unavailable</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
    <TabsContent className={styles.tabsPanel} value="summary">No results have been released for this record.</TabsContent>
  </Tabs>
);
Controlled story ok 
const Controlled = function ControlledTabs() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState('summary');
  return (
    <Tabs onValueChange={setValue} value={value}>
      <TabsList aria-label="Controlled booking tabs">
        <TabsTrigger value="summary">Summary</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="history">History</TabsTrigger>
      </TabsList>
      <TabsContent className={styles.tabsPanel} value="summary">Current booking summary.</TabsContent>
      <TabsContent className={styles.tabsPanel} value="history">Previous booking history.</TabsContent>
    </Tabs>
  );
};
Mobile Long Labels story ok 
const MobileLongLabels = () => (
  <Tabs defaultValue="summary">
    <TabsList aria-label="Patient record sections">
      <TabsTrigger value="summary">Patient and appointment summary</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="preparation">Preparation instructions</TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="history">Previous appointment history</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
    <TabsContent className={styles.tabsPanel} value="summary">Summary content remains readable while the tab list scrolls intentionally.</TabsContent>
  </Tabs>
);

Component: src/components/ui/textarea.tsx::Textarea
Props:
disabled?: any = false

/**
 * Specific recovery guidance for an invalid value.
 */
error?: ReactNode

/**
 * Supporting text that helps the user enter the right value.
 */
helpText?: ReactNode

/**
 * Visible field label. Omit only when an external label references the textarea.
 */
label?: ReactNode

readOnly?: any = false

ref?: Ref<HTMLTextAreaElement>

required?: any = false

/**
 * Controls how the field can be resized without changing its semantic contract.
 */
resize?: 'none' | 'vertical' | 'both' = 'vertical'

rows?: any = 3
Imports 
import { Textarea } from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <Textarea label="Clinical note" placeholder="Add context for the next attempt…" />;
Required story ok 
const Required = () => <Textarea label="Reason details" required placeholder="Explain the exception…" />;
Invalid story ok 
const Invalid = () => <Textarea
    label="Next-step note"
    error="Add a note before continuing."
    value=""
    onChange={() => {}} />;
Disabled story ok 
const Disabled = () => <Textarea
    disabled
    helpText="Notes are locked after handoff."
    label="Handoff note"
    value="This note can no longer be changed." />;
Read Only story ok 
const ReadOnly = () => <Textarea
    helpText="This note is locked after handoff."
    label="Handoff note"
    readOnly
    value="Patient prefers the left arm. Reconfirm consent before the next attempt." />;
Resize Options story ok 
const ResizeOptions = () => (
  <div className={storyStyles.grid}>
    <Textarea label="Fixed note" resize="none" value="This field keeps its assigned geometry." readOnly />
    <Textarea label="Vertical resize" resize="vertical" defaultValue="Drag the lower edge when more writing space is useful." />
    <Textarea label="Two-axis resize" resize="both" defaultValue="Use both-axis resizing only in flexible workspaces." />
  </div>
);
Character Count Composition story ok 
const CharacterCountComposition = function CountedTextarea() {
  const [value, setValue] = useState('Patient requested a morning appointment.');
  return (
    <div className={storyStyles.narrow}>
      <Textarea
        helpText={`${value.length} of 240 characters`}
        label="Booking note"
        maxLength={240}
        onChange={(event) => setValue(event.currentTarget.value)}
        value={value}
      />
    </div>
  );
};
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => <Textarea
    label="Next-attempt context"
    value="Patient requested a pause after the first attempt. Reconfirm identity, review the selected site, and ask whether the patient is ready before collecting this tube again."
    onChange={() => {}} />;
Mobile Long Content story ok 
const MobileLongContent = () => <Textarea />;

Props:

/**
 * Initial/current event when the timeline is not externally controlled.

 * Current event number; earlier events render as completed.

Imports 
import {
    CheckIcon,
    Timeline,
    TimelineContent,
    TimelineDate,
    TimelineHeader,
    TimelineIndicator,
    TimelineItem,
    TimelineSeparator,
    TimelineTitle,
} from "ultimate-final-dcm";
Default story ok 
const Default = () => <OperationalTimeline />;
Horizontal story ok 
const Horizontal = () => <OperationalTimeline orientation="horizontal" />;
Long Content story ok 
const LongContent = () => (
  <Timeline aria-label="Specimen activity" className={styles.timelineFrame} value={2}>
    <TimelineItem step={1}>
      <TimelineHeader><TimelineDate dateTime="2026-07-17T09:04:00+07:00">17 Jul · 09:04</TimelineDate><TimelineTitle>Specimen received</TimelineTitle></TimelineHeader>
      <TimelineIndicator><CheckIcon /></TimelineIndicator><TimelineSeparator />
      <TimelineContent>Received at the central laboratory with the patient identifier, collection time, collector, tube type, transport condition, and requested test panel intact.</TimelineContent>
    </TimelineItem>
    <TimelineItem step={2}>
      <TimelineHeader><TimelineDate dateTime="2026-07-17T09:18:00+07:00">17 Jul · 09:18</TimelineDate><TimelineTitle>Accession review in progress</TimelineTitle></TimelineHeader>
      <TimelineIndicator /><TimelineSeparator />
      <TimelineContent>The accession team is reconciling a long test name and checking whether the available volume supports every requested assay.</TimelineContent>
    </TimelineItem>
  </Timeline>
);

  <div className={styles.row}>
    <Toaster id={toasterIds.semanticTones} />
    <Button
      variant="outline"
      onClick={() =>
        toast.success("Payment recorded", {
          id: "storybook-toast-semantic-tones",
          toasterId: toasterIds.semanticTones,
        })
      }
    >
      Success
    </Button>
    <Button
      variant="outline"
      onClick={() =>
        toast.info("Booking updated", {
          id: "storybook-toast-semantic-tones",
          toasterId: toasterIds.semanticTones,
        })
      }
    >

    </Button>
    <Button
      variant="outline"
      onClick={() =>
        toast.warning("Coverage needs review", {
          id: "storybook-toast-semantic-tones",
          toasterId: toasterIds.semanticTones,
        })
      }
    >
      Warning
    </Button>
    <Button
      variant="outline"
      onClick={() =>
        toast.error("Result could not be sent", {

const WithAction = () => (
  <div className={styles.actionStack}>
    <Toaster id={toasterIds.withAction} />
    <Button
      onClick={() =>
        toast.success("Patient added to the queue", {
          action: { label: "View queue", onClick: () => undefined },
          description: "Sokha Chan · Walk-in",
